title: Join Our Team as a Remote Loan Processor
description:
Join a fast-moving team where your judgment and expertise truly make an impact. We’re looking for a driven, independent professional who excels in a remote environment and takes ownership of their work with confidence. In this role, you’ll be at the forefront of credit decision-making—analyzing deals, assessing risk, and delivering timely, high-quality underwriting within your delegated authority.



You’ll evaluate commercial properties, dive into market and demographic trends, and assess the financial strength and track record of borrowers and guarantors. If you enjoy solving complex financial puzzles and working in a high-volume setting, this is your space to thrive.



What You’ll Bring:

The ability to stay sharp and efficient in a fast-paced, high-output environment

A strong sense of integrity and respect for confidentiality

Clear, professional communication skills—both written and verbal

Analytical thinking paired with a natural curiosity to investigate deeper

Strong time management skills and the ability to juggle competing priorities

Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, Outlook, and financial analysis tools

A solid grasp of financial accounting, loan structuring, and commercial lending products



What You’ll Need:

A personal computer or laptop (minimum Core i3) with a working webcam

A noise-canceling headset for focused communication

Stable, high-speed internet to support seamless remote work



If you’re detail-oriented, self-motivated, and confident in your credit analysis skills, this is an opportunity to grow your career while making impactful lending decisions—all from the comfort of your own workspace.

title: Remote Email Marketing & Automation Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Remote
 Marketing & Automation Specialist to own and optimize the entire outbound
 lifecycle from contact sourcing to booked and completed appointments. This role is ideal for someone who understands both strategy and execution, and can build, launch, and continuously improve high-performing
 campaigns using modern tools and automation platforms.



Key Responsibilities



End-to-End
 Campaign Management:



Build and manage outbound
 campaigns from initial contact acquisition through to booked and completed appointments.

Develop and maintain clean, high-quality prospect lists (B2B focus preferred)

Segment audiences to improve targeting, personalization, and response rates



Deliverability & Domain Management:



Set up and manage
 infrastructure, including domains, inboxes, and DNS records

Execute domain warm-up strategies to ensure high deliverability and inbox placement

Monitor sender reputation, spam scores, and blacklist status

Continuously optimize sending schedules, volumes, and inbox rotation



Automation & Workflow Development:



Build complete automation systems that move leads through the pipeline:

Sent ? Opened ? Replied ? Qualified ? Scheduled ? Showed ? Closed

Create workflows that automatically:

Detect and categorize replies

Notify sales teams of hot prospects

Trigger follow-ups and nurture sequences

Assign leads and schedule appointments

Integrate
 systems with CRM and calendar tools



Copy & Campaign Optimization:



Write and/or optimize high-converting cold
 copy

A/B test subject lines, messaging, CTAs, and sequences

Continuously analyze performance metrics (open rates, reply rates, booked calls, and show rates)

Refine campaigns to maximize ROI and appointment volume



CRM & Appointment Pipeline Management:



Build and maintain pipelines inside CRM systems

Ensure seamless handoff from marketing to sales

Track and optimize the full funnel from first touch to completed appointment

Implement reminders, confirmations, and follow-ups to increase show rates



Required Skills & Experience:



Proven experience managing cold
 campaigns at scale

Deep expertise with platforms such as:

Instantly (or similar outbound
 tools)

Go High Level (GHL) or comparable CRM/automation systems

Strong understanding of:

 deliverability (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, warm-up strategies)

Inbox placement and spam avoidance

Experience building end-to-end automation workflows

Ability to manage multiple domains, inboxes, and campaigns simultaneously

Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and optimize performance

Experience integrating tools via APIs, webhooks, or native integrations (preferred)



Nice to Have:

Experience in lead generation for service-based businesses (home services, agencies, contractors, etc.)

Familiarity with additional tools such as Apollo, Smartlead, or Clay

Basic understanding of sales processes and qualification frameworks

Copywriting skills specifically for cold outreach



Key Outcomes (What Success Looks Like)



High-performing
 campaigns with strong deliverability and reply rates

Consistent flow of qualified booked appointments

Fully automated pipeline from first
 to completed meeting

Clean, scalable systems that can be replicated across campaigns



How to Apply



Please submit:



A summary of your experience with years of experience and platforms you used (no resumes) 

Examples of campaigns or systems you’ve built

Tools and platforms you specialize in

Any performance metrics (open rates, reply rates, booked calls, etc.)

title: Learner Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Learner Success Coordinator supports the onboarding and ongoing engagement of clients and their teams within the 10X Business Academy. This role focuses on executing engagement plans, monitoring participation metrics, and maintaining proactive communication to ensure a positive learner experience. The Coordinator partners closely with the Learner Success Manager to deliver consistent service, identify engagement risks early, and contribute to high client satisfaction and retention.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Participation, course completion, and engagement metrics consistently meet or exceed benchmarks, demonstrating strong learner follow-through.

• Engagement gaps or client concerns are identified early and escalated appropriately, preventing negative impact on satisfaction or retention.

• Client records, tracking, and reporting are consistently accurate and timely, while the Coordinator demonstrates increasing ownership, confidence, and readiness for advancement to Learner Success Manager.



OBJECTIVES

• Support seamless onboarding of new clients and learners by coordinating orientation sessions, tracking setup completion, and ensuring timely follow-up communication.

• Monitor learner engagement metrics daily/weekly (course progress, participation, attendance, logins) and escalate risks to the Learner Success Manager.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Conduct scheduled check-in calls and
 follow-ups using approved engagement frameworks.

• Execute engagement action plans developed by the Learner Success Lead.

• Identify disengagement patterns early and recommend proactive outreach strategies.

• Ensure client inquiries are responded to within established service-level timelines.

• Prepare client progress summaries and engagement reports for review by the Learner Success Lead.

• Coordinate scheduling of kick-off/accountability/coaching calls.

• Support accountability tracking by documenting team participation and milestone completion.

• Assist in renewal preparation by compiling engagement history and performance insights.

• Contribute to continuous improvement by documenting common learner challenges and recommending process enhancements.

• Uphold client confidentiality and data integrity standards.

• Demonstrate consistent adherence to communication and service quality standards.



COMPETENCIES

• Demonstrates patience, empathy, and professionalism in client interactions.

• Clear verbal and written communication in a global business environment.

• Follows structured workflows, checklists, and SOPs with accuracy.

• Builds rapport and trust with clients and learners.

• Consistently meets deadlines and follows through on commitments.

• Ability to interpret basic engagement metrics and recognize trends.

• Maintains high accuracy in documentation and reporting.

• Adjusts quickly to new systems, tools, and evolving processes.

• Works effectively with managers and cross-functional teams.

• Knows when to resolve independently and when to escalate.

• Effectively manages multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Operates effectively in cross-border client relationships.

• Demonstrates willingness to learn coaching frameworks and client engagement strategies.

• Comfortable using CRM systems, online learning platforms, and productivity tools.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Education, Communications, or related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, virtual support, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience supporting global clients or working in remote environments is preferred.

• Familiarity with CRM systems and online learning platforms is an advantage.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Global Virtual Assistant
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Global Virtual Assistant provides administrative and operational support to executive leadership. This role is responsible for managing schedules, coordinating team workflows, supporting meetings and events, and ensuring day-to-day administrative functions run smoothly. The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple priorities in a professional environment.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



OBJECTIVES

· Manage executive calendars, scheduling, and meeting coordination.

· Provide general administrative support, including correspondence and document preparation.

· Coordinate internal team workflow scheduling and track deadlines.

· Organize and manage logistics for meetings, events, and conferences.

· Assist with travel arrangements and itinerary planning when needed.

· Maintain organized records and documentation.

· Support special projects and additional administrative tasks as assigned.



COMPETENCIES

· Proven experience in an administrative or executive assistant role.

· Strong organizational and time management skills.

· Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

· Ability to handle confidential information with professionalism.

title: Long Form Youtube Video Editor
description:
YOU CAN START TODAY



I run a YouTube channel called Austin Talks Money in the Bitcoin and financial planning niche, currently at ~6,000 subscribers and growing through Bitcoin retirement planning, debt strategy, and financial education content.



Looking to hit 15,000+ subscribers this year.



I post 1-2 long form videos per week and am looking for somebody reliable to edit them on demand.



IMPORTANT — THE EDITING STYLE:



I do NOT want the typical YouTube editing style. No heavy B-roll, no stock footage, no zooms, no flip motion, no constant jump cuts, no sound effects on every transition. That style actually hurts my business videos.



Instead, I use a simple, scaled-back style. Before you do anything else, watch this video from Ed Lawrence — this is EXACTLY the style I want you to learn and apply to my footage:







The core of this style is:



1. Cut all mistakes, pauses, stumbles, and filler lines that don't move the point forward

2. Only use jump cuts at the END of a sentence for emphasis — NEVER mid-sentence (it looks like a glitch and wrecks credibility)

3. Three text styles only:

   - Step numbers on a black background when transitioning to a new point

   - Split-screen with key points typing in next to me as I talk

   - Full-frame text/charts with me shrunk into a corner box when the visual needs more room

4. Visual metaphors and on-screen diagrams to make abstract financial concepts (Bitcoin, compound growth, retirement math) tangible

5. Minimal motion — text just appears or types on, no swooshing, no SFX



TWO TYPES OF VIDEOS YOU'LL BE EDITING:



1. Full-production videos — $60 per video. Raw screenshare + talking head footage with the text overlays described above, simple charts/numbers when I reference them, and occasional Bitcoin price or concept overlays. Still no fancy motion graphics.



2. Simple talking-head screenshare videos — $15 per video. These are even more stripped back. Just me talking to camera with a screenshare. For these, the edit is basically: cut mistakes, cut filler, clean up pauses, and that's it. Maybe one or two key text callouts if something critical needs emphasis, but otherwise no overlays, no text styles, no extras. The goal is fast turnaround and minimal editing time. Think of these as "polished but plain" — the value is in the content, not the production.



I'll tell you which type each video is when I send you the raw footage. Paid every 2 weeks via your preferred method after work is delivered and approved.



Here's my best performing video in the full-production style — this is the bar to match for type 1:







Notice how clean it is. Notice the text style. Notice what ISN'T there.



You are expected to be available on chat between 9:00 AM EST and 12:00 PM EST mainly, but can work when you want as long as you check often.



You MUST be able to deliver 1-2 long form videos per week consistently.



TASK REQUIRED TO APPLY:



Go into this Google Drive folder and edit this raw footage into one polished video in the full-production style described above:







Before you start, watch the Ed Lawrence video linked above and watch my best video linked above. Your edit should feel like a blend of those two.



Specifically I'll be looking for:

- Clean cuts of mistakes and filler

- Proper jump cut discipline (only at sentence ends)

- At least one use of each of the three text styles (step number on black, split-screen with typed-on points, full-frame visual with me in corner)

- At least one visual metaphor or on-screen diagram to explain a concept



Include a Google Drive link to your edited work, your name, any experience you have editing in this style, and a few other examples of your portfolio work. SHARE THE GOOGLE DRIVE VIDEO FILE WITH [YOUR
]



*In the reply to this message you must include the sample edit + your favorite color at the top to show attention to detail and that you read the entire message. Also tell me in one sentence what the #1 editing mistake was that Ed Lawrence warned against in his video.*



If I like your work I'll reach out and we'll schedule a Zoom call.

title: Client Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Success Coordinator supports the onboarding and ongoing engagement of clients and their teams within the 10X Business Academy. This role focuses on executing engagement plans, monitoring participation metrics, and maintaining proactive communication to ensure a positive learner experience. The Coordinator partners closely with the Learner Success Manager to deliver consistent service, identify engagement risks early, and contribute to high client satisfaction and retention.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Participation, course completion, and engagement metrics consistently meet or exceed benchmarks, demonstrating strong learner follow-through.

• Engagement gaps or client concerns are identified early and escalated appropriately, preventing negative impact on satisfaction or retention.

• Client records, tracking, and reporting are consistently accurate and timely, while the Coordinator demonstrates increasing ownership, confidence, and readiness for advancement to Learner Success Manager.



OBJECTIVES

• Support seamless onboarding of new clients and learners by coordinating orientation sessions, tracking setup completion, and ensuring timely follow-up communication.

• Monitor learner engagement metrics daily/weekly (course progress, participation, attendance, logins) and escalate risks to the Learner Success Manager.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Conduct scheduled check-in calls and
 follow-ups using approved engagement frameworks.

• Execute engagement action plans developed by the Learner Success Lead.

• Identify disengagement patterns early and recommend proactive outreach strategies.

• Ensure client inquiries are responded to within established service-level timelines.

• Prepare client progress summaries and engagement reports for review by the Learner Success Lead.

• Coordinate scheduling of kick-off/accountability/coaching calls.

• Support accountability tracking by documenting team participation and milestone completion.

• Assist in renewal preparation by compiling engagement history and performance insights.

• Contribute to continuous improvement by documenting common learner challenges and recommending process enhancements.

• Uphold client confidentiality and data integrity standards.

• Demonstrate consistent adherence to communication and service quality standards.



COMPETENCIES

• Demonstrates patience, empathy, and professionalism in client interactions.

• Clear verbal and written communication in a global business environment.

• Follows structured workflows, checklists, and SOPs with accuracy.

• Builds rapport and trust with clients and learners.

• Consistently meets deadlines and follows through on commitments.

• Ability to interpret basic engagement metrics and recognize trends.

• Maintains high accuracy in documentation and reporting.

• Adjusts quickly to new systems, tools, and evolving processes.

• Works effectively with managers and cross-functional teams.

• Knows when to resolve independently and when to escalate.

• Effectively manages multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Operates effectively in cross-border client relationships.

• Demonstrates willingness to learn coaching frameworks and client engagement strategies.

• Comfortable using CRM systems, online learning platforms, and productivity tools.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Education, Communications, or related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, virtual support, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience supporting global clients or working in remote environments is preferred.

• Familiarity with CRM systems and online learning platforms is an advantage.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.

title: Dispatch Operations Specialist
description:
GH Logistics is a US based asset carrier operating 150+ company trucks on dedicated government contract freight. We run 365 days a year on consistent, contracted routes across 48 states. We're scaling fast with new markets, new lanes, new teams, and we need operators who can keep up.



This isn't a BPO. This isn't a call center. You'll be embedded in a real U.S. logistics operation working alongside American dispatchers, drivers, and carriers on live freight.



Role Overview

You're an operator working directly alongside our dispatch and freight management team, handling the higher complexity operational work that keeps our network running. Think of this as the role that handles what most people can't, the exceptions, the escalations, the details that make or break a load.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Load Management — Monitor and manage active loads across our network. Tracking, status updates, carrier and driver communication, exception handling. You own the load from pickup to delivery.

• Quality Assurance — Verify data accuracy, documentation completeness, and process compliance across active loads. Catch problems before they become expensive.

• Carrier Communication — Check calls, appointment scheduling, detention tracking, rate confirmations. You're the voice on the phone making sure freight moves on time.

• Driver Support Coordination — Respond to driver inquiries, route them to the right internal team, document issues. Drivers call with problems and you solve them or escalate them fast.

• TMS Data Integrity — Loads, rates, stops, and documents. Everything in our systems needs to be accurate. You're the last line of defense before bad data creates bad decisions.

• Process Improvement — Identify recurring issues, flag inefficiencies, and recommend fixes. We don't want someone who just follows a checklist. We want someone who makes the checklist better.

• Reporting — Daily and weekly ops summaries for US leadership. Clear, concise, and no fluff.

• Escalation Management — Know what you can solve vs. what needs to go up the chain, and route it fast. No sitting on problems.



Who We’re Looking For

• 2+ years experience in freight brokerage, dispatch, or logistics operations — NOT general VA work. We need someone who already knows what a BOL is, what detention means, and how a load moves from quote to delivery.

• Hands-on experience with TMS platforms — TMW, McLeod, Aljex, Turvo, or similar. If you've dispatched loads in a real system, we want to talk to you.

• Load board familiarity — DAT, Truckstop, Highway or similar. You've sourced carriers or managed freight on these platforms before.

• Strong English — written and verbal. You'll be on calls and
s with US based drivers, carriers, and leadership daily. This is non negotiable.

• Night shift in PH availability — You'll work U.S. business hours. CST timezone alignment preferred (7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST/CDT = 8:00 PM – 6:00 AM PHT). 

• Other shift availability (if assigned) are 3:00 PM - 1:00 AM CST/CDT & 11:00 PM - 9:00 AM CST/CDT

• Self-directed. You don't wait to be told what to do. You see the problem, you fix it, you report it. If you need someone holding your hand, this isn't the role.

• Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup. No internet cafes. No shared computers.

• Back up internet and power stations.

• Zoom presence (with camera open and unmuted audio) required (non negotiable)

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support



What You'll Get

• $7/hr USD — Paid consistently biweekly. No delayed payments and no excuses.

• Paid training — Only paid UPON completion.

• Stable & long-term position — This is not project-based. This is not seasonal. We're building a team and we need people who want to build with us.

• Growth path — 90 day performance review with opportunity to advance into senior operations roles as we scale. We're growing fast and the people who prove themselves early get the best opportunities.

• Direct access to U.S. executive leadership — You're not buried in a call center reporting to a middle manager in Manila. You work directly with our operations team in Texas and Tennessee.

• Real operations work — Live freight, real drivers, real carriers, real money on the line. This isn't data entry with a fancy title.



Who Thrives Here

• People who've worked in a U.S. freight brokerage or 3PL and want something more stable

• Former dispatchers or carrier reps who are tired of BPO environments

• Operators who take ownership. You don't clock in and zone out. You run your loads like they are your business.

• People who want to grow into leadership but need the right company to do it in.



Who This Isn't For

• General VAs looking for easy remote work. This is real logistics and not admin tasks.

• People who need constant supervision or step by step instructions for every task

• Anyone who can't commit to US shift hours consistently

• Candidates without actual freight/logistics experience. We don't have time to teach the basics.



How to Apply:

title: VA QC Project & Admin/Instagram Specialist
description:
DEPARTMENT: Project Coordination / Customer Support



REPORTS TO: CEO



WORK HOURS, FULLTIME: 8:00 AM EST. - 2:00 PM EST.



STARTING SALARY: $5- $6 per hour



POTENTIAL SALARY: $1,000-$1,800 / Month





SUMMARY



We’re looking for someone smart, organized, and excited to grow with us! If you’re a positive, detail-oriented person who loves to learn, takes feedback well, and wants to be part of a close-knit, supportive team — we’d love to meet you.



This is a long-term role for someone who’s ready to take on more responsibility over time and become a key part of our journey.



Who We Are:



AR
dia is a real estate media company based in Northern Virginia. We create amazing photo and video content for realtors, and we’re known for our fast turnaround, friendly service, and high-quality work. Our team is growing quickly, and we’re passionate about doing great work and loving the team we work with.



If you’re looking for a place where your ideas matter, you’ll be supported, and you can grow — this might be the perfect fit.



Job Summary



Manage, review for quality, upload, and retouch photos and video on a daily basis. Follow up with editing team on project status. Maintain communication with clients and answer customer inquiries via text and
. Book & manage projects on behalf of customers.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Project Management



Send out projects before 12 PM EST



Quality Control for Deliverables (Photos, Videos, 3D Tours)



Make edits to photos in photoshop/lightroom as needed



Make edits to Videos as needed



Customer Support



Monitor and manage all incoming communication through phone calls, text messages, and the support inbox



Respond promptly and professionally to client inquiries via
, text, or phone



Provide regular project updates to clients to ensure they feel informed and supported throughout the process



Customer Success (Answer questions, help clients, etc.)



Flag urgent or complex issues for the appropriate tea
mber and ensure timely follow-up



SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS



Ability to take on several tasks at once.



Extreme attention to detail.



Excellent English speaking and written.



Ability to speak with clients on the phone with confidence.



Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software experience.



Proficient in Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Lightroom, Slack.



Preferred proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro.



Proficient with Google G Suite and word processing software.



Fast learner and willing to learn



Preferred experience in leading a team and management



INSTRUCTION TO APPLY



Please
 
 a video recording of you answering the following four questions:



Please tell us about yourself, what do you love?



Please detail your past work experience and how it relates to this job at AR
dia. Why you do you believe you would be a great candidate for this position?



Do you have leadership or management experience?

title: Part-Time Phone Assistant for US Painting Company (Clear English Required)
description:
About us:

We are Spruce Point Painting, a premium residential painting company in Vermont, USA. We work with high-end homeowners and our brand depends on professional, warm, confident phone communication.

The role:

You will be the first voice our potential clients hear when they call. Your job is to handle initial lead calls, ask the right questions, and book site visits for our team.

What you will do:



Answer inbound calls from homeowners during US Eastern Time business hours

Return missed calls and new leads quickly (target is within 15 minutes)

Follow our structured call script to qualify leads and understand their project

Book appointments directly into our calendar system

Enter clean, detailed notes into our CRM (Jobber, we will train you)

Send confirmation texts and follow-up messages

Flag complex or high-value leads to the owner



What we are looking for:



Excellent English, clear and neutral-sounding. Our clients are American homeowners and must feel comfortable on the phone with you.

3+ years of US-based phone experience (call center, customer service, appointment setting, ISA for real estate, or home services)

Confident, warm, and professional phone presence

Strong attention to detail when taking notes

Available Monday to Friday during US Eastern Time business hours (approximately 8am to 6pm ET, which is 9pm to 7am Philippine Time)

Reliable internet, quiet work environment, and a good quality headset

Experience with Jobber, ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro, or similar CRM is a plus



What we offer:



Ongoing long-term role, not a short project

Paid hourly with performance bonuses for confirmed estimates and closed jobs

Full training on our script, systems, and CRM

Clear expectations and direct communication

Room to grow into more hours as our business expands



How to apply:

Please send your application with the following:



A voice recording of 30 to 60 seconds introducing yourself. Say: "Hi, this is [your name] with Spruce Point Painting, how can I help you today?" Then briefly share your phone experience. Upload to Google Drive or Vocaroo and share the link.

A homeowner calls and says: "I just want a ballpark. How much does it cost to paint a 2,000 square foot house?" How would you respond? (Write your response in your application.)

List your US phone experience. Include company names, your role, how long, and any CRMs you used.

Your time zone and confirm you can work US Eastern Time business hours.



Applications without the voice recording will not be reviewed.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Levi

Spruce Point Painting

title: Paralegal / Legal Assistant
description:
Option 1: Combined Paralegal/Legal Assistant Role

Best if you need one person to handle both substantive legal work and administrative tasks.

Job Title: Paralegal / Legal Assistant - Boutique Firm

Location: [City, State] (On-site/Hybrid)

Position Type: Full-time

About Us

Thomas Law Firm is a fast-paced, boutique law firm specializing in Civil Litigation, Real Estate, and Estate Planning. We pride ourselves on providing high-touch, personalized service to our clients. As a small firm, every tea
mber makes a massive impact.



Job Summary

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Paralegal/Legal Assistant to support our attorneys in all phases of the legal process. You will handle a mix of substantive legal drafting, client communication, and office administration. This is a high-impact role for someone who thrives on responsibility and autonomy.



Key Responsibilities

Draft, proofread, and file pleadings, motions, discovery requests, and correspondence.

Manage firm calendars, including court deadlines, depositions, and meetings.

Direct client communication (intake, case updates, and scheduling).

Perform case file management, including digital organization (e-filing in state/federal courts).

Prepare trial binders and hearing exhibits.



Qualifications

2+ years of experience in a law firm environment.

Strong knowledge of legal procedure and local court rules.

Proficiency in MS Office Suite, Google Suite, and case management software 

Exceptional written/verbal communication skills.

Ability to work independently and prioritize under tight deadlines.



Benefits

Paid Time Off and Holidays

title: Marketing Technology Coordinator
description:
ABOUT US

At Hodge Industrial Technologies, we are building a company designed to scale—with structure, systems, and intentional growth.



We are a fast-growing, multi-location industrial equipment and service company expanding into new markets across the United States. We launch new branches regularly, and our ability to scale depends on clean systems, strong infrastructure, and disciplined execution.



We don’t build marketing that creates noise—we build marketing systems that drive growth.



WHY HODGE

Built for Growth

We are actively expanding into new markets. This role directly supports that expansion.

Systems Over Chaos

We believe growth without structure creates problems. Our focus is building repeatable, scalable systems.

Clear Expectations



You will always know:

What success looks like

How you’re measured

What needs to get done

Center of Caring

We operate from a center of caring—with high standards and mutual respect. We support each other, but we also hold a high bar.

Built for A-Players



We hire people who:

Take ownership

Solve problems without being asked

Care deeply about doing things right



WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

This role is the foundation of our marketing engine.

Every system you build or maintain impacts:

Lead flow

Branch launches

Data accuracy

Decision-making

You are not running campaigns—you are building the infrastructure that makes marketing work.



ROLE OVERVIEW

The Marketing Technology Coordinator owns the technical infrastructure of the marketing department.



This includes:

Websites

Landing pages

Automation workflows

CRM integrations

Tracking and analytics

Dashboards

As we launch new branches, you ensure each one goes live with fully operational marketing systems from day one.

This is not a content role.

This is not a social media role.

This is a systems, automation, and infrastructure role.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Own Website Infrastructure

Manage all websites (new builds + ongoing updates)

Duplicate and localize master templates for new branches

Build and update landing pages

Upload blogs, videos, pricing, photos, and copy

Optimize site performance and user experience



Own Lead Flow & CRM Integration

Build and manage webforms

Ensure accurate routing into CRM systems

Create conditional logic for lead routing

Troubleshoot form or routing issues immediately



Own Automation

Build and maintain Zapier workflows

Improve efficiency through automation

Ensure clean, reliable data flow between systems



Own Tracking & Analytics

Install and maintain GA4, pixels, and conversion tracking

Ensure accurate campaign attribution

Identify and resolve tracking inconsistencies



Own Dashboards & Reporting

Build branch-level dashboards

Automate recurring reporting

Monitor performance metrics

Provide data-driven recommendations for improvement



Own Branch Launch Execution

For every new branch, you are responsible for ensuring:

Website is live and localized

Forms are working and routing correctly

Tracking is installed and verified

Dashboards are built and functional

 routing is configured

Full QA is completed before launch



HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED (BIG 3)

1. Execution & Throughput

All assigned projects completed on time

No unresolved tech tasks older than 7 days



2. System Reliability

Zero broken forms or routing errors

Zero tracking failures

Monthly system audit completed



3. Optimization & Improvement

At least one system or automation improvement per month

Monthly performance review with actionable recommendations



WORK STRUCTURE (PHILIPPINES-BASED ROLE)

Fully remote (work from home)

Works closely with U.S.-based marketing team

Structured, systems-driven workflow

High ownership, low hand-holding environment



REQUIRED SKILLS

Experience with WordPress, Webflow, or similar CMS

Landing page creation

Zapier or similar automation tools

CRM form integrations

Google Analytics (GA4)

Dashboard tools (Looker Studio, Databox, etc.)

Basic HTML/CSS troubleshooting



IDEAL CANDIDATE

Systems thinker (sees how everything connects)

Detail-oriented and process-driven

Self-directed and proactive

Strong problem solver

Comfortable working independently

Analytical and data-driven



COMPENSATION

Compensation will be based on experience and skill level and is competitive for the Philippines market.



EMPLOYMENT STRUCTURE

This role supports a U.S.-based company

Work is performed remotely from the Philippines

Payment structure and classification will be discussed during hiring

Candidates must be comfortable supporting a growing, fast-paced organization



HOW TO APPLY

Please submit:

Resume

Portfolio of websites or landing pages

Examples of automation workflows you have built

A short explanation of a marketing system you improved

title: Membership Quoting Specialist
description:
ABOUT US

At Hodge Industrial Technologies, we believe great companies are built by people who care deeply about their work and each other.

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based industrial service company with multiple branches across the country. We service and maintain mission-critical industrial air compressor systems for commercial and manufacturing clients—meaning what we do truly matters.

We operate from a center of caring, with high standards, clear expectations, and a commitment to doing things the right way.



WHY HODGE INDUSTRIAL TECHNOLOGIES

Stable, Essential Industry

Our customers rely on compressed air systems to keep their operations running. What we do isn’t optional—it’s critical.

Growth-Focused Environment

We are expanding across multiple U.S. markets, creating long-term opportunities for our team.

Clear Expectations

We believe great people do their best work when expectations are clear. You will always know:

What success looks like

How you’re measured

Where you stand

Center of Caring

We operate from a center of caring—for our customers and our team.

That means:

Respect in communication

Accountability in performance

Support in growth

Built for A-Players

We hire people who:

Take ownership

Care about details

Want to be part of a team that wins



WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

This role sits at the intersection of accuracy, speed, and revenue support.

Every quote you build directly impacts:

Our ability to win business

Our customer experience

Our operational efficiency

You are not just building quotes—you are supporting the engine that drives our growth.



ROLE OVERVIEW

As a Membership Quoting Specialist, you will own the process of building and tracking preventative maintenance membership quotes inside our systems.

This is a behind-the-scenes, execution-focused role

You will not speak with customers

You will communicate internally with our U.S.-based team using clear, professional written English



RESPONSIBILITIES

Own Quote Creation

Receive equipment details from sales reps

Review compressor specifications (HP, PSI, voltage, model, etc.)

Determine correct service frequency (quarterly, semi-annual, annual)

Build quotes using pricing templates in ServiceTitan

Ensure labor, travel, and materials are included

Complete quotes within 24–48 hours



Own Quote Tracking & Visibility

Track every quote created—nothing falls through the cracks

Update status in 
 and ServiceTitan

Monitor aging quotes

Notify sales reps when follow-up is needed

Maintain full visibility across all quotes



Protect Accuracy & Systems

Follow pricing guidelines precisely

Identify missing or incorrect information before building

Keep CRM clean and organized

Communicate clearly and professionally via Slack



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

Slack (team communication)

ServiceTitan (quoting platform)


 (pipeline tracking & CRM)

Training is provided, but comfort with systems is critical.



HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED (BIG 3)

We operate with clear accountability and measurable expectations.

You will be evaluated weekly on:

Speed: 95%+ of quotes completed within 48 hours

Accuracy: 98%+ quote accuracy

Ownership: 100% of quotes tracked in CRM

WORK STRUCTURE (PHILIPPINES-BASED ROLE)

Fully remote (work from home)

Fixed U.S. schedule (night shift PH time)

Internal-facing role (no customer calls)

Structured workflow with defined responsibilities

Performance measured weekly

REQUIREMENTS

Excellent written English communication (required)

Strong attention to detail

Experience with CRM or quoting systems (preferred)

Ability to learn new software quickly

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

Must have:

Reliable high-speed internet

Backup power source

Quiet, professional work environment

Ability to consistently work U.S. Eastern hours

IDEAL CANDIDATE

Organized and highly process-driven

Detail-obsessed

Strong ownership mindset

Comfortable working behind the scenes

Calm, professional written communicator

EMPLOYMENT STRUCTURE

This role supports a U.S.-based company

Work is performed remotely from the Philippines

Payment structure and classification will be discussed during the hiring process

Candidates must be comfortable working U.S. hours long-term



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, include:

A short paragraph explaining why you are a strong fit for a detail-heavy, process-driven role

Your experience using CRM or quoting software

The word “DISCIPLINE” in the subject line

Applications missing the required word will not be reviewed.

title: Phone-First Customer Experience VA (US Company | Pacific Time)
description:
We’re hiring a confident, phone-savvy professional to become the first voice customers hear at Graham Landscape & Design.



This is not a back-office admin job.



This role is for someone who thrives in live conversations, builds instant trust, and can guide customers with clarity and warmth while managing systems at the same time. 



If you take pride in excellent communication and love helping customers feel taken care of, you will do very well here.



Your performance directly impacts customer experience, booked appointments, and company growth.



Primary Responsibility: Phone Excellence

Your #1 priority is handling incoming customer calls exceptionally well — every time. You will:

- Answer all inbound calls within 30 seconds using approved greeting scripts

- Handle calls via Dialpad with professionalism, clarity, and urgency

- Confidently guide callers through conversations

- Gather critical customer information accurately (Full name, Service address, Phone number, Service need)

- Determine whether the caller is a new customer, a previous or an existing customer, or a new owner of a serviced property

- Verify and update customer records in the CRM

- Book the first sales or service appointment during the call whenever possible

- Clearly explain next steps, expectations, and service policies (including drive-time billing when applicable)

- Handle missed calls by returning them within 30 minutes

- Leave clear, complete, and accurate call notes to ensure seamless handoff to sales or service teams

- Uphold Service Beyond Expectation on every single interaction



This role is accountable for call quality, lead accuracy, and appointment success — not just answering the phone.



Secondary Tasks (When Phones Are Quiet)

When call volume is low, you may assist with:

- Light CRM or QuickBooks data updates

- Appointment confirmations

- Calendar updates

- Follow-ups on missed calls or leads

- Administrative support from the Office Manager



Phone coverage always comes first.



Must-Have Qualifications

- Strong phone confidence and professional speaking voice

- Near-native English fluency (verbal and written)

- Reliable availability: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Pacific Time

- Ability to multitask systems while speaking with customers

- Calm, solutions-focused customer service mindset

- Strong attention to detail and documentation habits

- Comfortable explaining policies clearly and confidently

- Willingness to follow structured SOPs

- Comfortable using tools like ChatGPT for efficiency



Bonus (Not Required, But Valuable)

- Landscaping, construction, or home services experience

- Aspire CRM familiarity

- Appointment setting or scheduling experience

- Escalation handling experience

- SOP documentation experience



Compensation & Growth

- PHP 40,000/month base salary

- Pay increase opportunities based on performance and tenure

- Long-term stability with a growing company

- Opportunity to grow into expanded administrative or coordination roles



We value reliability, initiative, and accountability.



This Role Is NOT a Fit If

- You dislike live phone conversations

- You prefer quiet, independent back-office work

- You struggle with multitasking while speaking

- You are uncomfortable following structured processes

- You are not available in Pacific Time consistently



How to Apply (Follow Exactly):

Send one
 only to 



Subject: Phone VA – Your Full Name



Include:

1. Resume

2. 2-Minute Audio Recording (Google Drive link)

    * We use the audio recording so we can hear your communication style — since this is a phone-first role.

    * In the recording:

       - Introduce yourself

       - Explain why you are excellent on the phone

    * File name: FirstName_LastName_Audio

       - Incomplete or misformatted applications will not be reviewed.



Why Join Us

- Clear expectations and structured systems

- Direct impact on revenue and customer experience

- Stable long-term role

- Opportunity to grow as responsibilities expand



If you take pride in professional communication and want to be part of a company that values excellence, we’d love to meet you.

title: Senior Klaviyo Email Marketing Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Klaviyo
 Marketing Specialist to manage and optimize our
 marketing efforts for a major fashion brand.

This is a strategic and performance-focused role — ideal for someone who understands retention, lifecycle strategy, deliverability, and KPI optimization inside Klaviyo.

You will own the performance and execution of daily campaigns and automations, ensuring that every send is strategically timed, properly segmented, and driving measurable results.

Our internal creative team will provide the copy and graphics — your focus is strategy, setup, scheduling, segmentation, deliverability, and performance tracking.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and send daily Klaviyo campaigns (you’ll arrange, schedule, QA, segment, and deploy — the team provides creative assets).

Build, optimize, and scale Klaviyo flows (welcome, cart, post-purchase, win-back, VIP, etc.) to improve retention and LTV.

Develop advanced segmentation and personalization strategies based on customer behavior and purchase history.

Monitor and improve
 deliverability and list health — maintain high sender reputation and compliance.

Analyze and report on key metrics (deliverability, open rate, CTR, CVR, revenue per recipient, unsubscribe rate, retention rate, etc.).

Run A/B tests on subject lines, content, and send timing to continuously improve results.

Collaborate closely with creative, brand, and marketing teams to align messaging with campaign goals.

Stay up to date with Klaviyo features and industry best practices in retention marketing.



Requirements

3+ years of professional
 marketing experience, including 2+ years hands-on in Klaviyo.

Proven success running daily campaign schedules and automated flows that drive measurable retention and revenue growth.

Deep understanding of deliverability, segmentation, and lifecycle marketing.

Strong analytical mindset — comfortable interpreting data and optimizing based on KPIs.

Excellent written and spoken English.

Extremely organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing fast-paced campaign calendars.

Experience with fashion, beauty, or lifestyle eCommerce brands is highly preferred.



Nice to Have

Experience with SMS marketing

Understanding of creative testing and performance frameworks.



Apply

Fill in the following form to apply:

title: Technical Support Specialist (Printer Repair – Remote Support)
description:
PLEASE READ BEFORE YOU APPLY! MUST HAVE AN EXPERIENCE!



Send your resume to: 



GRAVEYARD SHIFT (Schedule of shifts vary)



Overview



The Technical Support Specialist is responsible for providing real-time guidance and technical assistance to Customer Engineers (CEs) handling printer repair, diagnostics, and installation in the field. This role ensures efficient issue resolution, minimizes downtime, and supports high-quality service delivery across multiple printer brands.



Key Responsibilities



*Provide real-time technical support to Customer Engineers (CEs) during printer diagnostics, repairs, and installations.



*Troubleshoot hardware issues, print quality concerns, error codes, and connectivity problems across various printer brands (e.g., HP, Lexmark, Xerox, Konica Minolta).



*Serve as an escalation point for complex or unresolved technical issues.



*Coordinate with manufacturers and vendors for advanced troubleshooting and case resolution.



*Monitor active service tickets to ensure timely updates, proper documentation, and closure.



*Communicate effectively with internal teams and clients regarding issue status, risks, and resolutions.



*Ensure accuracy in reporting, asset documentation, and overall case handling.



Skills & Competencies



*Strong knowledge of printer hardware, repair processes, and troubleshooting techniques.



*Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.



*Ability to provide clear and concise technical guidance in time-sensitive situations.



*Strong communication and collaboration skills.



*Experience using ticketing systems and remote support tools.

title: APPOINTMENT SETTER

How to Apply



Send your here in OLJ:

title: Property Management experienced in Rentec Direct
description:
About Us



Crown Realty Experts is a professional U.S.-based real estate company providing residential and commercial property management services. We are seeking an experienced, detail-oriented Property Manager Assistant who is highly familiar with online property management software and capable of handling a fast-paced, high-volume workload with precision.



This position requires excellent organizational skills, strong communication, and the ability to work independently while following very clear instructions. Applicants must also have prior experience in lease and tenant management.



Key Responsibilities



Manage daily operations inside platforms like AppFolio, Rentec, Buildium, or similar



Answer tenant and owner inquiries via phone and



Schedule repairs and coordinate with vendors for maintenance requests



Prepare lease renewals and monitor lease expirations



Assist with rent collection processes and leasing activities



Maintain digital files and tenant records



Perform basic bookkeeping and accounting functions



Respond to occasional emergency calls (paid extra for after-hours coverage)



Support other administrative tasks as needed by the real estate team



Minimum Requirements



At least 1 year of experience using an online property management portal



Accounting or bookkeeping background



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)



Strong attention to detail and ability to follow multi-step processes



Ability to self-manage time and tasks with minimal supervision



A friendly and professional demeanor



Access to a quiet work environment and stable internet



Willingness to handle minimal after-hours calls (with premium pay)



???? Compensation



Rates are based on experience level and proven ability:



$5.00 – $7.00/hour – Beginner (1–2 years of experience)

Solid foundation in real estate or property management support. Able to handle routine admin tasks, data entry, and basic tenant/vendor communication. Willing to learn new systems.



$7.25 – $8.50/hour – Intermediate (3–5 years of experience)

Strong background in property management support, social media execution, and real estate admin. Comfortable with multiple software platforms. Demonstrated reliability and consistency.



$8.50 – $10.00/hour – Expert (6+ years of experience)

Proven track record in property management, real estate operations, and commercial real estate support. Skilled at handling complex admin systems, creating SOPs, and managing multiple properties or accounts with little supervision.



Application Instructions – Read Carefully



Applicants who do not follow the instructions below will not be considered.



Begin your cover letter with this exact phrase as the title:

BEST ASSISTANT – I Use [Insert Portal Name]

(Example: BEST ASSISTANT – I Use Buildium)



In your cover letter, include at least six bullet points that clearly explain how your experience aligns with the job description above. Each point should be specific and relevant.



You must also include:



Your updated resume



Your DISC profile results (screenshot or link)



Confirmation that your OnlineJobs.ph profile is 100% complete with education, job history, background confirmation, and skills



A statement of which property management portal(s) you’ve used and for how long



Confirmation of your availability for CST-based work hours and minimal after-hours support



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.



Hiring Process



Application and material review



Skills test related to property management tasks



Scenario-based interview



Paid trial assignment



Final onboarding



Note: Initial pay is set during onboarding based on the compensation tiers above.



Performance Review Metrics (90 Days)



Accuracy of lease and billing tasks



Timeliness of maintenance coordination and communication



Recordkeeping and task organization



Proactive support and ability to follow through



Professionalism and reliability under time pressure

title: Full-Time Bookkeeper | Property Management (Detail-Driven Only)

s acknowledged within 10 minutes during work hours

title: Conversion Rate Optimization Specialist, Landing Pages
description:
About LUCYD:

At LUCYD, we’re transforming the world of digital advertising with a focus on wellness, sustainability, and social responsibility. We specialize in compliant advertising for CBD, cannabis, and DTC wellness brands, and we're not just selling products—we're creating positive impact through Conscious Compounds™.



We’re looking for a Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist, with a specific focus on landing pages, to join our marketing team. Your main role will be to design, optimize, and analyze landing pages that drive paid social ad performance and increase eCommerce conversions. Add the word "expedition" on your subject line to let us know you read the whole post.



Responsibilities:

Lead Landing Page Strategy: Own the landing page process—from wireframing to writing compelling copy and gathering visual assets

Collaborate with Designers & Developers: Ensure every page is visually stunning and built for high conversion

A/B Testing & Performance Analysis: Analyze data to continuously test and refine landing pages

Funnel Optimization: Audit the full eCommerce funnel and recommend improvements to boost performance



You MUST have the following qualifications:

3+ years of experience in CRO with focus on landing pages & eCommerce funnels

Proficient in Shopify, wireframing tools, and platforms like Unbounce, Leadpages, or similar

Strong analytical skills using Google Analytics, Hotjar, or similar tools

Excellent English communication skills (C1 Advanced level or Native)

Highly collaborative and detail-oriented

Must be available to work Eastern Time (EST/EDT) hours



If you believe you’re the right fit for this role, we’d love to hear from you. Send your portfolio, resume, and a short note about why you’re a great fit. Only applicants who follow all instructions and meet the qualifications will be considered.

We look forward to working with you!

title: DTC Finance Controller — Own Our P&L End-to-End (Shopify / Meta Ads / DACH Market)
description:
We're a fast-scaling DTC supplement brand in DACH. €0 to €20M/yr run rate in 6 months on a single product. Growing month over month.



We need someone to fully own our financial operations — not just bookkeeping, but actually running the numbers side of the business so we can focus on scaling.



What "fully own" means:



You build our P&L from scratch (we don't have one yet). You maintain it monthly. You tell us where we're bleeding money and where we're printing it. You handle the complexity of multi-entity, multi-currency, multi-gateway DTC finances without asking us how.



We want to hand this off completely. Not "help with", own it.



What you'll manage:



— Full P&L build + monthly reporting

— Revenue reconciliation across Shopify + payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal, Klarna, etc.)

— COGS tracking (supplements = raw materials, manufacturing, packaging, shipping)

— Ad spend tracking + ROAS/CAC/LTV reconciliation against Meta Ads Manager

— Refunds, chargebacks, payment processing fees — broken out clearly

— Inventory / stock cost tracking and forecasting

— Cash flow forecasting (critical when scaling fast on physical product)

— Monthly financial summary: what happened, why, what to watch



Must-have experience:



— 3+ years doing finance for DTC / e-commerce brands (not SaaS, not agency

— product brands that ship physical goods)

— Shopify backend fluency

— you know where every dollar flows and how Shopify reports vs. reality

— Experience with multiple payment gateways simultaneously (Stripe, PayPal, Klarna, Apple Pay, etc.) and understand the fee structures, hold periods, and reconciliation headaches

— Refund and chargeback tracking at scale (not 10/month — hundreds)

— Supplement or consumable CPG experience preferred (understands COGS structure: raw materials, co-packer fees, fulfillment, customs)

— DACH tax familiarity or willingness to coordinate with our tax advisor

— Can work in EUR and USD

— Speaks English fluently. German is a plus but not required.



Nice-to-have:



— Experience with brands doing €1-10M/month in revenue

— Built a P&L from zero before (not just maintained one)

— Experience with inventory financing or cash flow management for fast-scaling physical product brands

— Familiar with Triple Whale, Polar Analytics, or similar DTC analytics tools



What you're NOT:



— A bookkeeper who enters transactions and waits for instructions

— Someone who needs us to explain what a chargeback is

— Someone who sends a spreadsheet without commentary ("here are the numbers" without "here's what the numbers mean")



How to apply:



No CV. No cover letter. Instead, send me a short Loom (max 5 min) covering:



1. One DTC brand you've done P&L for. Name the brand, their monthly revenue range, and walk me through how you structured their P&L. What line items did you track? What was the biggest financial insight you surfaced that changed how they operated?



2. What's the messiest financial problem you've solved.

Chargebacks out of control? Revenue reconciliation nightmare across 3 payment gateways? Inventory cash crunch? Pick one, tell me the story, tell me how you fixed it.



3.How you'd approach our P&L from scratch -  You know nothing about us except: DTC supplement, DACH market, Shopify, Meta Ads, fast-scaling single product. What's your week 1 plan to build our P&L?



If the Loom lands ? paid trial task ? the role.



Andrei

Co-Founder

title: FiveM Developer & Scripter for Unique DMV-Based GTA RP Server (Growth Opportunity!)

This is a great opportunity for someone passionate about GTA, scripting, and world-building who also wants to grow alongside a new project. If you're excited to innovate and make something special, keep reading!



Responsibilities:

Requirements:



Solid experience with FiveM, scripting (Lua, JavaScript, etc.), and GTA V mods

Ability to add custom features, maps, clothing, and activities

Creative mindset and genuine passion for GTA RP servers

Understanding of optimizing for smooth performance

Familiarity with/interest in DMV (D.C., Maryland, Virginia) is a plus

Good communication skills and reliability

What You Get:



Flexible, remote work

Opportunity to be a long-term collaborator and key part of the community

Room for growth and increased rewards as the server grows

Portfolio-building experience and a fun, creative environment

Open to revenue-sharing/back-end bonuses as we succeed



If you are interested, please reply with:  "



DMV Vibes" at the beginning of your application.

Your experience with FiveM and scripting (with examples if possible)

Ideas you have for fun, unique city features

Your expected monthly rate and available hours

Anything else that makes you the perfect fit for this project!

Looking forward to working with someone passionate and ready to make the best DMV-based FiveM RP community!

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for a Graphic Designer who can bring our commercial story to life through compelling visual assets. This role focuses on creating high-impact sales and marketing materials that not only look visually strong but also drive conversions.



You will work closely with our sales and marketing teams to translate complex ideas into clear, persuasive, and engaging visuals. This is a role for someone who understands that design is not just about aesthetics, but about communication and results.



What You’ll Do



You will design and optimize pitch decks, one-pagers, case studies, proposals, and other digital assets that support sales and marketing initiatives. You will be responsible for turning raw ideas and messaging into polished, professional visuals that align with our brand and improve how we present to clients. Part of your role will also involve improving existing materials to make them more effective, clearer, and more conversion-focused.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone with proven experience in graphic design, particularly in creating sales and marketing materials. You should have a strong portfolio that clearly demonstrates your ability to produce high-quality, professional work. A strong eye for layout, typography, and branding is essential, along with the ability to simplify complex information into visually engaging content.



You should be comfortable using tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, or similar platforms, and be able to work independently while delivering on time.



Important Requirement



We are specifically looking for candidates with proven experience and strong samples of work. Your portfolio is a key part of your application and should showcase real projects that demonstrate your design capability and effectiveness.



Engagement Details



This is a freelance contractor role with pay structured per project, depending on scope and experience. The schedule is flexible, and the role is fully remote.



Why Join JVDB Studios



You will be working with a fast-growing and creative team, with the flexibility to manage your own time and the opportunity for ongoing projects. This role also offers direct collaboration with a European company and exposure to impactful commercial work.



How to Apply



Send your resume, portfolio, and live project links to:







Subject line: JVDB GRAPHIC DESIGNER

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description:
About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for a Full-Stack Developer to lead the end-to-end development of a mobile-first workforce management platform. This is a hands-on role where you will own the full technical build—from architecture to deployment.



You’ll be working on a product designed to replace multiple operational tools (scheduling, HR, quality control, invoicing) with a single integrated platform, with future plans to scale into a white-label SaaS solution.



This is a high-impact opportunity to build a product from the ground up with a direct European company, offering strong compensation and flexible working conditions.



What You’ll Build



The platform will be developed across three phases:



Phase 1 – App v1.0

User profiles and onboarding system

GPS-based check-in (geofencing)

AI chatbot assistant (RAG-based knowledge system)

Data ingestion pipelines (internal + public sources)

Internal testing and iteration



Phase 2 – Operational Platform

Scheduling API integrations

Gamification system (levels, badges, rewards)

Internal shift marketplace

AI-powered photo quality scoring (computer vision)

Expanded AI assistant capabilities



Phase 3 – Market-Ready Product

Automated scheduling and planning engine

Full HR module (contracts, hours, leave tracking)

Automated invoicing system

AI-driven performance insights

Multi-tenant architecture for white-label deployment



Technical Requirements



Mobile Development

React Native or Flutter (single codebase for iOS & Android)

Experience with device APIs (GPS, camera, push notifications)



Backend

Node.js (Express/NestJS) or Python (FastAPI/Django)

RESTful APIs and real-time systems (WebSockets/SSE)



Database

PostgreSQL (preferred)

Experience with scalable schema design (SaaS, multi-tenant systems)



AI / ML Integration

Experience with RAG pipelines (vector databases + LLM APIs)

Computer vision integrations (or third-party APIs)

Strong prompt engineering skills



DevOps

Docker, CI/CD pipelines

Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)



Security

Role-based access control

OAuth2 / JWT authentication

GDPR-aware data handling



Nice-to-Have

Experience building white-label SaaS platforms

Background in workforce management / scheduling systems

Gamification systems (XP, leaderboards, rewards)

Geofencing/location-based applications



Candidate Profile

Strong portfolio with at least 2 live mobile applications

Proven experience integrating AI into real products

Ability to work independently and make technical decisions

Clean, scalable coding practices

Responsive and proactive communicator



Engagement Details

Type: Freelance / Contractor

Duration: 18–24 weeks (with potential extension)

Hours: 30–40 hours per week

Rate: USD TBD

Timezone: Minimum 4-hour overlap with CET (Amsterdam time)



Why Join JVDB Studios

Work directly with a European company

Competitive pay with flexibility

Opportunity to build and scale a product from scratch

Long-term potential beyond the initial project



How to Apply



Send your resume, portfolio, and live project links to:







Subject line: JVDB FULL STACK DEVELOPER

title: Texas Title Examiner / Underwriter & Curative Assistant
description:
*Job Overview*

I'm hiring a full-time Texas title examiner / abstractor to double as a curative assistant for my distressed property acquisition company. You'll run formal title searches on Texas properties and help move files forward through the curative process — including drafting legal documents, tracking heirship research, and managing curative workflow.



*What You'll Do*

Title Examination / Abstracting 

- Pull and review deed records, tax records, probate filings, and lien history from Texas county records

- Identify all title defects: heirship gaps, missing probates, tax liens, judgments, mortgages, HOA liens, etc.

- Build a clear chain of title from the last clean vesting to present

- Deliver a formal written title search report identifying every defect, cloud, and curative action required



*Curative Assistant*

- Draft legal documents: Affidavits of Heirship, deeds, probate-related filings, corrective instruments, etc.

- Track and move open curative files forward — follow up on signatures, notary, recording, and title company back-and-forth

- Maintain organized file records and status updates

- Support heirship research and next-of-kin verification

- Strategize with ownership on how to cure title and execute 



*Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)*

- Prior experience as a title examiner, abstractor, or underwriter at a Texas-based title company — must be verifiable

- Deep familiarity with Texas deed records, probate process, and common Texas title defects

- Experience drafting or preparing legal/curative documents

- Strong written English

- Ability to work independently and deliver clean, organized work



*Pay & Schedule*

- Full-time: 35 hours/week — $750/month

- Raises based on performance

- $100 / Closed File Bonus (Expected 1-2 / Month)

- Paid via your preferred method (PayPal, Wise, etc.)



*Hiring Process*

- Apply with your resume and a short description of your Texas title experience

- Shortlisted candidates complete a paid test search on one real property



*To Apply*

- Send your resume along with a brief written description about why you feel you're a great fit for this role as well as a loom video with the following information:

- Name of the Texas title company you worked for (and years)

- Your role (examiner, abstractor, underwriter, etc.) and the types of Texas title defects you've worked through most often

- Any experience drafting curative documents (AOH, deeds, etc.)

- Your availability and time zone



Applications without verifiable Texas title company experience will not be considered.
