title: Outbound Cold Calls — B2B Appointment Setter Salary + Commission
description:
Outbound Cold Calls — B2B Appointment Setter Salary + Commission | Remote | 3+ Years Experience Required



Why strong setters join us



We built a role where your results are directly reflected in what you earn — with a guaranteed base, clear performance bonuses, and a team that genuinely invests in your growth.



If you're experienced, consistent, and take your craft seriously, this is a place where you can build something real.



01 — Uncapped earning potential Your compensation grows with your performance. The structure is transparent, the targets are achievable, and there's no ceiling on what you can earn each month.



02 — Experienced leadership that develops you You'll work closely with a team that knows this business inside and out. We share what's working, coach on what isn't, and help you sharpen your skills continuously — tone, objection handling, conversation flow.



03 — A supportive, high-performing team We hold a high standard here, and we support each other in reaching it. You'll be working alongside people who are serious about their work and their growth.



Compensation — paid every week via Wise



Base salary: $1,200 USD/month — guaranteed

Per qualified appointment: $50 USD — every one, on top of base

Status bonus: 10–20% of closed deals the following month

The status bonus — how it works: Set 12+ qualified appointments in a month and you unlock a percentage of every deal that closes the following month — regardless of when you originally set those leads. Hit 12 = 10%, 16 = 15%, 20 = 20%. The more consistent you are, the more it compounds. At Bronze level that's an extra ~$375/mo. At Gold level an extra $1,250/mo — all on top of your base and per-appointment pay.



Working hours



9:00am – 5:30pm Eastern Time (ET) That is 10:00pm – 6:30am Philippine Time (PHT).



This is a night shift role. We are fully transparent about that. There is a strong and experienced community of Filipino professionals who work US hours — if that's you, and you're comfortable with it, the compensation reflects the commitment.



Onboarding



Your first 10 days are structured onboarding. We walk you through everything — the script, the CRM, the process — until you feel fully confident. To join the core team, the target during onboarding is a minimum of 3 qualified appointments. This is a realistic and achievable bar, and we'll be coaching you throughout to help you get there.



What you'll actually do



Make 150–200 outbound cold calls per day to businesses that may need commercial janitorial services

Identify genuine needs and book qualified appointments for businesses ready to receive a cleaning quote

Deliver a proven script naturally and conversationally — not mechanically

Keep your pipeline and call logs updated accurately in our CRM each day

Receive ongoing coaching and access to the strategies that have proven to work

Who we're looking for



2+ years in B2B sales or outbound cold calling

A natural, professional phone presence — you sound like a consultant, not a caller

Ability to internalize a script and deliver it as a real conversation

Stable setup: 80+ Mbps internet, a reliable computer, and a quality headset

Comfortable navigating a CRM independently — logging calls, updating records, managing your pipeline

What you're walking into



A company with a clear system, transparent compensation, and leadership that takes your development seriously. You'll know exactly what's expected, exactly what you'll earn, and exactly how to grow. We want people who stay, improve, and build with us long term.



Ready to apply? If this sounds like the right fit, we'd love to hear from you. Please apply with a brief introduction and any relevant experience you'd like to share.

title: Bookkeeper Specific to Retail
description:
We are looking for a bookkeeper who genuinely understands retail — not just numbers in a spreadsheet, but what those numbers mean for a product-based small business with inventory, consignment, layaway, custom orders, and seasonal sales cycles.



This is not a high-volume transaction business, but it is a nuanced one. Our average ticket is high, our inventory is unique and sometimes one-of-a-kind, and our revenue streams include retail sales, permanent jewelry services, custom design commissions, and B2B collaborations. We need someone who can set up a clean, logical system and then maintain it monthly — while also helping us understand what the numbers are actually telling us.



The right person for this role understands that a boutique luxury store is not the same as a coffee shop or a clothing rack. They know the difference between cost of goods sold and consignment liability. They have opinions about inventory categories. And they can translate a P&L into plain language that helps a founder make smarter decisions.

What you will own



Chart of accounts setup and organization — review or build a chart of accounts specific to fine jewelry retail, including categories for estate/vintage inventory, new goods, custom design, services (permanent jewelry), consignment, and event revenue

Monthly reconciliation — reconcile all accounts monthly including POS sales, payment processors (Square, Stripe, or equivalent), credit card statements, and bank accounts

Inventory cost tracking — work with us to track cost basis on unique pieces, distinguish between consignment items and owned inventory, and flag aging inventory that may need attention

Revenue stream categorization — ensure each revenue type (retail, custom design, permanent jewelry, B2B, events) is tracked separately so we can understand what is actually driving the business

Accounts payable & vendor tracking — organize and log purchases from designers, estate sources, show purchases, and trade vendors

Grant & program compliance — maintain clean records that satisfy CT SeCTerise grant reporting requirements and Goldman Sachs 10,000 Small Businesses program documentation as needed

Sales tax management — ensure CT sales tax is recorded and filed correctly, including any applicable exemptions for resale purchases

Monthly reporting — deliver a clean, readable monthly summary our founder can actually use (see metrics below)

CPA handoff — maintain books in a state of year-round readiness so our tax accountant is never starting from scratch at year-end.

What we're looking for

Retail bookkeeping experience is required — you have worked with a product-based business before, and you understand inventory, COGS, and the difference between cash and accrual accounting in a retail context

QuickBooks Online or Xero proficiency — you are not learning the software on our time; you can set up, manage, and run reports confidently

POS integration experience — familiar with connecting Square, Shopify, or similar POS systems to accounting software so sales flow in cleanly

Consignment experience a strong plus — understanding how to track consignment liability versus owned inventory is genuinely important for this business

CT sales tax knowledge preferred — or a demonstrated ability to research and apply state-specific requirements accurately

Clear communicator — you explain what the numbers mean in plain language; you do not assume we know accounting terminology

Detail-oriented and deadline-driven — books are reconciled and reports delivered on time, every month, without being chased

Familiarity with grant reporting or small business program requirements is a meaningful bonus given our current grant and Goldman Sachs program participation

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

title: VIDEO EDITOR FOR MARKETING AGENCY (Short-Form Ads | Ongoing Work)
description:
We're a US-based video marketing agency producing cinematic short-form video ads for our clients.

We're busy, which means steady, ongoing work for the right person.



This starts as a part-time, per-video arrangement. If you're good and reliable, this grows.

---



WHAT YOU'LL BE EDITING



Short-form vertical video ads (1-2 minutes), typically built around a script OR unscripted testimonials with b-roll and stock footage layered in. Clean, cinematic, and premium-looking content.



This is important:  What we're NOT looking for is an editor who relies on flashy transitions, flying text, and motion effects to carry a video. If your best work is built around those things, we're probably not the right fit. If your best work is built around making footage feel intentional and polished - we want to hear from you. What we care about is the fundamentals: pacing decisions, choosing the best takes, b-roll selection, color correction, and clean storytelling.



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We can teach technical skills. What's harder to find - and what we care about most - is two things:



1. Attention to detail and ability to learn from feedback. Before you send any edit, you've already watched it three times and caught every issue yourself. We understand mistakes happen, but we should never have to tell you something twice.



2. A good eye. Specifically when it comes to stock footage and b-roll. You know the difference between a clip that feels natural and cinematic versus one that looks awkward or like generic stock footage. 



---



PAY



We pay $75 - $100 per video depending on length and complexity. Editors who deliver clean, revision-light work that we can approve quickly become invaluable. If you takes pride in getting it right before it ever lands in our inbox, there's room to earn more here.



REQUIREMENTS



— Adobe Premiere Pro 2025 / 2026 (required)

— The ability to edit at least 3-5 videos per week

— Fluent English, written and spoken

— Experience editing short-form testimonial videos, cinematic interview-style content, and lifestyle b-roll

— A computer capable of storing and handling 4K footage and graphics smoothly

— Strong communication and responsiveness - if we send a message, we expect a reply the same day

— Open-minded and willing to learn new systems and workflows



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not just send your resume. We receive a lot of applications and we read every one - but here's how to make sure yours gets noticed:



Answer this question in your application: What is your go-to coffee order?



If you don't answer it, we won't move forward. It's a small thing, but it tells us you read carefully and follow instructions - which matters a lot in this role.



Also include:

- A short note about yourself and your editing experience

- Your portfolio

- 2–3 samples of your BEST work



Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a short skills test before any paid work begins. It won't take long, but it's how we make sure we're a good fit for each other.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




  



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Payroll Specialist
description:
About Us



Steadfast Rehabilitation Services partners with home health agencies to provide fast, reliable therapy staffing across Texas and Chicago. We support both therapists and agency teams by handling the operational details—so patient care stays uninterrupted.



As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a detail-oriented Payroll Specialist to help ensure our therapists and staff are paid accurately and on time.



Role Overview



The Payroll Specialist will be responsible for managing end-to-end payroll processes for our therapists and internal team. This role requires strong attention to detail, compliance awareness, and the ability to work cross-functionally with HR and Finance.



Key Responsibilities

- Process and manage payroll on a weekly/bi-weekly basis

- Accurately calculate wages, overtime, bonuses, deductions, and taxes

- Maintain and update payroll records, including employee information and pay rates

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local tax and labor regulations

- Address payroll-related inquiries and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner

- Collaborate with HR and Finance to ensure payroll accuracy and alignment

- Prepare and distribute payroll reports and statements

- Stay up to date with changes in payroll regulations and industry standards

- Identify opportunities to improve payroll processes for efficiency and accuracy

- Support additional payroll or administrative tasks as needed



What We’re Looking For



- Experience in payroll processing (healthcare or staffing experience is a plus)

- Strong understanding of payroll regulations, taxes, and compliance

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Ability to handle sensitive information with confidentiality

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills

- Experience with payroll systems (e.g., QuickBooks, ADP, or similar) preferred



Why Join Steadfast



- Be part of a growing healthcare staffing company making a real impact

- Work with a supportive, fast-moving team

- Help ensure therapists are paid accurately and on time—supporting better patient care

- Opportunities to improve systems and contribute to operational growth
salary: Will be discussed after the interview

title: Facebook Page Creator & Content Specialist
description:
About the Role

We're hiring a creative, AI-savvy specialist to build and manage
 pages for our company. You'll be responsible for creating new pages, developing unique page identities, and keeping them active with consistent, engaging content. The ideal candidate is someone who can design an AI-powered workflow that handles much of the content creation and posting process — so we can scale this across multiple pages efficiently.

This is a role for someone who thinks in systems, not just tasks.



What You'll Do

- Create and set up new
 pages with complete profiles, branding, and page details

- Develop unique content strategies and posting schedules for each page to build audience engagement over time

- Build AI-powered workflows and automations to generate, schedule, and publish content at scale — using tools like ChatGPT, -Claude, Make, Zapier, or custom solutions

- Maintain a consistent voice and persona for each page, ensuring content feels authentic and natural

- Monitor page health, engagement metrics, and adjust strategy accordingly

- Stay current on
's algorithm, content guidelines, and best practices

- Document all workflows and systems so they can be replicated and handed off



Requirements (all required)

- AI workflow experience is a must — you should already be building automations and using AI tools daily. We want someone who can design a system, not just manually post content. Show us what you've built

- Strong understanding of
 — page creation, content types, engagement strategies, algorithm behavior, and what makes a page look established and trustworthy

- Content creation skills — ability to write in different voices and tones, curate relevant content, and create posts that feel human and natural (not robotic AI slop)

- Systems thinker — you'll be building repeatable workflows, not doing one-off tasks. You should enjoy building processes that run efficiently with minimal manual input

- Clear English communication — written and verbal

- Detail-oriented and organized — managing multiple pages with different identities requires strong organizational skills

- Available during US business hours



Preferences

- Experience managing multiple social media accounts or pages simultaneously

- Familiarity with content scheduling tools (Meta Business Suite, Publer, Hootsuite, Buffer, etc.)

- Experience with automation platforms (Make/Integromat, Zapier, n8n, or custom API integrations)

- Graphic design skills or experience with Canva, Midjourney, or similar tools for creating visual content

- Experience with
 advertising or page growth strategies



What we're looking for in your application

- Tell us about an AI workflow or automation you've built. We don't care if it's simple or complex — we want to see that you think this way naturally. Bonus points if it involves content creation or social media.

title: Inside Sales Representative
description:
About the Role

BridgeCom Systems is hiring a driven, coachable, and hungry Inside Sales Representative to join our growing global team. You’ll work from home, helping warm leads and interested customers learn about our plug-and-play radio solutions.

This is a real sales role for someone who wants to grow into a strong closer. You’ll be following up with leads, building relationships, handling sales conversations, and helping move deals toward the finish line using our scripts, systems, and training.

, and text.



You’ll receive world-class sales training through Cardone University and daily mentorship. If you’re competitive, coachable, and ready to build a long-term career in sales, this could be a life-changing opportunity.



About BridgeCom Systems

We’re a U.S.-based communications company that’s been in business for over 20 years. We help radio operators stay connected with powerful, easy-to-use radio systems.

We’re a small, friendly, and values-driven team that believes in hard work, ownership, and opportunity. Many of our Filipino tea
mbers have been with us for years. We invest in our people and treat them like family.



Key Responsibilities

- Call and follow up with warm leads and existing prospects

- Build relationships, qualify buyers, and move deals through the pipeline

- Use scripts and training to guide conversations and close sales

- Send quotes, follow up by text and
, and update the CRM (HubSpot)

- Learn and speak confidently about our radio products (training provided)

- Log daily activities and hit performance goals for calls, follow-ups, and sales

- Work closely with U.S. teammates for support, coaching, and accountability



Requirements

- Excellent spoken and written English

- Sales experience preferred (2–3 years outbound and/or inbound)

- Friendly, confident voice and strong phone presence

- High-speed internet (minimum 10 Mbps) and backup power

- Quiet work environment and noise-canceling headset

- Coachable, self-motivated, and goal-oriented

- Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot is a plus)

- Tech-savvy and comfortable using web tools and scripts

- Willingness to learn about Ham Radio and our industry

- Experience in radio communications systems or technical support is a plus



Tools & Setup

You must have:

- A fast, reliable wired internet connection

- Backup power (UPS or generator preferred)

- Quiet workspace free from distractions

- A working headset with clear audio

- A Windows or Mac computer capable of running multiple apps



How to Apply

- To apply,
 your resume and a 30-second voice or video recording introducing yourself and telling us why you’re a great fit to: 



Subject line: Inside Sales – [Your Name] – Found on OnlineJobs.ph

Start your message with: BLUE M&MS

APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A VOICE OR VIDEO SAMPLE WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



Why Join Us

- Work from home with a U.S. company that values Filipino talent

- Get trained in one of the best sales systems in the world (Cardone University sales training every day)

- Uncapped commissions plus stable long-term work

- Clear KPIs, daily coaching, and professional growth

- Join a growing company with real career opportunities

title: Order Management Specialist
description:
TO APPLY

/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagZk1jvydfqYXGy9/form



Applications submitted through onlinejobs.ph will not be reviewed. We look forward to reviewing your application.



TO BE RESPECTFUL OF YOUR TIME, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT MEET THE JOB REQUIREMENTS. We evaluate against these requirements strictly. If you do not have the requisite experience, please do not apply.



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for an energetic and detail-oriented individual with extensive experience managing customer order flow to join our growing team. As an Order Management Specialist, you will be responsible for processing customer orders and coordinating fulfillment logistics. The ultimate goal is to ensure that customer orders are processed efficiently, accurately and on-time.



As an Order Management Specialist, you will work as a member of our company’s Operations team. To be successful at the role, the ideal candidate must have strong customer service, communication and interpersonal skills. You will work closely with our internal team and our customers (via
 and phone) to fulfill their orders. You can expect to learn a lot about how our business functions, be professionally challenged and have plenty of opportunities for career development!



We are looking for long-term tea
mbers who will stay and grow at our company! Please apply if you have full-time availability and can commit to a long-term, mutually beneficial role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Bring in customer orders daily from various sources, including customer portals, EDI,
s and faxes

- Respond to incoming
s and phone calls with same-day service

- Confirm purchase order changes and make changes to orders in our ERP system

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions/conversations/issues (through Front and Airtable)

- Release orders/backorders for shipping in a timely fashion

- Organize order releasing for easy picking and communicate with our Warehouse team for shipment alignment

- Create delivery slips and invoice shipped orders

- Upload/enter shipping and invoicing information to customer portals

- Create, send inventory, shipping and invoicing EDI documents

- Handle payment issues, solve order-related problems and interact with account managers as needed

- Interact with customers and provide them with information on order-related questions (such as inventory availability) and product inquiries

- Understand and ensure departmental KPIs, objectives, and guidelines are followed

- Ensure customer SLAs are followed

- Work on other duties as assigned



WHO YOU ARE

- A Bachelor's Degree

- 1-3 years experience with order management, data entry and customer service

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills; additionally, strong interpersonal skills, particularly in a customer-facing capacity

- EDI experience

- Excellent attention to detail

- Strong organizational skills; self-motivated and proactive

- MS Excel ability

- Excellent English skills

- Ability to work with our US team via
, Slack and Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion

- Positive, kind and easy to work with

- A team player mentality - one team, one dream!

- Positive and kind

- A desire to learn and grow within our organization

- Willingness to learn and adopt new tools

- Reliable and detailed-oriented

- Stable, trustworthy highly dependable. Ideally someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



HOURS

Fixed Schedule, M-F, US Central Time



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents creates designer bedding and home decor. Founded by a husband-wife team in 2005, we remain a family business today. Our customers love our unique designs across a wide range of styles, everyday luxury pricing and commitment to excellent service. We sell on both a wholesale as well as retail basis and are based in Irving, TX.



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?

Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, are a committed professional and a straight shooter, you’ll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

- Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow and develop their careers

- Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented and committed as you are

-Positive, professional, and proactive attitude







Why Join SSP Marketing



At SSP Marketing, we help local businesses grow by managing their appointment scheduling and customer communication. You’ll join a supportive, remote team that values consistency, teamwork, and quality work.



We provide paid training to help you succeed in this role. Pay adjustments may be considered after training based on performance and company needs.



How to Apply



Interested applicants may apply through this link:

title: Inside Sales Agent (ISA) - Real Estate Lead Generation
description:
Inside Sales Agent (ISA)

Real Estate Lead Generation



Real estate deals start with one thing.



A conversation.



Not fancy marketing.

Not waiting for leads to magically appear.



A conversation with a homeowner who is thinking about selling.



That is the mission of this role.



We are looking for a professional Inside Sales Agent who already knows how to work the phone and start real conversations with property owners.



This role is for someone with proven experience calling expired listings, withdrawn listings, absentee owners, and “we buy houses” inquiries.



If you already know how to do that well, keep reading.



The Role

You will be responsible for prospecting and starting conversations with motivated homeowners.



Your goal is simple.



Find out who is thinking about selling and book a qualified appointment for our agent team.



You will be calling lists such as:



• Expired listings

• Withdrawn listings

• Absentee owners

• “We Buy Houses” inquiries

• Other motivated seller opportunities



You will be using Vulcan7 as your dialer.



Your job is not to pressure people.



Your job is to lead the conversation, understand the situation, and identify opportunity.



The Performance Standard

This is a professional prospecting role with clear expectations.



A strong ISA typically produces:



Daily targets



• 250 to 350 calls

• 30 to 50 conversations with homeowners

• 10 to 15 qualified conversations

• 1 to 3 appointments set



Weekly targets



• 1,500 calls

• 200 conversations

• 50 qualified conversations

• 5 to 10 appointments



We track conversations and appointments, not just call volume.



Conversations create opportunity.

Appointments create business.



Experience Required

You must already have experience calling real estate lead lists such as:



• Expired listings

• Withdrawn listings

• FSBO or motivated sellers

• Absentee owners

• Investor or We Buy Houses leads



You should already understand:



• How to start a conversation with a homeowner

• How to handle objections calmly

• How to qualify motivation

• How to ask for the appointment



Experience using Vulcan7, RedX, Mojo, or similar dialers is a strong advantage.



Who Thrives in This Role

The people who succeed here are:



• Competitive

• Consistent

• Comfortable on the phone

• Curious about people

• Calm when hearing “no”



They understand something most people in real estate forget.



The phone is still the fastest way to opportunity.



About Our Team

Our work is rooted in a simple philosophy.



We don’t believe in pushing people.



We believe in leading conversations that help people make clear decisions.



If you know how to open doors with the phone and enjoy the challenge of prospecting, this could be a great fit.



How to Apply

Please include:



• Your experience calling real estate lead lists

• The types of leads you have called

• Your typical daily call volume

• How many appointments you usually set per week



If you know how to turn a cold call into a real conversation, we should talk.

title: Inside Sales Agent
description:
Greetings Virginia is URGENTLY HIRING Inside Sales Agents/Appointment Setters!



An inside sales agent/ISA  is a real estate specialist responsible for generating and qualifying leads and conducting cold calls.



We are looking for a highly motivated, well-spoken person with tremendous phone skills and the ability to close deals quickly. You will work most of your time on the computer and phone, making cold calls, taking inbound real estate sales calls, and making outbound lead calls. We need someone who can convert calls and leads into qualified appointments and closed deals for our agents. You will need to be exceptional at overcoming obstacles and changing a "No" into a "Yes!'"

If you are this person and have the skill and know-how to call a client into action - submit your resume to 



Standards of the Inside Sales Agent:

You will generate leads daily. You will make at least 40 contacts each day, resulting in 5-10 Nurture leads and 1-2 introductions per day.



A "Nurture" has expressed an interest to buy or sell in the next 12 months that we will not meet with now and will place onto a Nurture campaign. The purpose of a Nurture campaign is to be the real estate agent that they hire. This is accomplished by Providing value, Being persistent and Timing

title: Property Research Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Overview

We're seeking a Data Entry & Residential Appraisal VA to assist a busy residential appraiser with data entry tasks and comparable sales research. This role centers on inputting appraisal orders into our system, researching comps, and handling market data—freeing up the appraiser's time away from the screen. The position starts part-time with room to transition into full-time work down the line.



Core Duties

-Input new appraisal orders into Total appraisal software using documents from AMCs and lenders

-Fill in all necessary client, lender, and property information with precision

-Research and pull comparable sales and land sales for every appraisal assignment

-Perform market data research through TrueTrack and True Footage

-Sort and handle incoming order paperwork from AMCs and banks

-Keep accuracy levels high on all data entry work

-Assist with general administrative duties as the position evolves

-Proactively raise any gaps in information or data concerns



Required Qualifications

-Working knowledge of residential appraisal processes and industry terms

-Hands-on experience pulling comparable sales and analyzing market data

-Sharp data entry abilities with a careful eye for detail

-Prior use of appraisal platforms like Total or comparable software

-Comfort reviewing and processing documents from AMCs, banks, and lending institutions

-Ability to work independently and stay dependable with little oversight

-Clear written communication skills and quick responsiveness



Nice-to-Have Skills

-Hands-on use of TrueTrack, True Footage, or similar tools

-Exposure to Spark or other real estate data platforms

-Prior work supporting residential or rural real estate operations

-Experience dealing with rural properties or unusual property types

-Instinct for catching and reporting data inconsistencies without being asked

-Broader background in real estate administrative work



What We Offer

This is a steady, long-term opportunity with a growing residential appraisal practice. You'll build strong expertise in appraisal support workflows and earn a meaningful place on a small, tight-knit team. If you thrive on details and want a remote role you can settle into for the long haul, we'd love to connect.

title: Funnelish Funnel Builder (Full-Time)
description:
We’re looking for a highly experienced Funnel Builder (using Funnelish) to create and optimise high-converting sales funnels for Ecommerce products.



You will be responsible for turning existing winning products into sales funnels that are built to scale - not just look good.



This is a performance-driven role, and you must understand conversion psychology, structure, and what actually drives sales.

We move fast, test aggressively, and expect a high level of output and ownership.





Responsibilities:



- Build high-converting advertorials, listicles, sales pages and checkouts from scratch, using Funnelish

- Create funnels using our provided templates while maintaining quality and consistency

- Structure and optimise pages for maximum conversions

- Implement upsells, bundles, and AOV strategies

- Deliver a minimum of 2 complete funnels per day

- Ensure strong mobile-first optimisation

- Implement tracking (pixels, events, basic setup)

- Work efficiently within deadlines while maintaining high standards





Requirements:



- Proven experience building funnels in Funnelish

- Strong direct-response copywriting skills (headlines, hooks, offers, and conversion-focused copy)

- Previous experience working as a Funnel Builder for an Ecommerce/Dropshipping company

- Experience with Shopify product listings

- Ability to follow templates and brand guidelines precisely

- Ability to analyse a funnel and identify conversion issues quickly

- Fast, reliable, and detail-oriented

- Able to work independently with minimal supervision

- Ability to create funnels in multiple languages



- You must have real examples of funnels you’ve built

- You must understand why a funnel converts, not just how to build one





Performance & Growth:



- $4–$5/hour starting rate (based on experience)

- Pay increases based on performance

- Opportunity to grow into a head funnel builder role

- Long-term role with consistent work





We operate in a fast-paced environment and test products aggressively. You’ll be expected to build and iterate funnels quickly across multiple products.

This is not a beginner or intermediate role. If you don’t already have strong experience with high-converting funnels, this role is not for you.

title: UK Estate Agency Operations and Sales Progression Manager
description:
About Us



We are a UK-based estate agency focused primarily on residential property sales, with smaller volumes of lettings and ongoing property management.



We operate using Vebra ALTO CRM and require someone who understands UK estate agency processes, compliance, and sales progression from instruction to completion.



This is not a basic admin role. We are looking for someone autonomous, detail-driven and commercially aware who can operate without hand-holding.



Important – Please Only Apply If



• You have prior UK estate agency (sales) / property experience

• You have used a property CRM system (ALTO preferred but not essential)

• Your spoken English is excellent and professional on the telephone

• You are confident communicating with UK solicitors, buyers, sellers, mortgage brokers, tenants and landlords

• You can work independently and solve problems without constant instruction



If you are a general VA without UK property experience, this role is not suitable.



Responsibilities – Sales (Primary Focus)



• Sales progression from offer agreed to completion

• Liaising with solicitors, buyers, sellers and brokers

• Chasing memorandum of sale acknowledgements

• Monitoring mortgage offers and searches

• Updating Vebra ALTO accurately and consistently

• Identifying delays and proactively resolving issues

• Referring solicitors to clients where appropriate



Responsibilities – Lettings (Light Volume)



• Offer progression

• Referencing coordination

• Right to Rent compliance

• Tenancy documentation

• Deposit registration reminders



Compliance



• AML checks

• Sanctions checks

• Memorandum of sale documentation

• Understanding of EPC, EICR, Gas Safety and Right to Rent requirements



Operations



• Maintaining CRM hygiene (Vebra ALTO)

• Spotting process gaps and improving them

• Creating systems to prevent repeated issues

• Reducing Director involvement in day-to-day admin



The Type of Person We Need



• Highly autonomous

• Strong attention to detail

• Commercially aware

• Calm under pressure

• Comfortable making decisions

• Proactive problem-solver

• Able to manage multiple property files simultaneously



Compensation Structure

Base Salary:

$500 per month



Commission Structure:



• $50 per successful solicitor referral (paid when the sale completes)

• $100 per completed sale (sales progression from offer to completion)

• $15 per completed letting progression



Quarterly Performance Bonus (Up to $500):



Based on accuracy, CRM hygiene, completion rates, communication quality, initiative shown, compliance adherence and process improvements introduced.



Bonus Tiers:



• Meets expectations: $200

• Exceeds expectations: $350

• Outstanding performance: $500



Telephone Requirement



You will regularly communicate with UK professionals and clients. Your spoken English must be clear, confident and professional. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.



Application Process



Shortlisted candidates will complete:



• A paid test task involving a mock UK property file

• A short video or voice interview

• CRM understanding assessment



Working Hours



UK business hours 10am – 5pm.



To Apply



Please include:



• A short summary of your UK property experience

• The CRM systems you have used

• A voice recording introducing yourself

• The word “ALTO” in your subject line

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (Google Ads and Social Media)
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a proactive and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to drive our online presence, generate leads, and convert them into customers. The ideal candidate will manage end-to-end digital marketing campaigns across social media, search engines, and other platforms while actively supporting sales initiatives.



Key Responsibilities:

Digital Marketing:

1. Manage and optimize social media accounts 
, Instagram, TikTok, Linkedin).

3. Run paid campaigns on Google Ads and social media platforms, monitoring ROI.

4. Analyze performance metrics and generate reports to improve campaigns.

5. Implement SEO strategies to increase website traffic and visibility.



Sales Support & Lead Generation:

1. Identify and engage potential customers through digital channels.

2. Follow up on leads and convert inquiries into bookings.

3. Collaborate with the team to develop promotions and special campaigns.

4. Maintain a CRM system to track leads, prospects, and clients.



Brand Management & Strategy:

1. Maintain a consistent brand voice across all digital channels.

2. Monitor competitors and industry trends to adjust strategies.

3. Collaborate with management on marketing and sales strategies.



Qualifications & Skills:

1. Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or related field.

2. Proven experience in digital marketing and sales, preferably in service-based industries.

3. Proficiency in social media management, content creation, and paid advertising.

4. Knowledge of SEO, Google Analytics, and CRM tools.

5. Strong communication, copywriting, and organizational skills.

6. Results-driven with a proactive approach to problem-solving.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

1. Number of leads generated through digital channels.

2. Conversion rate from leads to paying clients.

3. Engagement and reach metrics for social media and digital campaigns.

4. Growth in website traffic and online inquiries.

Full-time position

title: Appointment Setter/ Sales Manager
description:

• Comfortable with high daily outreach volume

title: Video Editor
description:
The purpose of the Video Editor Role is to process ad briefs from our creative team and bring them to life through the power of video editing.



As a Video Editor, you are responsible for the actual execution & applying the finishing touches on all the video ads we create. Our success as a marketing team will rely on your ability to comprehend each ad concept, strategically put the pieces together, and enhance the overall marketing message with your edits.



You understand that the smallest details can make the biggest differences. So, you take pride in paying immense attention to detail in everything you do as those details can be the difference between an ad that is shown to millions & an ad that is shown to very few.



Your active purpose is to work alongside our Creative Directors and Copywriters to edit & bring to life ad briefs, utilize our creative resources, and help produce winning ads month over month for our clients.





Video Editor Primary Roles 



Onboarding:

Analyze and process client brand guidelines for creative purposes



Ongoing:

Edit 5-10 ad briefs per week 

Upload & organize edited ads into specific client folders with the correct resolutions

Communicate with copywriters & creative directors to ensure ad concepts are executed correctly

Listen & apply feedback from the creative team & clients for existing and new ads

Learn the Ads Strategy to understand  what makes “Winning” & “Losing” ad concepts

Complete weekly 30-minute ad analysis & review on concepts you have created







Qualifications & Character Traits 



Direct Experience Qualifications

1 Year of experience in video editing or designing ads

1 Year of experience in Video Editing tools like CapCut, Adobe 

1 Year of experience editing eCommerce ads

Working in a team environment & understanding individual roles



CHARACTER TRAITS

Excruciatingly high level of attention to detail with all designs & edits

Artistic & creative oriented mindset

Visual communicator & storyteller 

High curiosity & an active imagination 

Strong willingness to do the ‘boring’ work required

Great communicator with the team

Time-efficient, but willing to spend extra time to do things right

Coachable & desire to grow skill set & personal traits



This is NOT For You If: 

You are not a creative person

You do not enjoy editing content

You do not have creative skills

You do not like a high-operating environment

You are unorganized

You are not a team player 

You do not understand eCommerce

You are not passionate about growth 



Hours 

M-F 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM Philippines Time (flexible)





Growth Potential 



We highly value growth and development in all areas. With great performance, the potential for you as a Video Editor is significant: 

Get priority on editing ads & receive the bulk of requests.

Creative Director role to lead and manage other editors & focus on high-level strategy

title: AI Video Editor — Beauty / AI Startup (US-founded)
description:
We're hiring a world-class AI video editor to become the content engine behind a new AI beauty brand launching out of the US. This is not a typical editor job. You won't be stitching B-roll for a YouTuber. You'll be running your own AI-driven content, producing daily short-form videos, and if you're the right person, earning significantly more than a standard editor salary because you'll get paid when your content performs.



If you're obsessed with AI tools, beauty, fashion, styling, and short-form content that actually hits, keep reading.



Who We Are

We're a US-based beauty tech startup preparing to launch a new AI-powered platform that helps women discover what makes them beautiful. Their colors, features, style, routine. Think of it as having a personal beauty consultant, esthetician, and stylist all powered by AI and delivered in one report.



What You'll Actually Do

You will own 1 to 2 AI-generated social accounts (TikTok and Instagram) and produce daily short-form video content that educates, entertains, and converts women into customers.



Daily workflow (example):

Generate AI characters, scenes, and voiceovers using Higgsfield (our primary video tool), Arcads, Midjourney, Runway, ElevenLabs, and Captions.ai

Edit 3 to 5 short-form videos per day (15 to 45 seconds, vertical, TikTok and IG native)

Coordinate with the founder on creative direction, trends, and hook testing



What you're NOT doing:

Long-form YouTube edits

Client work

Wedding videos

Low-effort 
 content

This is high-quality, high-volume, AI-first short-form content. The kind that dominates TikTok and IG right now but almost no one knows how to produce at scale.



Who You Are

Non-negotiable:

2+ years editing short-form social video (TikTok, IG Reels, Shorts)

Deep, genuine interest in AI creative tools. You already experiment with Higgsfield, Arcads, Runway, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, and Captions.ai on your own

Strong eye for beauty, fashion, or lifestyle aesthetics

Fluent in English, written and spoken. You'll script, caption, and direct AI voiceovers

Fast. Obsessive about quality. Take feedback without ego

Full-time commitment. This is not a side project

Reliable internet and a machine that can handle video work

You stand out if:



You've grown a personal social account to 10K+ followers

You follow beauty and fashion creators and can name 10 trending hooks off the top of your head

You've already made money from AI tools (freelance, your own project, TikTok Shop, whatever)

You understand what makes a hook stop the scroll in 3 seconds

Compensation, The Honest Version

We're not going to tell you a salary number in this post because we don't pay like a typical editor job. Here's how it works:



Monthly base pay. Consistent, predictable income. Above market for PH full-time editor roles.

Performance commission. You earn a percentage of every customer your content drives. Tracked automatically. Paid monthly.

Ad-spend loyalty bonus. When your videos get promoted as paid ads, you earn an additional percentage on the ad spend behind them. This stacks on top of your commission.

Clear performance floor. We expect every editor to earn meaningfully above their base within 60 days. If your content works, your take-home can be 3x to 5x the base within a few months.

This is how top performers in our model have earned a real US-level income working from the Philippines. It's also why this isn't for everyone. If you just want a guaranteed monthly number with zero performance pressure, this is not the role.



If you're the right person, we want you to be one of the highest-paid AI video editors in the Philippines by the end of 2026.



What We Provide

Monthly AI tool budget. We pay for Higgsfield, Arcads, Midjourney, Runway, ElevenLabs, and Captions.ai

Swipe files of winning hooks, formats, and creators

Direct access to the founder and the creative team

Weekly group calls and Slack community

Real mentorship on AI video production, short-form strategy, and performance marketing

A path to grow into Senior Editor, then Creative Lead, then AI Content Director as we scale the team

Why This Role, Why Now

We launch April 25, 2026. By end of 2026, we plan to be one of the fastest-growing AI beauty brands in the US. The person who takes this role gets:



First-mover seniority on the content team

The most upside. Your accounts and your commissions compound as the brand grows

Real portfolio work that will make you the most hireable AI editor on the market 2 to 3 years from now

This is the kind of role you take when you want to stop trading hours for dollars and start building a career where your output compounds.



How to Apply

Send us:



- 3 to 5 of your best short-form edits (TikTok or IG links, or a folder)

- One AI-generated short video you make for this application. Brief: 15 to 30 seconds, beauty, fashion, or styling angle, AI character plus AI voiceover. Bonus points if you use Higgsfield. Show us what you can do in a day. No polish required. We want to see your instincts.

- A short Loom under 2 minutes. Tell us who you are, what AI tools you already use, and why you want this role

- Link to your own social account if you have one. Not required, but it helps



No resumes. No cover letters. Show us the work.



Apply to:

title: Full-Time MSP Dispatcher / Client Care Coordinator

title: Short Term Rental Specialist
description:
Short Term Rental Specialist | Assistant Property Manager



Endless Asset Management



About Us

Endless Asset Management operates premium vacation rental properties under the Endless Stays brand across 4 US markets (NJ, TN, FL, & VA). We own and operate our own portfolio while also co-hosting and property managing for other STR owners.



Our Core Values:



- World Class Hospitality to Every Guest and Owner – We go above and beyond from start to finish

- Fix Once, Fix Forever – We create lasting solutions that eliminate recurring issues

- Own the Outcome – We take responsibility, communicate proactively, and resolve issues quickly

- Systems Create Scale – Smart technology and structured processes amplify our human touch

- Bring Excitement, Passion, and Integrity Every Day – A positive attitude is contagious and essential



We're growing rapidly with an ambitious 10-year vision. This is a career opportunity, not just a job.



The Role

We're hiring one-two Short Term Rental Specialist to join our team as operational leaders. This is a fully remote position designed for someone who wants to grow into a leadership role within our organization.



Core Responsibilities:



End-to-end guest communication and experience management (inquiry through post-stay)

Complete reservation management across all platforms (Airbnb, VRBO, 
, direct)

Coordinate cleaning, maintenance, and service providers

Monitor property conditions and ensure quality standards

Handle problem-solving, troubleshooting, and service recovery

Maintain detailed documentation and execute company systems



Technology Stack You'll Use:

OwnerRez / Hospitable (PMS)

Breezeway (Operations)

OpenPhone (Communications)

Host Buddy, Stayfi, RankBreeze, Go High Level

Notion (Documentation)

Google Workspace





Required Qualifications

Must Have:



9/10 English Fluency with same for verbal and written (Non-negotiable - please do not apply if this is not you)

Previous experience managing short-term rentals or minimum in hospitality industry (required)

Quick learner who thrives in startup environments

Exceptional attention to detail and avid note-taker

Ownership mindset – you drive outcomes independently

Fantastic attitude and strong problem-solving abilities

Comfortable with technology and multiple software platforms

Weekend/evening availability for guest support (rotating basis)



Huge Plus:

Notion experience

OwnerRez/Hospitable experience

Familiarity with vacation rental technology platforms





What Makes This Different

Startup Environment: This is not a steady-state position. We're growing fast, building systems, and constantly evolving. If you're looking for routine, this isn't the role.

Career-Focused: We're hiring for one-two positions and currently have 1 VA. We will promote the right fit into a leadership role as we scale.

Systems + Human Touch: We leverage technology to automate processes, but we need someone who understands our systems, executes flawlessly, and monitors everything.

Real Impact: Your work directly affects guest satisfaction, property performance, and company growth.



Compensation



We offer:

Competitive salary based on experience

Performance-based bonuses tied to property metrics

Fully remote with flexible schedule (within operational requirements)

Clear advancement path to leadership with increased compensation



How to Apply

Submit:



Your resume

A brief 2-3 minute video displaying your verbal communication skills.



Tell us a little bit about yourself including an experience where you went above and beyond for your customer.



Important: To demonstrate your attention to detail (a critical skill for this role), please include the word "Jersey" in the Subject Line. Applications without this keyword will not be considered.



We're moving fast for the right candidates, so apply now if you're serious about taking your career to the next level and want to be excited to come to work every day.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Appointment Setter — Overtime Men's Health (Remote, Philippines)

**Schedule:** Full-time, remote — must work U.S. Eastern hours

**Start Date:** Immediate



 The Company



Overtime Men's Health is a fast-growing men's health company based in Tampa, Florida with a massive digital presence. We help men through testosterone optimization, erectile dysfunction treatment, injury recovery, stem cell therapy, and hair restoration. Our lead volume is high and growing. We need someone elite on the phones to keep up.



The Role

You are the first voice a potential patient hears. Your only job is to book appointments — not sell, not diagnose, not consult. The clinical team handles the rest.



Inbound: When a lead comes in, you call them within 60 seconds. Every time. No exceptions.



Outbound: Between inbound leads, you work our existing database — following up with past inquiries, no-shows, and unconverted prospects to book appointments.



You will be discussing sensitive men's health topics (erectile dysfunction, testosterone, sexual performance, hair loss) daily. If that makes you uncomfortable, this isn't for you.



Requirements 

-Native-level American English. Not "conversational." Not "proficient." If a patient in Tampa would guess you're calling from overseas, you will not be hired.

- **2+ years high-volume appointment setting or inside sales** — speed-to-lead inbound or cold calling. We will verify this.

- **You track your own numbers.** You must know your show rate, booking rate, speed-to-lead average, and daily call volume from previous roles. If you don't, you're not who we're looking for.

- **CRM fluency.** GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, or equivalent. You can navigate pipelines, set dispositions, and log notes in real time while on a call.

- **Health, wellness, or medical industry experience** strongly preferred.

- **Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and professional phone setup.** No background noise. No excuses.



 How to Apply (Follow These Steps Exactly)



**Step 1:** Record a **90-second Loom video** (camera on, face visible) where you: introduce yourself, tell us your strongest appointment setting metric from a past role, and pitch us on Overtime Men's Health as if we were a male patient hesitant about coming in for an erectile dysfunction consultation. Post the Loom link in your application. 



**Step 2:** First line of your cover letter must say: **"Speed to lead, every time."** Missing this = automatic discard.



**Step 3:** Answer these in your cover letter:

1. Average daily call volume in your most recent role?

2. What was your appointment show rate?

3. What CRM(s) have you used and at what level of proficiency?



**Step 4:** Resume with your last two phone-based roles highlighted — company name, duration, and one performance metric per role.



Do Not Apply If:

- You have never done appointment setting professionally

- You are uncomfortable discussing men's sexual health on the phone

- You cannot work U.S. Eastern business hours

- You plan to submit a generic application without following the steps above

You’ll be the first point of contact for many brands. Your job is to keep conversations moving, spot opportunities early, and make sure promising leads don’t go cold.

While templates, systems, and guidance will be provided, this role requires independent thinking. You’ll often need to d

Inbound
s & follow-ups

s

Director of Partnerships

ntum - keeping leads warm, organized, and progressing until they’re ready for a deeper sales conversation.

title: Business Development & Outreach Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Title: Business Development & Outreach Virtual Assistant

Pay: $4–$6/hour | 4–6 hours/day | Long-term, ongoing role



About Us

The Cain Collective is a fast-growing company founded by Bre Cain; a keynote speaker, business strategist, and founder of three brands: ICON & Lightning (a boutique VA placement agency), VA Leadership Academy (VALA, a VA training and certification program with nearly 500 graduates), and Women Who Scale (a membership community for women founders). We move fast, we do meaningful work, and we take care of our team.



About This Role

We are looking for a sharp, driven, detail oriented Virtual Assistant to own our outbound outreach efforts. This is not a general admin role. This is a focused, results oriented position where you will be doing real business development work; reaching out to podcast hosts, tech companies, and talent marketplaces on behalf of our brands every single day.

If you love sending
s, doing research, tracking results, and being part of something that is growing fast, this role is for you.



What You'll Be Doing

You will spend your 4–6 hours each day working across three outreach lanes:

Podcast Pitching — Researching podcasts that are a strong fit for Bre as a guest speaker, crafting personalized pitch
s, sending outreach, following up, and tracking responses. We will give you talking points, bio materials, and pitch templates to work from.

Tech Company Partnership Outreach — Reaching out to CRM and business operations software companies to introduce a white-label VA support partnership opportunity. We have a one-pager ready. Your job is to find the right contact, send a warm and professional
, follow up, and keep the pipeline organized.

Talent Marketplace Licensing Outreach — Reaching out to talent platforms and freelancer marketplaces to introduce VALA's curriculum licensing program. Same process — research, personalized outreach, follow-up, organized tracking.



Instagram Outbound Engagement — This is not cold pitching or DM outreach. This is intentional, genuine engagement on Instagram with accounts that match our ideal client — women founders, coaches, service providers, and entrepreneurs who are building teams and scaling their businesses. You will like posts, leave thoughtful comments, and interact consistently with a targeted list of accounts so that the right people start noticing Bre's profile and naturally want to explore what she does. We will give you a profile of who we are looking for. Your job is to show up as a warm, real human presence that represents our brand well .. not a bot, not a script.



What We're Looking For



Excellent written English — this is non-negotiable. Your
s will represent our brand and they need to be clean, professional, warm, and compelling.

Strong research skills. You need to be able to find the right contact at a company, understand what they do, and personalize an outreach message.

Highly organized. You will be managing multiple outreach pipelines at once and we need everything tracked accurately.

Self-motivated and consistent. We are not looking for someone who needs constant supervision. We need someone who shows up, does the work, and reports back clearly.

Familiarity with Google Sheets, Gmail, and basic CRM or tracking tools is a plus.

Experience with outbound outreach, sales support, or business development is a big plus but not required if you are a fast learner with strong English and great attention to detail.





What a Great Day in This Role Looks Like

You log on, check your tracking sheet, send 10–15 personalized outreach
s across the three categories, follow up on
s from previous days, log everything, and send a brief end-of-day update to Bre & her team. Focused, intentional, and consistent.



What We Offer



$4–$6/hour based on experience and English proficiency

4–6 hours per day, flexible schedule within reason

A long-term role with a company that is growing quickly and promotes from within

The opportunity to learn real business development skills inside a fast-moving personal brand and education company

A founder who is invested in her team and treats people well





To Apply

Please send an introduction to 
 telling us about yourself and why this role is a great fit. Include at least one example of outreach, writing, or research work you have done before; even if informal. If you have not done outreach work before, write us a short sample cold
 pitching Bre as a podcast guest. Her website is 
. This will show us your English skills and your initiative.



We are looking to hire quickly. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Media Buyer Analyst
description:
Location: Remote 

Schedule: U.S. Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

Compensation: $2,000 USD per month



About the Role:



Workspark is hiring a Media Buying Analyst to embed full-time directly inside a top-tier U.S. advertising agency. You will work alongside senior buyers and investment directors to execute media campaigns against strategy, budget, and performance goals.



You will scale from managing two campaigns to four plus campaigns within your first ninety days. You will own your workflow, manage tight deadlines independently, and maintain full transparency with your internal team.



**Note: You must have paid media buying experience and be able to learn new platforms fast. While we provide training on specific internal buying systems, a foundational understanding of media math and execution is required.**



What You Will Do:



- Execute & Optimize: Launch media buys against strategy, CPM goals, and strict budgets.

- Performance Ownership: Monitor daily pacing and performance to make autonomous budget shifts, hitting KPI thresholds.

- Independent Auditing: Perform independent pre-buy audits by month three to ensure clean, error-free launches.

- Financial Reconciliation: Resolve billing and reconciliation discrepancies within a strict 48-hour business window.

- Proactive Risk Management: Flag performance risks to internal stakeholders before they impact campaign results.

- Analytical Validation: Use Excel and Google Sheets to validate that delivery aligns perfectly with spend and goals.



What We Are Looking For:



- Experience: 3+ years of hands-on paid media buying across any platform mix. Examples include native ads (Quora, Taboola, Outbrain, Reddit, Rumble, MGID), paid search (Google Ads), programmatic display, or social. Broadcast/Linear TV experience preferred but not required.

- Market Expertise: Direct experience buying media for the U.S. market is required. You must understand U.S. consumer behavior and how American advertisers operate.

- Communication Fluency: Highly efficient English (spoken and listening). You must follow fast-moving conversations with U.S. colleagues in real-time and explain data insights clearly.

- Technical Skills: Proven track record managing KPIs including CTR, CPC, CPA, and ROAS. Hands-on A/B testing and audience segmentation experience.

- Data Fluency: Expert-level Excel and Google Sheets skills (formulas, pivot tables) to validate media math live during conversations.

- Education: Bachelor’s degree in any field.



Critical Personal Qualities (Non-Negotiable):



- Time Management: Ability to hit hard deadlines, such as a firm Thursday 5:00 PM buy deadline that cannot slip.

- Ultra-High Responsiveness: You acknowledge internal requests in minutes, providing transparency on your status.

- Initiative: You ask clarifying questions early, raise your hand when stuck, and never wait for a deadline to pass before flagging an issue.

- Street Smart Logic: You notice when data does not "add up" and escalate with a potential solution in mind.

- Ownership: You manage your own time in a remote environment without being chased.



Technical Requirements:



- Reliable high-speed internet with a documented backup power solution.

- Functional webcam and headset for daily video collaboration.

- Quiet, professional home office environment.



Why Workspark:



- Full-time career track role; not a temporary contract.

- Direct exposure to a leading U.S. agency and senior industry experts.

- Access to proprietary AI media tools.

- Bi-monthly payroll via Wise.

- Paid vacation, holidays, and sick leave after the probationary period.



How to Apply:



Apply here: 

Please provide:

- Updated Resume.

- A video or audio introduction in English describing your media buying experience and analytical approach.



**Note: Applications without a video introduction will not be considered.**

title: Technical Design Engineer
description:
US Ecommerce Startup Company

Technical Design Engineer

Philippines — Remote | SolidWorks | Manufacturing



Location

Remote — Philippines-based candidates

Shift

9:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Eastern Time (9:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippines Time)

Employment type

Full-time, long-term

Reports to

Senior Project Engineer (India)

Works with

US-based design & operations team, India manufacturing team



THE ROLE



You are not a drafter. You are the person who takes a concept — sometimes just a photograph or a measurement sketch from a US client — and turns it into a mathematically precise, factory-ready 3D model. Every dimension you produce will be trusted by a manufacturing team in India. Every drawing you release will be used on a CNC machine or a casting line. There is no room for ambiguity, and that is exactly what makes this work interesting.



You will be part of a small, focused design team — reporting to a Senior Project Engineer in India and working alongside office-side design engineers and factory-side manufacturing engineers. The work spans the full product lifecycle: from first concept to finished documentation.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Advanced 3D Modelling

- Build parametric models for luxury architectural hardware — curtain rods, shelving systems, door handles, and custom bracket hardware — using Master Model techniques that allow rapid configuration across finish, length, and diameter variants.

- Use SolidWorks Surface Modelling for complex decorative profiles that require C2 or G2 curvature continuity — this is not approximation work, it is mathematical precision applied to aesthetic form.

- Develop sheet metal components with correct K-factors and bend allowances calibrated for local fabrication partners.



Tooling & CAM

- Execute mold design workflows from scratch: parting line identification, shut-off surfaces, and core/cavity splits for casting products.

- Generate and simulate 2.5 and 3-axis CNC toolpaths in SolidWorks CAM, optimising specifically for surface finish quality on visible decorative faces — not just material removal rate.

- Run Draft Analysis and Wall Thickness checks as a standard part of every release. First-Time-Right manufacturing is the goal, not the exception.



Documentation & Rendering

- Produce 2D engineering drawings with full GD&T, formatted for global manufacturing partners who may be working from different standards.

- Create photorealistic product renders in SolidWorks Visualize for Shopify product pages and marketing catalogs — you are part of the commercial output, not just the back office.

- Build exploded-view animations for customer installation guides.



Data, Systems & Analysis

- Run SolidWorks Simulation (static stress analysis) on structural components — brackets, mounting points, rod spans — to validate designs before they go to the factory. Flag any failures to the SPE with a clear summary of what failed and why.

- Maintain master data for all active products in the SolidWorks library: correct file naming, revision history, configuration structure, and BOM accuracy. A clean library is everyone's responsibility — yours especially as the person building new files daily.

- Work alongside the operations team to ensure design outputs (BOMs, part numbers, dimensions) align with our ERP system (ERPNext). You do not need to be an ERP expert — but you need to understand how your drawings feed into it and flag discrepancies when you see them.





WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU



SolidWorks

4–6 years as your primary tool — not listed alongside 20 other software packages. Surface modelling, SolidWorks CAM, and Visualize familiarity are strongly preferred.



Manufacturing background

Hardware, metalwork, sheet metal fabrication, casting, or CNC-heavy environments. Not civil, structural, or pure architectural roles.



2D and 3D — both

You must be fluent in both parametric 3D modelling and production 2D drawings with GD&T. Strong in one and weak in the other is not workable for this role.



English

C1–C2 professional level. You will be reading US client briefs, asking clarifying questions in writing, and occasionally joining video calls. Clear written communication is non-negotiable.



Your setup

High-spec PC capable of large assemblies and GPU rendering. Reliable high-speed internet with a backup power solution. SolidWorks Professional installed and licensed.



ERP familiarity

Not mandatory, but a genuine advantage. If you have worked with any ERP system — ERPNext, SAP, Oracle, or similar — and understand how BOMs and part data flow between design and production, you will fit into our workflow faster. If not, we will get you there.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THIS ROLE



- In your first 90 days: You have mapped our existing product catalog, flagged inconsistencies in legacy CAD files, and begun building a configurable SolidWorks library that our factory can work from without ambiguity.

- At 6 months: You are independently managing the full Concept ? Tooling ? Manufacturing pipeline for custom client orders. Zero factory-side revision requests on files you have released.

- At 12 months: You are the technical reference point for manufacturing questions — our India factory team contacts you directly because your drawings are trusted without needing a senior review.



WHAT THIS ROLE OFFERS



- Real product ownership. Every piece of hardware you model will be manufactured, packaged, and sold to real customers in the United States. Your work is not abstract.

- Variety over repetition. Every client order is different. Custom lengths, finishes, mounting configurations, organic profiles — you will rarely solve the same problem twice.

- Direct US client exposure. You are not an invisible back-office resource. You will see client briefs, understand the intent behind the brief, and produce work that represents the company.

- A team that knows engineering. Your Senior Project Engineer is a technical lead, not a project coordinator. The feedback you receive will be precise, engineering-level critique — the kind that makes you better.

- Long-term stability. We are building an internal design capability, not outsourcing a project. This is a long-term role with a company that is growing.

title: Video Editor
description:
We are seeking a talented and creative Video Editor to join our team. As a Video Editor, you will play a crucial role in enhancing our brand's online presence through visually compelling and engaging video content. You will collaborate closely with our marketing and creative teams to create captivating videos that drive customer engagement and increase brand awareness.



Responsibilities:



- Collaborate with the marketing and creative teams to understand project objectives and requirements.

- Edit and assemble raw footage into high-quality videos that align with our brand guidelines and storytelling objectives.

- Enhance videos with relevant graphics, animations, and visual effects to create visually stunning and engaging content.

- Utilize sound design and editing techniques to enhance video quality and overall impact.

- Continuously explore and implement innovative video editing techniques to keep our brand's video content fresh and engaging.

- Collaborate with the marketing team to optimize videos for various platforms, including social media, website, and
 campaigns.
