title: ASMR Raw Egg Peeling Creator & YouTube Live Streamer
description:
We are looking for someone to create relaxing ASMR-style content focused on slowly peeling raw eggs, and to live stream the process on YouTube.



The goal is to carefully remove the outer shell while keeping the inner membrane intact. The content is slow, relaxing, and visually satisfying. No talking or on-camera presence is required.



Reference Channel: 



What you will do:



Live stream the egg peeling process on YouTube (calm, relaxing streams).



Carefully peel raw eggs while keeping the inner membrane intact.



Move slowly and maintain a relaxing, steady rhythm.



Ensure good lighting, framing, and high-quality audio (natural ASMR sounds only).



Follow a consistent visual style similar to the reference channel.



What you need:



iPhone 11 or newer (or an equivalent smartphone with a very good camera).



A highly stable internet connection suitable for seamless live streaming.



Ring light or soft, warm lighting setup.



Raw eggs (you will need to purchase these locally).



A small comedone extractor or similar precision tool to start peeling.



A completely quiet filming environment to capture pure ASMR audio.



Requirements:



Extreme patience and very steady hands.



Ability to perform slow, repetitive actions without rushing.



Ability to manage a basic YouTube live streaming setup.



Comfortable streaming for extended periods of time.



To apply, please send:



The exact phone model you will use for filming.



Confirmation that your internet can handle live streaming on YouTube.



A short sample video showing steady, close-up hand work (it doesn't have to be an egg, just something showing your camera quality, lighting, and steady hands).

title: Full-Stack Developer (WooCommerce & UX/UI Optimization)
description:
We’re looking for a second Full-Stack Developer with deep WooCommerce and WordPress experience who can manage both the back end and front end of our website at a high level. This role is about continuously optimizing, refining, and elevating our e-commerce store into a fast, functional site optimized for conversions.



This isn’t a job for someone who’s just familiar with WordPress or WooCommerce—we need a highly skilled developer who understands performance optimization, UX/UI strategy, and e-commerce best practices. If you have a strong background in site speed, front-end layout, user experience, and WooCommerce development and can make a website run as smoothly and efficiently as possible, we want to hear from you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

WooCommerce & WordPress Development (Back End & Front End)

• Manage, optimize, and continuously improve our WooCommerce store’s back end and front end.

• Develop and customize WordPress themes and WooCommerce templates to ensure functionality and performance.

• Troubleshoot and resolve plugin conflicts, database issues, and WooCommerce-specific problems.

• Implement custom functionality and integrations as needed.



Site Speed & Performance Optimization

• Ensure fast load times through caching, asset optimization, lazy loading, and script management.

• Optimize WooCommerce databases, queries, and server resources to enhance site performance.

• Minify and defer CSS, JavaScript, and HTML for maximum efficiency.

• Conduct regular audits.

• Manage CDN strategies, server optimizations, and hosting best practices to maintain peak performance.



UX/UI Design & Conversion Optimization

• Continuously refine site layout, navigation, and overall design for maximum usability and conversions.

• Conduct A/B testing, heatmap analysis, and user behavior tracking to identify friction points.

• Optimize product pages, checkout flow, and calls to action (CTAs) to improve customer experience and increase sales.

• Ensure a mobile-first design and full responsiveness across all devices.



Technical SEO & Security

• Assist the team with technical SEO best practices (schema markup, structured data, URL optimization).

• Ensure secure WordPress practices, including firewalls, malware protection, and regular updates.

• Manage 301 redirects, broken links, and site structure improvements.



What We’re Looking For:

- Extensive WooCommerce and WordPress experience (not just general WordPress development skills).

- Strong knowledge of PHP, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

- Proven experience optimizing site speed (must have real-world examples).

- Deep understanding of UX/UI principles and how they impact conversions.

- Experience with CRO techniques (A/B testing, analytics, heatmaps).

- Familiarity with performance testing tools (GTmetrix, PageSpeed Insights, Lighthouse).

- Ability to troubleshoot WooCommerce issues (beyond plugin installations).

- Strong problem-solving skills—you should be able to identify and fix bottlenecks proactively.



Nice to Have (Bonus Skills):

Hands-on experience with Google Analytics, Tag Manager, and other marketing tech.



We are a U.S.-based company, and this role requires working closely with our team, which operates on Eastern Standard Time (EST). The position follows a standard work schedule of Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM EST. Candidates must be available during these hours.



Ready to Join Us?

If you feel like you would be a great addition to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Shopify Store Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please fill out the application form: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagwn3KJ9biX7VeNO/form



Given the high volume of applicants, we will not be able to consider applications not submitted through this form. Thank you for your understanding!



POSITION DETAILS: SHOPIFY STORE SPECIALIST



MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.



KEY OUTCOMES:

* Product Setup: Efficiently set up new products on assigned accounts according to agreed-upon listing standards, ensuring a 99.8% upload rate.



* Store Optimization: Within the first 6 months, boost our store's conversion rate to the industry average of 2.0%



* Record Maintenance: Maintain 100?curacy in Airtable record-keeping and weekly KPI report tracking.



* Inventory Feeds: Achieve 99?curacy in inventory feed uploads and maintain timely inventory updates, with no more than one error per quarter; do periodic spot checks of >10 items on each platform per week to verify site accuracy



* MAPP Adherence: Maintain 100% compliance with the company's MAPP; violations resolved within 72 hours



* New Ideas: Implement >2 major new ideas per quarter to improve account performance through a mix of competitor research and the latest Shopify/eCom sales strategies



OTHER REGULAR RESPONSIBILITIES:

* SOP Creation and Maintenance: Update/maintain SOPs that encompass the product setup process, store optimization, and more.



* Performance Analysis and Reporting: Every week, analyze sales and other KPIs to understand site performance, identify areas for improvement, and inform data-driven decision-making. Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.



* Cross-functional Collaboration: Monitor daily order flow and collaborate with internal teams such as Customer Service and Marketing to resolve issues and ensure a seamless and integrated approach to store management.



* Market Research: Keep tabs on competitor strategies to inform listing strategy and overall account strategy.



* Promotions and Discounts: Develop and manage promotional campaigns to drive sales, increase customer retention, and enhance brand visibility.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:

* Organized home office setup, free of noise and distractions, with a dual monitor setup strongly preferred.



* Reliable power and internet connections, with backup systems in place.



* Full-time position, 40 hrs/week minimum, with partial overlapping hours or entirely overlapping hours with US Central time



* 2-3 years of experience with Shopify site maintenance



* 1+ years of experience with Shopify site optimization, including CRO work



* Must have substantial previous Excel experience, including experience working with flat files



* Excellent English skills



* High attention to detail, with the ability to meticulously proofread for spelling and grammar



* Ability and willingness to independently learn new tools, products, or technology and make recommendations on trends to support the business



* Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and professional with the ability to multitask and prioritize workload; ability to work independently with minimal supervision is extremely important



* Ability to work with our team via
, Slack, and
/Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion



* Stable, trustworthy, highly dependable. Ideally, someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



* Commitment to HiEnd Accents' mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and sells premium bedding and home textiles — quilts, sheets, decorative pillows, duvets, and more — that bring everyday luxury into people's homes. We've been family-owned and operated since 2005, now in our second generation of leadership, and are headquartered in Dallas, Texas.



We serve thousands of retailers, interior designers, department stores, and boutique hotels across the United States through four distinct brands spanning a range of styles and price points. Our growth has been recognized nationally: we've been named to the Inc. 5000 (a prestigious list of America's fastest-growing private companies) two years running, and have received multiple industry awards for product excellence.



We're a company of around 45 people — small enough that every person matters, established enough that you're joining something real and growing.



Discover more at 
.



Why HiEnd Accents?

We're growing our team in the Philippines because we believe in finding the best people regardless of geography — and investing in them for the long term.



As a family-owned company, we don't treat our tea
mbers as interchangeable. We take the time to build real working relationships, we care about your professional development, and we want every person who works with us to leave with stronger skills than when they started. That's a genuine commitment from our leadership, not a line in a job posting.



Learn more about our Philippines team here: Meet the HiEnd Accents Team in the Philippines (
) 



What you can expect:

You'll work directly with our core team in Texas — not through layers of management or a BPO intermediary. Your contributions will be visible, your ideas heard, and your growth supported.



-Compensation & Benefits— Competitive pay benchmarked to PH market rates for skilled roles, not entry-level floors. Paid time off, including vacation days and holidays, plus 13th-month pay.

- Real Career Growth— We're expanding quickly, which means new roles and responsibilities open up regularly. We actively develop our people through mentorship, skill-building, and increasing ownership of projects.

-A Team That Feels Like a Team — We're a close, collaborative group that celebrates wins together. You'll know your teammates by name — including leadership.

description:
HOW TO APPLY

---

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and 
—covering technical SEO, content, entity/structured data, link acquisition, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—earning inclusion and citations in Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT/Gemini.



You’re excited because you will...



Strategy & Ownership

6–12 Month Outcomes

- Material growth in non-brand organic revenue and category rankings.

- Repeatable GEO playbook embedded in content and merchandising workflows.



Job Requirements

- High ownership, bias to action, and communication via
, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

Nice to have

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at [
](
).



Want to get to know us better and learn what it’s like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 
/hea-ph-team



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. description:

/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pag8APoI3f6NCl7mv/form



Job Description



We're seeking a highly capable and proactive Operations Lead to join our dynamic team at HiEnd Accents. This role is critical in ensuring seamless order management and operational excellence across our organization. The ideal candidate will be a problem-solver with strong leadership skills and a track record of driving operational efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Oversee and optimize the entire order management process, from intake to fulfillment, including:

• Bringing in customer orders from various sources (portals, EDI,
s, faxes)

• Confirming and making changes to orders in the ERP system

• Releasing orders/backorders for shipping and organizing for easy picking

• Creating delivery slips, invoicing shipped orders, and managing EDI documents

• Uploading shipping and invoicing information to customer portals

- Lead and mentor the Order Management team, driving accountability and ensuring KPIs and SLAs are consistently met or exceeded.

- Manage key accounts with complex requirements, ensuring high customer satisfaction through:

• Responding to inquiries with same-day service

• Handling payment issues and order-related problems

• Providing information on inventory availability and product inquiries

• Phone outreach

- Proactively identify and resolve operational issues, developing and implementing solutions to prevent recurrence.

- Drive continuous improvement by:

• Analyzing operational data to identify trends and opportunities

• Collaborating cross-functionally to implement strategic changes

• Contributing to special projects aimed at improving performance and scalability

- Spearhead process documentation (SOP) creation, encompassing both refinement of existing procedures and development of new ones.

- Develop and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including customers, vendors, and internal teams.

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions, conversations, and issues using designated tools (e.g., Front and Airtable).

- Communicate effectively with the Warehouse team for shipment alignment.

- Perform other duties as assigned.



Who You Are



- A seasoned professional with 5+ years of experience in operations management, preferably in e-commerce or retail

- An experienced team manager

- Bachelor's degree in Business, Operations Management, or a related field

- Must have recent night shift (PH time) experience and be willing to report to work during CST hours

- Proven track record of contributing to team success and driving operational excellence

- Expert in order management systems, EDI, and inventory management

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights

- Excellent problem-solving skills with a solutions-oriented mindset

- Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities

- Proficient in the MS Office suite, with advanced Excel skills

- Experience with ERP systems and process automation tools

- Experience with SAP is not a requirement, but definitely a plus



Why HiEnd Accents?



Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, is a committed professional, and a straight shooter, you'll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value. Our customers love our exceptional designs that span a diverse range of styles and our commitment to offering everyday luxury at accessible prices. We proudly serve a broad clientele, including department stores, furniture stores, boutique hotels, interior designers, and retail customers. HiEnd Accents is based in Irving, Texas. description:
HOW TO APPLY

/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagS4ltOHDs97kQf9/form

---

Mission: To keep our eCommerce engine running smoothly by coordinating product launches, uploads, and site content with high precision and strong follow-through—so our storefronts stay accurate, on-brand, and on schedule.



Key Outcomes



- Monitor and manage all eCommerce-related tasks end-to-end, ensuring timely follow-up with the team and leadership until completion

- Actively monitor eCommerce-related questions or issues raised via Slack or
; create tasks/tickets as needed and drive them to resolution

- Maintain and monitor Airtable to ensure product upload statuses are accurate, deadlines are visible, and projects stay on schedule

- Oversee the product upload process across platforms, ensuring each product has complete and correct copy, imagery, and required assets before publishing

- Identify gaps proactively (missing copy, missing images, incomplete data, unclear approvals), coordinate ownership, and resolve blockers before launch dates are impacted

- Ensure accurate and timely image and copy uploads across all eCommerce platforms, including QA for formatting, spelling, links, and brand consistency

- Coordinate the copywriting workflow (draft ? review ? approval), ensuring product copy is completed and approved ahead of deadlines

- Coordinate promotions, banners, and on-site content updates, ensuring assets are briefed, created, approved, and ready in advance of launch

- Support the eCommerce team with miscellaneous operational and administrative tasks as needed, especially during heavy launch periods

- Work independently with a high level of productivity, efficiency, and attention to detail, escalating risks early and proposing solutions



Other Regular Responsibilities

- Utilize data and research to evaluate campaign performance, identifying key insights and providing actionable recommendations

- Maintain a well-organized and up-to-date repository of marketing assets (both internal as well as from competitors), such as graphics, promotional materials, and social media posts, ensuring easy access for the marketing team

- Assist the Marketing Director with various marketing-related tasks as needed



Who You Are

- 1–3 years of experience in eCommerce operations, digital operations, marketing operations, or a project coordination role (consumer products preferred)

- Highly organized with strong follow-through—you close loops and keep work moving

- Excellent attention to detail; you catch errors before they become customer-facing

title: Content Specialist & Video Editor
description:
Do you love video editing and want to grow your career in content creation?



We're looking for talented video editors who are ready to take on a bigger role as a Content Specialist.



In this role, you'll do more than just edit. You’ll be trained on our internal systems to create short-form captions using AI, schedule social media posts through our platform, and manage content workflows for your assigned client.



We are a content agency, and we often repurpose longer-form videos for YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikToks, as well as audiograms and graphics for social media. We also edit their raw videos for YouTube and edit podcast episodes as well.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Edit short-form and long-form content (YouTube, Reels, TikTok, podcasts)

Use our AI captioning system to create short-form captions

Schedule content to automatically post inside our proprietary platform

Follow creative direction and provide consistent, high-quality execution

Participate in weekly training sessions to continually improve your skills



Who We’re Looking For:



Professional experience with Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or similar tools

Strong eye for motion design and storytelling

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage your time independently

Positive attitude and willingness to receive feedback

Excellent communication skills and a self-starter mindset

Comfortable learning new tools and systems



What We Offer:



Guaranteed client placement upon successful training

Monthly salary of $700 to $1,000 USD paid directly by the client

Weekly training and ongoing support

100% remote work



If you're interested, please respond with the subject line "It's Me You're Looking For" and include a link to your work. Tell me why we should hire you!

title: Inside Sales Agent / Lead Coordinator (Remote, Full-Time) Alexis Weigand Real Estate | Texas, USA (Work from Home)
description:
About Us

Alexis Weigand Real Estate is one of the top-producing luxury real estate teams in Texas, with over 2,500 closed transactions and more than 1,000 five-star reviews. We are a high-volume team based in Boerne, Texas, with a fully remote staff that connects on Zoom every day. We invest in our people, train heavily on AI tools, and hold everyone on the team to a high standard.

About This Role

This is a high-accountability, phone-forward role. You will own our lead pipeline from first contact to agent handoff, making outbound calls, responding to inbound leads, and ensuring no opportunity goes cold. You will work closely with our Marketing Manager to monitor and respond to leads coming in through social media platforms, and you will live inside Follow Up Boss all day, every day.

If you are someone who is comfortable on the phone with US clients, organized under pressure, and energized by hitting goals, this role is a strong fit.

Hours

8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST, Monday through Friday on Zoom (equivalent to 9:00 PM to 6:00 AM PHT). Lead response time is critical in this role. You must be online, reachable, and ready to make calls from the 
nt your shift starts.

What You Will Do

Lead Management and Outbound Calling



Make outbound calls to new and existing leads daily using Follow Up Boss Calling

Respond to all inbound leads promptly and log every interaction accurately in Follow Up Boss

Qualify leads through structured conversations and route them to the appropriate agent

Maintain consistent follow-up sequences for all leads at every stage of the pipeline

Ensure no lead goes uncontacted, untracked, or unassigned



Social Media Lead Response



Work directly with the Marketing Manager to monitor leads and inquiries coming through
, Instagram, and other social platforms

Respond to DMs, comments, and lead form submissions quickly and professionally

Convert social media interest into qualified pipeline entries inside Follow Up Boss



Pipeline Oversight



Own the health of the lead pipeline and report on activity, conversion, and follow-up status regularly

Flag stale leads, gaps in follow-up, and pipeline issues before they become problems

Suggest and implement improvements to lead flow and response processes in partnership with the team



What We Are Looking For



Proven experience as an ISA, lead coordinator, or inside sales role supporting a US-based real estate team

Deep, hands-on proficiency with Follow Up Boss (this is non-negotiable)

Comfortable making and receiving calls with US clients in clear, professional English

Strong written English for social media and message-based lead response

Highly organized with obsessive attention to follow-up and detail

Self-directed and goal-oriented with the ability to manage a high volume of leads without dropping the ball

Comfortable using AI tools or genuinely eager to learn them at a high level

Reliable high-speed internet, a quality headset, and a professional home office setup



Compensation



$12,000 USD per year, paid consistently

Full-time, long-term position (not project-based)





To Apply, Please Submit a Short Video (3 to 5 minutes) Answering the Following:

Point your camera at yourself, speak clearly, and answer each question. No application without a video will be considered.



Introduce yourself. Tell us who you are, where you live, and what you enjoy outside of work.

What are your core values and what matters most to you in your work?

Rate your spoken and written English on a scale of 1 to 10. Be honest.

Walk us through your ISA or inside sales experience. How many calls did you make per day, what was your lead volume, and what did your follow-up process look like?

Describe how you have used Follow Up Boss. What did you manage inside it and how did you keep your pipeline organized?

Tell us about a lead you converted that required multiple touchpoints over time. What was your approach and what was the outcome?

How have you worked with a marketing or social media team to respond to leads coming in through platforms like
 or Instagram?

How are you currently using AI tools in your work? If you have not started, tell us how open you are to learning.

What is most important to you in your next role and where do you want to be in one year and five years?

Anything else you want us to know? Any questions for us?

title: Outbound Appointment Setter / Sales Development Representative
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a high-energy, results-driven Outbound Appointment Setter / SDR to help us connect with qualified leads, book appointments, and drive business growth through proactive outreach.



This role is ideal for someone who:

Enjoys being on the phone

Can build trust quickly

Thrives in a performance-based environment

We’re not just looking for someone who can dial we want someone with a hunter mentality who enjoys the challenge of outbound sales and knows how to turn conversations into opportunities.



What You’ll Do

Book qualified appointments for two growing companies

Make high-volume outbound calls (warm & cold leads)

Book qualified appointments for the sales team

Follow proven scripts, frameworks, and onboarding training

Handle objections confidently and guide conversations toward booking

Update lead statuses and manage pipelines in CRM

Participate in role-plays, coaching, and ongoing sales training

Learn and adapt quickly to our offer, audience, and messaging

(Optional growth) Assist with inbox management and outreach tasks



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have Qualities

Proven outbound calling or appointment setting experience

Strong English communication skills

Confident, persuasive, and emotionally intelligent

Ability to build rapport quickly and reduce resistance

Comfortable with performance-based compensation

Coachable and open to feedback and training

Self-motivated and consistent with daily targets



Preferred Background

Experience making 150–200 calls/day

Background in cold calling, SDR, telesales, or appointment setting

Familiar with CRM tools and pipeline management

Experience in B2B, service-based businesses, coaching, or healthcare (a plus)

Willingness to learn social media outreach and inbox engagement



What Success Looks Like

Success in this role is measured by results, not just activity. You will be expected to:

Maintain strong daily call volume

Consistently book qualified appointments

Improve show-up rates

Contribute to closed deals through quality conversations and follow-ups

We’re looking for someone who can quickly ramp up and help increase qualified conversations week over week.



Base Pay

$5.00 USD per hour

Plus commission on every attended appointment and closed deal.

title: Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant who can provide day-to-day support across admin, client management, content, and personal tasks. This role is ideal for someone detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with shifting time zones (South America & Europe).



1. Responsibilities



A. Administrative Support



- Manage
s, respond to inquiries, and categorize messages for priority responses.

title: Experienced Bookkeeper with Real Estate Accounting Expertise
description:
QUICKBOOKS ONLINE AND APP FOLIO EXPERIENCE REQUIRED !



We are looking for our next rockstar Experienced Bookkeeper to join our team! The role will manage all financial transactions related to our real estate operations. This includes maintaining accurate records, preparing financial statements, and

ensuring compliance with all relevant laws and regulations. The ideal candidate will have a deep

understanding of real estate accounting principles and be able to work independently to manage the

financial aspects of our real estate portfolio.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain and update financial records for multiple real estate properties, including accounts

payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger entries.

- Reconcile bank statements and prepare monthly financial statements, including balance sheets,

income, and cash flow statements.

- Manage property-related expenses, including taxes, insurance, maintenance, and utilities.

- Prepare and process payroll for property management staff and contractors.

- Assist with budgeting and forecasting for real estate projects and properties.

- Ensure compliance with local, state, and federal tax regulations, including property tax filings and

real estate transaction reporting.

- Coordinate with property managers, tenants, and vendors to ensure accurate and timely financial

reporting.

- Conduct periodic audits of financial records to ensure accuracy and completeness.

- Prepare financial reports and analyses for management review.

- Assist in the preparation of year-end financial statements and work with external auditors as

needed.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience as a bookkeeper, with a focus on real estate accounting.

- With at least 2 years' experience using AppFolio and AP/AR (Mandatory).

- Strong knowledge of real estate accounting practices, including property management, leasing,

and real estate transactions.

- Proficiency in accounting software, such as QuickBooks and app folio.

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in financial reporting.

- Strong organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Associate or Bachelor degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field is preferred.



Working hours: 9 am to 5 pm EST.



To be considered for this role please include a copy of your resume and a cover letter explaining why you feel that you would be a good fit for this position.



Furthermore, to be considered please include the word "Alpha" in the subject line of your application.



Thank you,

Alpha Capital Funds

title: VIDEO EDITOR - E-COMMERCE (FREELANCE PROJECT-BASED)
description:
About us: We're a growing e-commerce brand. We need a reliable video editor to create short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts) for our products.

The work:



You'll receive raw footage or briefs from us. You edit and deliver polished videos. That's it. No meetings, no back-and-forth delays  just good work, fast.

What we need:



- CapCut expert -You know the software inside out



- E-commerce experience - You've edited product videos that convert (we care about hooks and engagement)



- Fast delivery - 12- 24 hours for standard videos



- Portfolio proof - You show us recent work (non-negotiable)



- Clear communication - You ask questions upfront, deliver on time. 



TO APPLY — YOU MUST:



1. Show your portfolio - Send links to 4-5  recent e-commerce or product videos you've edited. We need to see your actual work.



2. Tell us: What's your fastest turnaround for a polished 20-second video without sacrificing quality?



What happens next:



We review your portfolio and answers



If we like what we see, we do a quick 10-minute video call to make sure we're aligned

We give you a paid test video to see if we work well together

If it's good, we hire you for ongoing work





We want:



- Someone who knows their craft

- Reliable, professional, no drama

- Takes ownership of the work

- Wants a long-term working relationship



If this sounds like you, apply now.

title: Experienced Pool Service VA Needed,
description:
Experienced Pool Service VA Needed, Customer Service & Dispatch (High-Level Role)



We are not looking for a typical VA.



We are ONLY looking for someone who already understands how a pool service company operates.



If you do not have direct experience working with a pool service company, this role is not a fit.



About Us



We are Palmway Pools, a premium pool service company servicing residential homes and Airbnb properties.



Our clients rely on us to keep their pools in perfect condition, especially when guests are involved.



This is a high-responsibility environment where communication, urgency, and accuracy matter every day.





What You’ll Be Doing



You will act as the operational bridge between customers and field technicians.



This is not basic support, this is real operations.



* Answer inbound calls and messages from customers

* Dispatch and route technicians efficiently

* Handle scheduling, rescheduling, and urgent pool issues

* Communicate clearly with both customers and techs

* Track service jobs, repairs, and follow-ups

* Ensure nothing falls through the cracks

* Follow up with customers after service

* Document everything accurately







Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



You MUST have experience working with a pool service company.



This includes understanding:



* Weekly pool service workflows

* Pool chemistry basics (chlorine, pH, algae, etc.)

* Common pool issues and how they are handled

* Equipment basics (pumps, filters, salt systems)

* How dispatching works in a pool service business



If you do not have this experience, please do not apply.







Tools You’ll Be Using



* WhatsApp

* Slack

* Go High Level (GHL)



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone sharp and experienced.



* Excellent English, both written and spoken

* Proven experience in pool service operations or support

* Strong attention to detail, you catch what others miss

* Fast thinker, able to make decisions under pressure

* Highly organized and proactive

* Calm, confident, and professional with customers

* Reliable and responsive, we move fast







This Role Is NOT For You If



* You need constant supervision

* You miss details or forget tasks

* You respond slowly

* You have no pool service experience

* You struggle with handling multiple things at once





This Role IS For You If



* You already understand how a pool service company runs

* You take ownership and solve problems without being told

* You like fast-paced environments

* You want long-term growth with a serious company

* You care about doing things right the first time





Growth Opportunity



This is a performance-based role.



If you perform at a high level, there will be opportunities for increased pay and more responsibility.



We reward speed, reliability, and accuracy.





How to Apply



To apply, send:



1. A short introduction

2. Details of your experience working with a pool service company

3. A 30 to 60 second voice recording explaining why you are a good fit

4. The word **Palmway** at the top of your application





If you already know how this industry works and can operate at a high level, we want to hear from you.

title: Long Form Video Editor
description:
About Us

Pest Daily is the industry leader in professional development for Pest Control Owners and Managers. We provide a comprehensive ecosystem for growth, including the #1 e-learning platform in the industry and elite one-on-one coaching.



Our PH team is the backbone of what we do. Most of our members in the Philippines have been with us for a long time because we offer a stable, respectful, and long-term home. We aren't looking for a freelancer; we are looking for a high-performing Video Editor to join our family and grow with us as we expand from 8 to 14 people this year.



The Role

We need a video editor who is a wizard at cutting the fluff, pacing a lesson, and keeping a viewer's attention. For our team, editing means d
 what the story is — not just deleting clips. You will be taking raw coaching sessions and turning them into polished, professional long-form courses.



This is a fast-paced, high-pressure job. You will handle a high volume of footage every week with tight deadlines. We need an editor who can watch a video, understand what to trim, and fix sloppy cuts without being told every single step.



Responsibilities

High-Volume Editing: Take raw footage and edit it into tight, polished lessons for our online courses.



Editorial Judgment: You must know what to trim and what to keep to make the lesson stronger. You are responsible for cutting filler words, dead air, and repetition.



Clean Graphics: Add captions, on-screen text, and transitions that look professional and stay on-brand.



Thinking Through Requests: Sometimes a request won't be fully written out. You need to use your brain, use context, and figure out the best edit instead of waiting for instructions.



File Management: Keep all project files and folders perfectly organized so the team can find what they need quickly.



Event Support: About 10% of your time will be helping with short-form clips or video assets for our large company events.



What We’re Looking For

Experience: 2+ years editing long-form or educational video. You must have a portfolio that shows you know how to pace a story.



Tools: Proficiency in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro.



Attention to Detail: You catch long pauses and sloppy cuts and fix them yourself without being asked.



Communication: Strong English and very active on Slack. You must be clear with updates and feedback.



Mindset: You are reliable and looking for a long-term role, not just a side project.



Schedule & Expectations

Hours: This is a fixed schedule working 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM or 5:00 PM Eastern Time (ET).



Pace: This is a high-volume role with frequent tight deadlines.



Flexibility: Some long days may be required when we are pushing to launch a new major course.



Benefits

Competitive pay based on your experience.



Long-term, stable role with a team that stays together for years.



A supportive and collaborative environment with an amazing team already in the Philippines.



How to Apply

Check out our 



Send your resume and a link to your portfolio (show us your long-form work) to 
 the
 subject line: Long-Form Video Editor — [Your Years of Experience]

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About Us

Pest Daily is the industry leader in professional development for Pest Control Owners and Managers. We provide a comprehensive ecosystem for growth, including the #1 e-learning platform in the industry and elite one-on-one coaching. We are proud of our team culture—the majority of our team in the Philippines has been with us for a long time, and we are looking for a high-performing Production Designer to join our dedicated, long-term team.



The Role

This job supports our online courses, our one-on-one coaches, and their coaching clients. You will be the one creating the clean, accurate print and digital materials they need to be successful.



This is a fast-paced, high-pressure job. You will handle a high volume of work every week with frequent quick requests and tight deadlines. We need a designer who can work fast and stay accurate without needing every single step explained to them.



Responsibilities

High-Volume Production: Every week, you will create assets like PowerPoint decks, manuals, training guides, posters, door hangers, and career path materials.



Work with Many Brands: You will work with the Pest Daily brand and different client brands at the same time. You must follow their brand rules exactly and never mix them up.



Think Through Requests: Sometimes a request won't be fully written out. You need to "read between the lines," use context clues, and figure out what is needed instead of waiting for step-by-step instructions.



Keep Files Organized: You must keep all your files, versions, and folders very clean and organized so the rest of the team can find things easily.



Perfect Layouts: You must be very careful with details like margins, spacing, and alignment. Your work must be ready for professional printing and digital use.



Cross-Tool Work: You will work in Figma, PowerPoint, Google Docs, and Canva. You need to be comfortable switching between these tools as needed.



Event Support: About 10% of your time will be helping with marketing projects during big events (like social graphics and print materials).



Requirements

Multi-Brand Experience: You have experience working with several different brands at the same time.



Software Skills: You must be highly proficient in Figma, PowerPoint, Google Docs, and Canva.



Reliable Under Pressure: You can handle urgent requests and changing priorities without your quality dropping.



Great Communication: You are active on Slack and ask the right questions early to keep projects moving.



Schedule & Expectations

Hours: This is a fixed schedule working 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM or 5:00 PM Eastern Time (ET).



Pace: This role is fast-paced with frequent tight deadlines.



Flexibility: Some long days and occasional weekend work may be required during very busy times or events.



Benefits

Competitive pay based on your experience.

The chance to grow within a stable, long-term company.

A supportive and collaborative environment with a great team in the Philippines.

title: Full-Time Video Editor – Reels & Short-Form Content Specialist (2 Positions)
description:
Short-Form Video Editor (Full-Time, EST Hours)



Are you a wizard at crafting Instagram Reels and short-form video content that actually holds attention?

Do you know how to cut the fluff, pace a story, and add captions/graphics that make people stop scrolling? For our team, editing means d
 what the story is — not just deleting clips. ???? If you believe you’re a pro at that, keep reading!



Pest Daily, the #1 learning platform for the pest control industry, is hiring a short-form video editor to join our creative powerhouse team. 



What You’ll Do

Availability: Must work 8:30AM–4:00PM US Eastern Time (full-time, remote). You will be collaborating live with our US-based team during these hours.

Report to our Social Media Manager and collaborate with our US Production Team to create high-quality short-form and long-form videos/courses.

Edit raw clips into tight, polished Reels and Stories (15–60s) — cutting filler, dead air, and repetition.

Edit long form courses — cutting filler, dead air, and repetition.

Use editorial judgment: know what to trim, what to keep, and when pacing or cold opens make the story stronger. 

Add captions, graphics, sound, and transitions that are clean, readable, and on-brand.

Stay current on social media trends while keeping execution professional and consistent.

Deliver edits ready for posting — optimized for mobile-first platforms.





What We’re Looking For

Experience: 2+ years editing short-form and long-form video. Must have a portfolio of Reels/Shorts that show pacing and storytelling.

Tools: CapCut Pro, After Effects, Premiere Pro, Canva.

Detail-Oriented: You catch filler words, long pauses, and sloppy cuts — and fix them without being told.

Designer’s Eye: Strong sense of layout, typography, and color so captions and graphics look clean, professional, and engaging.

Creative Judgment: You understand how to keep attention, not just how to add effects.

Communication: Strong English (written + spoken). Clear with updates and feedback.

Mindset: Reliable, coachable, and consistent. Looking for a long-term role, not just side work.



Why Join Pest Daily?

Be part of a team revolutionizing education and content in the pest control industry.

Long-term, stable role with competitive pay and competitive PTO.

Room to grow as our team expands (8 now ? 14 this year).

Clear briefs and expectations — you know exactly what success looks like.

Your edits will be seen and shared by thousands of business owners worldwide.



How to Apply

Check out our 

Send your resume and portfolio (Reels/TikToks/Shorts) to 
 with the
 headline: “Short-Form Video Editor — [Your Years Experience]”

Tell us in your message why you’re a good fit for editing short, tight, detail-driven content.

title: Remote Project Engineer / Assistant Project Manager (Construction)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Project Engineer / Assistant Project Manager to support all aspects of construction project delivery. This is a remote role that works closely with the Project Manager and Director of Construction to ensure projects are properly planned, executed, and tracked from preconstruction through closeout.

The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, comfortable managing multiple workflows, and capable of supporting both administrative and technical components of construction projects.

________________________________________

Reporting & Coordination

• Reports directly to the Director of Construction 

• Works in close coordination with the Director to implement project strategy and priorities 

• Provides regular updates on schedule, budget, and project status 

• Prepare information and documentation to support decision-making 

• Execute tasks and workflows as directed, while proactively identifying issues and proposing solutions 

• Ensures alignment with the Director before advancing key items or decisions



Key Responsibilities

Project Planning & Scheduling

• Develop and maintain master project schedules

• Create and manage 4-week lookahead schedules and 16-week planning schedules

• Coordinate with field teams and subcontractors to update progress and adjust timelines

• Support labor planning and internal labor distribution tracking

Preconstruction & Budgeting

• Assist with project budget development 

• Perform plan and specification reviews to identify scope, risks, and coordination issues

• Support material buyout process, including takeoffs and vendor coordination

• Solicit, organize, and compare subcontractor proposals

Procurement & Subcontractor Coordination

• Prepare and track purchase orders and subcontract agreements

• Maintain procurement logs and ensure timely ordering of materials

• Assist in managing subcontractor scope and documentation

Project Financial Tracking

• Track and update project budgets and cost reports

• Assist with change order tracking and cost impact analysis

• Monitor commitments vs. actual costs

Project Administration

• Manage submittals and approvals process

• Maintain organized project documentation (drawings, RFIs, logs, etc.)

• Assist with permitting coordination and compliance requirements

Closeout & Documentation

• Compile and manage closeout documents, including:

o As-builts

o O&M manuals

o Warranties

o Final inspections and approvals

General Support

• Provide ongoing support to the Project Manager across all project phases

• Help troubleshoot scheduling, coordination, and documentation challenges

• Take on additional tasks as needed to support project execution

________________________________________

Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in construction management, Engineering, Architecture, or related field preferred

• 3-5 years minimum experience in construction project support or coordination

• Strong understanding of construction processes, scheduling, and documentation

• Experience with budgeting and cost tracking preferred

________________________________________

Skills & Competencies

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• High attention to detail and follow-through

• Proficiency in construction software and tools (e.g., Procore, MS Project, Excel, Bluebeam)

• Self-motivated and able to work effectively in a remote environment

________________________________________

Work Environment

• Fully remote position

• Must be available during standard working hours and responsive to project needs

• Occasional site visits may be required depending on project location

title: Remote Accounting and Compliance Manager - Appfolio, Quickbooks Desktop
description:
Remote Accounting & Compliance Manager

QuickBooks Desktop + AppFolio | Multi-Entity Real Estate & Operating Companies

RESONATE

You believe the books matter.



Not because someone checks them. Not because compliance requires it. But because clean financial records are the foundation of a strong company.



When you touch the books, you own them.



You don’t leave reconciliations partially finished. You don’t assume something is “probably fine.” If a decision isn’t documented, you see future problems forming — and you fix it before it becomes one.



You prefer clarity over noise. You’d rather build a system once than answer the same question twice. You don’t need constant direction, and you don’t rely on meetings to stay productive.



The owner has personally built and maintained the accounting system to this point. It works — but it has never had a dedicated steward. It now needs someone who will formalize monthly close, strengthen controls, document decisions, and quietly elevate the system.  The overall accounting system is also in need of cleaning up, which will definitely take some time.



If you take pride in turning functional systems into disciplined ones — this role will feel natural to you.

ROLE

Remote Accounting & Compliance Manager

Fixed monthly engagement preferred



You will own execution of the accounting system across multiple entities, including property companies and operating businesses. This is disciplined execution and system stewardship.



Your mission: Maintain accurate books, execute a formal monthly close, strengthen documentation, and reduce owner involvement to under one hour per week.

You are expected to identify problems, inconsistencies, or inefficiencies — not just complete tasks. 

When something is unclear, you should research, propose a solution, and document it — not simply wait for instructions. 

RESPONSIBILITIES

Monthly Close (Completed by the 10th of each month)

Reconcile all bank accounts (QuickBooks Desktop, Appfolio)

Reconcile all credit cards (Quickbooks desktop)

Reconcile AppFolio accounts (including trust accounts)

Review and reconcile payroll liability accounts

Maintain mortgage tracking spreadsheet (initially as-is)

Maintain reserve tracking spreadsheet

Maintain internal loan tracking spreadsheet

Lock prior periods after review

Maintain documented monthly close checklist

Ongoing Accounting Operations

Enter bills and transactions

Download/import bank and credit card statements

Maintain vendor records (W9s and COIs required before payment)

Track uncleared transactions

Post management fees in AppFolio

Maintain organized digital documentation

Prepare and organize year-end information for CPA

Coordinate directly with CPA when needed

Payroll & Compliance Oversight

Complete all monthly, quarterly, and annual payroll reporting and tax payments (Quickbooks desktop)

Handle Louisiana unemployment uploads and L3 annual filing

Prepare and issue 1099s (QB + AppFolio)

Monitor payroll notices

Assist with insurance audits

Track insurance renewals and related reserve balances

Assist with business license and contractor license renewals

Cash Intelligence (Operating Companies)

Provide monthly cash summary

Provide visibility into uncleared transactions

Provide simple 30-day cash forecast

Maintain credit card tracking spreadsheet (initially as-is)

Provide Profit First allocation visibility (owner handles transfers)

Administrative Tasks

Various administrative type tasks will be needed to be completed from time to time that are not accounting or bookkeeping related.  Our team works as a team, and we expect every tea
mber to assist with whatever tasks are needed, regardless of their title or role.

RESULTS

Within 30 days:

-Take over the accounting/bookkeeping related tasks that owner has been doing historically (basically the bare minimum to keep things going), and familiarize yourself with the overall systems, accounts, etc.  Set up online banking access for all accounts to ensure you can minimize owner’s involvement as much as possible for basic tasks (like downloading statements).

Within 60 days:

- Formal monthly close process in place

- Clean reconciliations

- Payroll liabilities verified monthly

- Vendor documentation organized

- Owner involvement reduced significantly



Within 90 days:

- Identify system improvements

- Recommend efficiency upgrades

- Reduce spreadsheet dependency where appropriate

- Demonstrate independent ownership of accounting workflow

DECISION-MAKING & INFORMATION GAPS

You will not always receive complete instructions.



You are expected to identify the desired outcome, research missing information directly from source systems, propose intended action using “I’m planning to…” language, distinguish between one-time exceptions and standing rules, and document recurring decisions in an Accounting Playbook.



Escalate when there is material financial, payroll, trust account, or legal risk. Operate independently within defined guardrails.

CONTROLS

View-only bank and credit card access

No transfer authority

No payment authority

Segregation of duties for bill entry, initiation, and approval

Deadline-oriented and self-managed

Depending on experience our budget for this role is $
per month.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 1a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/



CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/a

title: Influencer Marketing & Social Media Manager (IG + TikTok)
description:
About the Company



We are Net Positive, a US-based, eco-conscious clothing  brand on a mission to redefine comfort. We believe what you wear closest to your skin should be free of toxins and chemicals. We are looking for a dedicated Influencer & Social Media Manager (ideally age 20–26) who understands the "vibe" of modern wellness brands and can turn creators into long-term brand partners.



What You’ll Do



As our Influencer & Social Media Manager, you will be the face and voice of the brand to our partners and community. Your role includes:



- Influencer Research & Recruitment: Find and evaluate influencers who match our non-toxic values. You’ll look at demographics, engagement rates, and content quality to ensure a perfect fit.

- Relationship Management: Build long-term bonds with creators. You’ll be their main point of contact, answering questions and providing support throughout their campaigns.

- Campaign Planning & Execution: Create clear influencer briefs, coordinate product shipments, and manage affiliate links to ensure every launch is a success.

- Content Review & Approval: Quality control is key. You’ll review creator content to ensure it aligns with our brand goals and provide feedback/revisions when necessary.

- Performance Tracking: Monitor reach, engagement, and sales. You’ll prepare reports on which influencers are driving the most value and track affiliate payouts.

- Negotiation & Contracts: Handle the "business" side by negotiating partnership terms, managing usage rights, and ensuring everyone follows advertising disclosure rules.

- Social Media Engagement: Manage our daily presence. This includes Instagram engagement,
 group engagement, and monitoring/responding to DMs. 



What I’m Looking For

 

- Extremely Organized: You’ll be managing multiple campaigns and dozens of influencer conversations at once. Staying on top of spreadsheets and deadlines is a must.

- Great Communication Skills: Both written and verbal. You need to be persuasive when pitching influencers and clear when giving content feedback.

- Please put "Non-Toxic Living" in the title when you apply.

- Self-starter: Someone who is proactive. If you see a trending creator or a new social media feature, you bring it to me first.

- Detail-Oriented: You notice the small things—from a typo in a brief to a missed disclosure tag in an influencer's post.

- Flexible and Adaptable: Able to work in a high-paced environment where priorities can shift with new product launches.

- Positive and Enthusiastic: I want someone who is genuinely excited about clean beauty, health, and wellness.

 



Why This Role is Great for You



- Learning Opportunity: I will teach you the high-level strategy behind US e-commerce, from contract negotiation to high-level marketing analytics.

- Growth Potential: This isn't just a VA role. You are managing a core pillar of our business with a clear, guaranteed salary increase every year.

- Variety: You’ll collaborate with our marketing and PR teams, giving you a 360-degree view of how a brand grows.

- Flexible Schedule: Work when you are most productive, as long as we have our core sync hours.



Requirements



- Strong organizational and project management skills

- Excellent written and verbal English

- Experience with (or a strong desire to learn) influencer platforms and affiliate tracking

- A "digital native" who understands Instagram, TikTok, and
 Group dynamics

- Willingness to learn the technical side of non-toxic textiles and health



If this sounds like the perfect role for you, I’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume along with a voice recording introducing yourself and telling me about an influencer you think would be a great fit for a non-toxic underwear brand.



Looking forward to finding someone amazing to work with!
