title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
APPLICANTS WHO APPLY THROUGH THE LINK BELOW WILL BE SCREENED





About Us:

gigCMO is a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



Executive Assistant to the CEO



We are seeking a highly experienced Executive Assistant (EA) to provide dedicated, senior-level support to our CEO/Founder. This role is suited for candidates with extensive experience in high-pressure, fast-paced environments, especially those accustomed to working at the executive level in a corporate or professional services setting. The EA will ensure smooth operations by managing the CEO’s schedule, external communications, and high-level administrative tasks.



The ideal candidate will have a strong background in executive support, impeccable organisational skills, excellent communication abilities, and experience in managing high-level relationships both internally and externally. Professionalism, discretion, and proactive problem-solving are essential qualities for this role.



Key Responsibilities:



Executive Administrative Support:

Manage the CEO’s complex schedule with precision, including high-stakes meetings, international travel, and detailed itineraries.

Act as the primary gatekeeper for the CEO, handling all forms of communication, including
s, phone calls, and meeting requests.

Organise and prepare meeting agendas, documents, and reports for both internal and external meetings.

Handle confidential and time-sensitive information with the utmost discretion.

Draft and proofread professional communications on behalf of the CEO, ensuring clarity, accuracy, and appropriate tone.

External Stakeholder Management:

Serve as the first point of contact for external parties, representing the CEO in interactions with high-level stakeholders, including clients, partners, and board members.

Maintain and nurture professional relationships on behalf of the CEO, ensuring timely follow-up and proactive communication.

Project Coordination & Task Management:

Collaborate with the CEO on strategic initiatives, ensuring timely execution of tasks and deliverables.

Assist in managing ongoing projects by coordinating with internal teams and tracking progress.

Oversee special assignments that require high attention to detail and organisational oversight.

Document & Data Management:

Ensure the organisation of key documents and maintain efficient filing systems (both digital and physical), leveraging Microsoft SharePoint for data integrity and accessibility.

Prepare polished presentations, reports, and briefing materials for the CEO’s meetings with key stakeholders.

High-Level Communication and Meeting Coordination:

Manage and prioritise the CEO’s communications with high-profile contacts.

Coordinate video and phone conferences using platforms such as Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Google Meets or other online applications.

Ensure that follow-up actions fro
etings are captured and appropriately addressed.

Financial Oversight:

Manage basic financial administrative tasks, such as expense tracking, budget reconciliation, and vendor payments.

(Optional) QuickBooks proficiency is an advantage for light bookkeeping tasks.



Qualifications and Skills:

At least 6 years of experience as an Executive Assistant supporting C-suite executives, preferably in a corporate or professional services environment.

Exceptional organisational and time-management skills, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritise effectively.

Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills, with a professional and composed demeanour in dealing with high-level external contacts.

Mastery of Microsoft Office (especially advanced Word, Excel, PowerPoint), and familiarity with SharePoint for document management.

Proven ability to handle confidential information with absolute discretion.

Highly detail-oriented, proactive, and capable of working independently with minimal supervision.

Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to anticipate needs and act decisively.



Preferred Attributes:

Previous experience in a corporate secretary or similar role, providing support to high-level executives or board members.

Familiarity with UK and international business practices, including working across time zones and managing global relationships.

Flexible availability to accommodate business demands that may occasionally extend beyond standard working hours.



Compensation: Php 30,000 to Php 50,000 (depending on whether the applicant meets 100% of the requirements)



Application Requirements: This role demands a full-time commitment and is not compatible with another full-time job.

To be considered, kindly fill out the form using this link: 
/eatotheceo

****Only successful candidates will be contacted for interviews.*****



Note: This role requires exclusive dedication and cannot be combined with another full-time job. Only submissions meeting the specified requirements and demonstrating the ability to follow instructions will be considered. If you're prepared to surpass our expectations and contribute to our vibrant team, we eagerly anticipate receiving your application.

title: YouTube Video Editor (B-Roll and Stock Footage Specialist)
description:
My name is Niko, and we’re building and scaling a network of YouTube channels across multiple high-growth niches. We’re now looking for a full-time, highly skilled video editor who specializes in B-roll and stock footage to take ownership of one of our channels. 



This is not a basic editing role. We need a visual storyteller who understands YouTube content deeply—pacing, retention, and how to turn scripts and voiceovers into engaging, high-performing videos using premium stock footage and B-roll.



Important: Please DO NOT apply if you do not have strong experience in this specific style of editing. Please also make sure the links in your portfolio are working so I can see relevant examples of what we are looking for.



heres an example of the channel you will be working on: 



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



-Sourcing high-quality B-roll and stock footage to match voiceovers and scripts perfectly.

-Creating highly engaging, story-driven videos with strong pacing, visual hooks, and seamless transitions.

-Designing high-converting thumbnails for each video (thumbnail experience is a MUST).

-Ensuring all content meets a high standard of viewer engagement and retention.



Position Details & Expected Output:

- Monday to Saturday

-Flexible hours: Work when you want, as long as deadlines are consistently met.

-Expected output: 1 full video per day.(videos are usually 30-40 minutes long very simple editing) 



Salary: $375 USD per month paid on the last Friday of the month.

Bonuses: Performance-based incentives, e.g., for each video that achieves 100k views or more, you will be paid a bonus. 



Growth: Long-term role with the opportunity for pay increases as we scale our channels.



Requirements (Important):



-Proven experience editing for YouTube automation / faceless channels using purely stock footage and B-roll.

-Strong understanding of viewer retention, visual hooks, and editing pacing.

-Ability to handle a consistent workload (1 video daily) and fast turnarounds.

-Strong attention to detail.

-Reliable, consistent, and able to work independently.



Ideal Candidate:

-Thinks like a content creator, not just an editor.

-Can spot weak or boring sections of a video and improve them visually without being told.

-Knows how to evoke emotion and maintain attention using stock media, text-on-screen, and sound design.



How to Apply:

Please include the following in your application:



-Start your application with your favorite animal.

-2–3 examples of your best work (stock footage/B-roll faceless videos preferred). You must be experienced; please do not apply if you do not have a solid portfolio.

-Your experience working with YouTube automation.

-Your availability and current workload.

title: Media Buyer (PPC Specialist)
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 35,000 – 70,000 per month

Employment Type: Full-time or Part-time

Required Experience: 3-5 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google Ads and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



Our team works remotely and focuses on performance, accountability, and results. We are now looking for a seasoned Media Buyer (PPC Specialist) who can take ownership of campaigns and drive measurable growth.



What You'll Do



As a Media Buyer (PPC Specialist), you will be responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



Your responsibilities include:

• Managing and scaling campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Developing campaign strategies focused on lead generation and ROI

• Conducting advanced keyword research, audience targeting, and funnel optimization

• Writing and testing high-converting ad copy and creatives

• Monitoring and optimizing performance based on CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and conversion rates

• Implementing and troubleshooting tracking using Google Tag Manager

• Identifying scaling opportunities and improving lead quality

• Analyzing data and presenting insights and recommendations

• Collaborating with the team on creatives, landing pages, and campaign strategy



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for a high-performing PPC specialist who is confident in managing and scaling campaigns.



You should have:

• 3–5 years of proven experience in media buying / PPC

• Strong expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Google Ads (AdWords) Certification

• Deep understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and optimization

• Strong knowledge of conversion tracking, attribution, and analytics

• Experience optimizing for lead quality, not just volume

• Ability to confidently manage budgets and scale campaigns

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of campaigns

• Willing to train juniors who will be part of the team in the future



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



You are someone who:

• Has 3–5 years of hands-on experience and is confident in your skills

• Is a mid to senior-level media buyer

• Thinks strategically and executes with precision

• Is highly accountable and results-oriented

• Can diagnose and solve campaign performance issues independently

• Communicates clearly and works well in a remote team

• Is proactive, detail-oriented, and performance-driven

• Can provide at least 2 reference checks from former managers or clients

• Handled local service campaigns (plumbing, home services, etc.) — experience in this vertical is a strong plus



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital?



• Fully remote work setup

• Flexible (Part-time or Full-time opportunities available)

• Competitive monthly salary aligned with experience

• Opportunity to manage and scale high-impact campaigns

• Work with a performance-driven and fast-growing team

• Continuous learning and growth in digital marketing



If you are a confident, experienced PPC specialist ready to take ownership of campaigns and drive real results.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Social Media Strategist & Digital Designer
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a Social Media Marketer who pairs a deep understanding of social psychology with high-level Graphic Design and AI-driven workflows. This role is specifically focused on dominating
 and Instagram—moving beyond "posting content" to strategically engineering engagement.

You should be an expert in the distinct cultures of Meta’s platforms, knowing exactly how a design should differ between a high-intent
 Group post and a high-aesthetic Instagram Carousel.



Key Responsibilities

1. Platform-Specific Strategy

• Meta Mastery: Execute growth strategies tailored specifically to
 and Instagram algorithms to maximize organic reach and engagement.

• Strategic Planning: Develop content pillars that align with the audience behaviors of each platform (e.g., community building on FB, visual storytelling on IG).

• AI Implementation: Use Generative AI tools (like Gemini, and ChatGPT) to brainstorm campaign concepts, generate unique imagery, and optimize copywriting at scale.

2. Graphic Design & Visual Assets

• High-End Design: Create thumb-stopping static assets, including infographics, branded carousels, and promotional graphics using Canva or  Adobe Photoshop.

• AI-Assisted Design: Leverage AI to enhance photos, expand backgrounds, and generate custom textures or elements that set our brand apart from stock imagery.

• Layout & Typography: Ensure every post maintains a premium feel with professional-grade layout, color theory, and typographic hierarchy.

3. Marketing & Community Dynamics

• Audience Psychology: Craft captions and visuals based on what triggers shares, saves, and comments.

• Conversion Focus: Understand the "Customer Journey", using social media to move followers from the feed to our website or lead forms.

• Competitive Analysis: Monitor shifts in Meta’s ecosystem (new features, interface changes) to keep our brand ahead of the curve.

Job Title: Social Media Strategist & Digital Designer (FB + IG Focus)



Position Overview

We are seeking a Social Media Marketer who pairs a deep understanding of social psychology with high-level Graphic Design and AI-driven workflows. This role is specifically focused on dominating
 and Instagram, moving beyond "posting content" to strategically engineering engagement.

You should be an expert in the distinct cultures of Meta’s platforms, knowing exactly how a design should differ between a high-intent
 Group post and a high-aesthetic Instagram Carousel.



Key Responsibilities

1. Platform-Specific Strategy

• Meta Mastery: Execute growth strategies tailored specifically to
 and Instagram algorithms to maximize organic reach and engagement.

• Strategic Planning: Develop content pillars that align with the audience behaviors of each platform (e.g., community building on FB, visual storytelling on IG).

• AI Implementation: Use Generative AI tools (like Gemini, Midjourney, or Adobe Firefly) to brainstorm campaign concepts, generate unique imagery, and optimize copywriting at scale.

2. Graphic Design & Visual Assets

• High-End Design: Create thumb-stopping static assets, including infographics, branded carousels, and promotional graphics using Adobe Photoshop.

• AI-Assisted Design: Leverage AI to enhance photos, expand backgrounds, and generate custom textures or elements that set our brand apart from stock imagery.

• Layout & Typography: Ensure every post maintains a premium feel with professional-grade layout, color theory, and typographic hierarchy.

3. Marketing & Community Dynamics

• Audience Psychology: Craft captions and visuals based on what triggers shares, saves, and comments.

• Conversion Focus: Understand the "Customer Journey", using social media to move followers from the feed to our website or lead forms.

• Competitive Analysis: Monitor shifts in Meta’s ecosystem (new features, interface changes) to keep our brand ahead of the curve.



Required Experience

• 2+ Years of dedicated social media marketing experience for brands or agencies.

• Design Portfolio: Must demonstrate a clean, modern aesthetic with a focus on static social media assets (Carousels, Feed Posts, Ads).

• Strategic Thinking: Ability to explain the why behind a design choice based on marketing data, not just "because it looks good."





Ideal Candidate Profile

You are a "Creative Scientist." You love the art of a perfectly designed Photoshop layout, but you are equally obsessed with the data of why one post outperformed another. You don't fear AI; you use it to produce a week's worth of high-quality content in a fraction of the time.

title: Senior Java Developer (E-commerce)
description:
Summary:

We are seeking an accomplished Senior Java Developer to drive the development and optimization of our e-commerce platform. The ideal candidate will bring extensive experience in Java, microservices architecture, and performance tuning, along with the leadership skills to mentor a growing development team and steer complex projects to success.



Key Responsibilities

Application Design & Development



Architect, design, and develop high-performance, scalable Java-based e-commerce applications.

Implement microservices and event-driven architectures to ensure modular and resilient systems.

Performance Optimization & Scalability



Monitor, analyze, and optimize system performance, memory usage, and throughput.

Troubleshoot concurrency, threading, and performance bottlenecks using advanced profiling tools and techniques.

Technical Leadership



Mentor junior and mid-level developers, setting best practices in coding, testing, and deployment.

Drive architectural decisions and technology choices aligned with business needs and industry standards.

System Integration



Integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and services to enhance platform capabilities.

Implement caching solutions (e.g., Redis, Memcached) and messaging systems (e.g., RabbitMQ, Kafka) for efficient data handling.'



Quality Assurance & Testing



Champion test-driven development (TDD) and continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD).

Write and maintain robust unit, integration, and end-to-end tests using frameworks such as JUnit, TestNG, and Mockito.

DevOps & Deployment



Collaborate with DevOps teams to automate builds, deployments, and monitoring (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI, Docker, Kubernetes).

Ensure high availability, fault tolerance, and seamless scalability in production environments.

Security & Compliance



Enforce secure coding practices, including data encryption, OAuth/JWT-based authentication, and compliance with PCI-DSS/GDPR where applicable.

Continuously monitor and mitigate security vulnerabilities and threats.

Documentation & Collaboration



Produce clear, comprehensive technical documentation and architectural diagrams.

Work cross-functionally with product managers, QA, UX designers, and other engineers to deliver robust solutions within agile sprints.



Continuous Improvement



Stay current with emerging trends, tools, and technologies to evolve and enhance our software development lifecycle.

Propose and implement improvements to optimize code quality, productivity, and operational efficiency.



Note: Please send a link to your updated CV, no uploaded CV will not be entertained.



Qualifications:



5+ years of professional Java development experience, ideally on large-scale e-commerce or SaaS platforms.

Demonstrated success in building and deploying microservices, distributed systems, and event-driven architectures.

Technical Expertise



Java Proficiency: Strong command of Java 8+ features (Streams, Lambdas), concurrency, memory management, and JVM internals.

Frameworks & Libraries: Advanced experience with Spring Boot, Spring Data, Spring Security, Hibernate/JPA.

API & Integrations: Experience creating RESTful APIs, integrating third-party services, and working with GraphQL (preferred).

Database Systems: Hands-on experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB; adept at writing complex queries and optimizing database performance.

Messaging & Caching: Practical knowledge of message brokers (RabbitMQ, Kafka) and caching systems (Redis, Memcached).

Build & CI/CD: Proficiency in Maven/Gradle, Git, Jenkins/GitLab CI, Docker, and Kubernetes for seamless development and deployment.

Testing: Expertise in TDD, unit testing, integration testing, and test automation frameworks like JUnit, TestNG, and Mockito.

Performance Monitoring & Profiling: Familiarity with tools like VisualVM, YourKit, or New Relic for troubleshooting and tuning.

Soft Skills



Leadership: Demonstrated ability to mentor developers and influence technical direction.

Collaboration: Excellent communication skills, capable of working effectively with product owners, designers, and cross-functional teams.

Adaptability: Thrives in a fast-paced, agile environment, reacting quickly to changing requirements.

Problem-Solving: Proven analytical mindset and a pragmatic approach to solving complex challenges.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: CAD Operator - Furniture design
description:
We're a design-led home furnishings company seeking an experienced CAD operator to create detailed technical drawings for our custom furniture line. This is a SHORT-TERM PROJECT (approximately 20-25 hours total) with potential for ongoing work if the partnership goes well. You must be available 10:30am - 1pm East Coast USA hours should we need to discuss revisions. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Create detailed CAD technical drawings for furniture pieces (sofas, chairs, ottomans)

Convert design sketches and specifications into production-ready technical drawings

Include dimensions, joinery details, fabric placement, and construction notes

Provide multiple views (front, side, top, sectional) for each piece

Deliver drawings in formats suitable for manufacturers (DWG/DXF or as specified)

Make revisions based on feedback 



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Required:

Proven experience creating furniture technical drawings (please share portfolio)

Proficiency in AutoCAD or similar CAD software

Understanding of furniture construction methods and joinery

Experience with upholstered furniture specifications

Ability to work from sketches, photos, or verbal descriptions

Strong attention to detail and accuracy with measurements

Good communication in English (written)

Include the word "Vision" in your application

Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines

Be contactable during East Coast USA hours 10:30am-1pm. 



Preferred:

Experience working with custom furniture makers or interior designers

Familiarity with fabric and upholstery specifications

Knowledge of standard furniture industry dimensions and ergonomics

Previous work with international clients



PROJECT DETAILS

Timeline: 2 weeks from start date

Hours: Approximately 20-25 hours total (flexible schedule, but consistent communication required during East Coast USA hours)

Rate: $6 USD per hour 

Payment: Weekly paid via WISE (please ensure you have a WISE account in your name otherwise we will not be able to pay you)



HOW TO APPLY

Please submit:

- Your resume/CV

- Portfolio link showing at least 3 examples of furniture technical drawings you've created (required)

- Brief description (3-4 sentences) of your furniture CAD experience

- Your availability to start and complete the project

- Answer this question: "What CAD software do you primarily use, and what file formats can you deliver?"



APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A PORTFOLIO WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.

title: YouTube Video Editor + Social Media Scheduler (Premiere Pro — Multicam Podcast & Reaction Content)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a long-term video editor who will also manage the posting and scheduling of finished content across YouTube and social media. The content focuses on dating and relationship discussions recorded in a multicamera studio setup, plus promotional content for a nightlife lounge brand.



This is a hybrid role. The editor we hire will own both the edit AND the publishing workflow. If you only want to edit and hand files off, this role is not the right fit.



Software Required

- Adobe Premiere Pro (required)

- CapCut (required for short-form clips)

- Opus Clips (required — used for short-form clip generation and our content calendar)

- Social media scheduler — Later preferred; Metricool, Buffer, or Hootsuite acceptable

- Strong understanding of YouTube pacing, watch time, and retention



Required Editing Techniques (Non-Negotiable)

You must be confident executing all of the following to keep viewers watching:

- Jump cuts — to remove silence, filler, and kill dead space

- Zoom-ins — for emphasis on reactions and key moments

- Ken Burns effect — on static images, memes, and screenshots so nothing sits flat

- Crosstalk management — when multiple panelists are talking at the same time, you know which speaker to prioritize on camera and how to cut cleanly between them without losing the energy of the moment

- Reaction-style pacing — tight, fast, and built around retention, not just stitching the conversation together



If these techniques are not already part of your editing vocabulary, this is not the role for you. We will not train basic editing fundamentals.



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

- Previous experience editing for YouTube

- Previous experience editing YouTube reaction videos

- Previous experience editing panel episodes with multiple speakers talking at the same time



Applications without demonstrated experience in all three will not be considered.



Main Responsibilities



Editing:

- Edit multicam podcast episodes (3 camera angles)

- Sync audio and organize timelines

- Cut between speakers during discussions, including managing crosstalk

- Remove dead space, filler words, and long pauses

- Apply jump cuts, zoom-ins, and Ken Burns consistently to maintain watch time

- Insert meme clips, reaction clips, and B-roll

- Create short-form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and
/X

- Export final videos optimized for YouTube and each social platform



Scheduling & Posting:

- Keep the Opus Clips content calendar updated one month ahead at all times

- Schedule finished clips across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
, and
/X using the assigned scheduler

- Write platform-specific captions that match the brand voice guide provided

- Upload finalized long-form YouTube videos when requested

- Send a short weekly report showing what was posted, what is scheduled, and what is still in queue



Content Style

Our editing style is similar to:

- Podcast panel discussions

- YouTube reaction channels

- Fast-paced conversational editing



Examples include:

- Jump cuts to remove silence

- Zoom-ins for emphasis

- Ken Burns on static images and memes

- Meme inserts for humor

- Text overlays and captions for emphasis on key moments



Requirements

- Strong English communication (written and spoken)

- Reliable internet connection for downloading and uploading large video files

- Ability to follow written instructions exactly as given

- Ability to work long-term with one creator

- Experience managing or scheduling social media accounts (preferred)



Please Include in Your Application

- Links to YouTube videos you personally edited (reaction or panel content preferred)

- Links to 2 short-form clips (Reels, Shorts, or TikToks) you personally cut

- A screenshot of a Premiere Pro timeline from a project you edited

- Your typical editing workflow

- Scheduling tools you have used and which social platforms you have managed

- How many clients you are currently editing or posting for

- A short answer to this question: If I asked you to schedule one month of content ahead, but you had time to schedule more, what would you do?



Applications missing any of the items above will not be reviewed.



Interview Process

Selected applicants will have a short video interview where they will be asked to screen share a previous editing project and walk through how they schedule and post content. A short paid test edit and test scheduling task will be provided.



Note: This is a results-based role. Editors who cannot consistently deliver jump cuts, zooms, Ken Burns, and clean crosstalk management at the standard outlined above will not continue past the trial period. We hire slow and replace fast.



Position Details

- Remote position

- 30 hours per week

- Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

- Flexible hours with occasional overlap for communication

- Looking for someone reliable who wants to grow with a YouTube channel and nightlife media brand long-term



Wage/Salary: $400–$500/month (20k–28k PHP) — with room to grow based on performance and scope

title: SHOPIFY CX & CONVERSION SPECIALIST
description:
SHOPIFY CX & CONVERSION SPECIALIST

Lily Charmed  |  Remote — Philippines  |  Project-Based with Long-Term Potential



Job Title Shopify CX & Conversion Specialist

Primary Brand Lily Charmed (
) — with potential to expand to 3 further Shopify plus websites



Contract Type Project-based (Phase 1),  20 hours per week - with long-term retainer for the right candidate



Estimated Hours Flexible — scoped per project phase; ongoing retainer approx. 10–15 hrs/week



Rate         Project quote for Phase 1; ongoing retainer rate agreed separately

Reports To Founder and marketing team

Start          As soon as possible



THE OPPORTUNITY



Lily Charmed is a premium UK charm jewellery brand;  recycled sterling silver, tarnish-resistant, Pandora-compatible, and beautifully designed. Our products represent the people, places, and passions our customers care about most. The jewellery is premium. The online experience is not keeping pace with that.



We are looking to focus on expansion and improvement for the site – through uplift in conversion rate, ease of navigation  - menu and customer journey  - making it as easy as possible for a customer to find their reason to buy- e.g. specific customer segmentation journeys.



We are looking for a specialist who starts with the customer  -  who they are, what they want, and why they buy  -  and uses that understanding to redesign the experience from the ground up. This is a conversion and customer experience project first. The Shopify is the vehicle for delivering it.



The goal is to make Lily Charmed the most premium charm jewellery shopping experience available online. Conversion rate improvement is the primary measure of success.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



below sets out the key challenges and the outcomes we expect this engagement to deliver.



Conversion Rate CVR has dropped. Customers are visiting but not buying. Measurable CVR improvement within 60 days of new site launch. 



Average Order Value Customers typically buying single items or low-value combinations. Clear upsell, bundle, and cross-sell pathways that increase AOV.



Customer Journey Navigation is unclear. Customers are not finding what they need. Intuitive, mobile-first navigation with a logical path from discovery to checkout.



Brand Premium Feel The site does not reflect the quality and positioning of the product. A site that feels as premium as the jewellery itself, across all devices.



Customer Understanding Limited clarity on who our key segments are and what drives them to buy. Defined customer segments with a site experience built around their motivations.



ABOUT LILY CHARMED



Lily Charmed sells charm jewellery that tells a story. Every charm represents something that matters to the person wearing it — a place visited, a person loved, a passion pursued. Our products are made from recycled sterling silver, rhodium-plated to be tarnish-resistant, and compatible with Pandora-style bracelets.

We sell DTC through our Shopify store (
) and through Etsy, Amazon, Wolf & Badger, and Not on the High Street. Our customer is a thoughtful gift-buyer or a charm collector who adds to her collection deliberately and meaningfully.

Our Customer Segments

Understanding these segments — and designing the site experience around them — is at the heart of this project. We have identified three primary groups:



The Gift Buyer Shopping for someone else — a birthday, anniversary, graduation, or milestone. Wants to find something meaningful quickly. Price-conscious but willing to spend more for the right gift. Needs confidence in quality and delivery. Likely on mobile.



The Charm Collector Buying for herself and adding to an existing collection. Knows what she wants, browses by theme or character. Higher repeat purchase rate. Values compatibility, range breadth, and new arrivals. Engaged and loyal.



The Charm Explorer Has found us through search, social, or a recommendation. Not yet familiar with the brand or the concept. Needs to understand quickly what we are, why we are different, and why the product is worth the price.



THE ROLE



We are looking for a Shopify CX & Conversion Specialist, with best practice SEO site architecture focus. You lead with customer understanding and use it to drive site design and performance decisions. This is not primarily a development brief. It is a customer experience brief that requires Shopify expertise to execute.



You will begin by auditing the current Lily Charmed site - using data, heatmaps, session recordings, and customer journey analysis (tools will be provided) to identify exactly where customers are dropping off and why. You will then design and build a new site experience, using and adapting a premium Shopify theme, that addresses those gaps and reflects the quality of the brand.



The founder is not technical. You are the expert in this relationship. We expect you to lead the recommendations, explain decisions in plain English, and deliver outcomes we can measure. build.



ENGAGEMENT STRUCTURE



This engagement begins with a defined project on 
. 

If the relationship works and results are delivered, there is significant further scope across our other three websites. We are looking for a long-term partner, not a one-off contractor.





Phase 1



Audit & Build Full customer journey audit of the current site using provided analytics and UX tools. Deep understanding of our three customer segments and what each needs from the site. Identify conversion blockers, navigation failures, and AOV opportunities. 

Recommend a premium Shopify theme and design approach. Once approved to manage and implement the new theme/build and launch the new site with full templates for product pages, collection pages, and blog. 

Mobile-first throughout. 

Work with E-commerce & SEO Manager on content and product page structure. 

Live new Lily Charmed site. Defined CVR baseline and improvement target. 

AOV strategy implemented. Full template set delivered. Handover documentation for internal team.



Phase 2

Ongoing



Monthly retainer covering performance monitoring, ongoing CRO improvements, conversion testing, and design updates. Begin scoping work on our second website (Scream Pretty). 

Continued collaboration with E-commerce & SEO Manager. 

Monthly performance report. 

Agreed monthly deliverables. CVR and AOV tracked against Phase 1 baseline.



Phase 3

Full Scope - TBC Expand to all four websites: Lily Charmed, Scream Pretty, and two further sites. 

Apply the same customer-led audit and build process to each brand. 

All four sites performing to target. Consistent premium experience across the full brand portfolio.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Customer Understanding & Journey Analysis



•  Use analytics tools, heatmaps, and session recordings to understand how customers currently move through the Lily Charmed site and where they leave.

•  Identify best practice customer journey for how our three customer segments (Gift Buyer, Charm Collector, New Discoverer) behave on the site and what each segment needs to convert and remove barriers

•  Map the full customer buying journey from landing to checkout and identify every point of friction.

•  Translate findings into a clear, plain-English audit report with prioritised recommendations.

Conversion Rate Optimisation

•  Make data-backed recommendations for improving the conversion rate across the site — homepage, navigation, collection pages, product pages, cart, and checkout.

•  Design and implement a clear, mobile-first navigation structure and menu that makes it easy for all three customer segments to find what they are looking for.

•  Identify and reduce friction at every stage of the buying journey.

•  Test, measure, and report on the results once changes are implemented

Average Order Value Strategy

•  Identify and implement opportunities to increase what customers spend when they visit — including complementary product suggestions, charm bundle mechanics, gifting options, and natural upsell pathways.

•  Recommend and configure the right Shopify apps to support AOV improvement (bundles, upsells, cross-sells, gift wrapping, personalisation).

•  Ensure AOV mechanics feel natural and premium — not pushy or discount-led.

Premium Shopify Plus Theme Build & Templates

•  Recommend the most appropriate premium Shopify theme for a brand at our positioning and price point, with clear rationale.

•  Design and build the new Lily Charmed site to the highest standard - mobile-first, fast-loading, and visually premium across all devices.

•  Create a full set of reusable templates for: product pages, collection pages, and blog posts — so the internal team can manage and add content independently.

•  Ensure the site navigation and menu structure is intuitive for all three customer segments, with a clear path from entry point to purchase.

•  Work with the E-commerce & SEO Manager throughout the build to ensure product content, collections, and blog pages are set up correctly.

•  Deliver a site that makes Lily Charmed look and feel like the most premium charm jewellery brand available online.

Reporting & Communication

•  Provide a clear audit report before work begins: what is happening now, why, and what you recommend.

•  Report on progress and outcomes throughout the build in plain, non-technical language.

•  Deliver a post-launch performance report at 30 and 60 days with CVR and AOV data.

•  Be proactive — bring recommendations rather than waiting to be asked.

•  Available for weekly check-in with the founder; async-first working style.



WHAT YOU NEED — ESSENTIAL



Experience



•  Proven experience improving conversion rates on Shopify stores — you must be able to show what you changed and what the measurable result was.

•  Experience working on premium or lifestyle DTC brands where the brand feel and buying experience are as important as the technical setup.

•  Demonstrated ability to understand and design for different customer segments — not just aesthetics.

•  Experience leading a Shopify theme build or significant site redesign from brief to launch.

•  Comfortable working directly with a brand founder — translating strategy into decisions and decisions into outcomes.

•  Strong portfolio of Shopify work, specifically on mobile-first, premium DTC stores.



Skills & Approach

•  Able to read customer behaviour data and heatmaps and turn them into clear, actionable recommendations.

•  Strong eye for premium brand design — you understand what a high-end buying experience looks and feels like.

•  Designs for mobile first in every decision.

•  Understands how navigation, layout, and page structure affect whether customers buy.

•  Knows how to select, configure, and manage Shopify apps without bloating or slowing the store.

•  Communicates clearly and confidently without jargon  -  the client is not technical.

•  Works independently and proactively; brings solutions rather than waiting for direction.



Nice to Have

•  Experience with jewellery, accessories, gift, or lifestyle e-commerce.

•  Knowledge of AOV improvement mechanics: bundles, upsells, gifting, personalisation.

•  Familiarity with Shopify Markets for international pricing and selling.

•  Understanding of SEO as it applies to Shopify; site structure, page speed, and product page optimisation.

•  Experience with A/B or split testing on Shopify.



WHAT WE OFFER



•  A clearly scoped Phase 1 project with defined deliverables and agreed milestones.

•  Access to real customer data, analytics, heatmaps, and session recordings from day one.

•  A genuine long-term opportunity - four websites, two growing brands, 

•  A founder who is invested in this and will give clear briefs, fast decisions, and honest feedback.

•  Freedom to lead the recommendations - we trust the expert.

•  Remote and async-first working with full briefings and support with an ongoing weekly check-in.

•  A brand and product worth being proud of.



HOW TO APPLY



•  Your CV or professional profile.

•  Portfolio — include at least 2 Shopify projects where you improved conversion rate or customer experience. For each: your specific role, what you identified as the problem, what you changed, and the result. We cannot consider applications without this.

•  Visit 
 before applying -  on your mobile if possible. Send us your top 3 observations about the current customer experience and what you would prioritise changing first, and why. Keep each to one short paragraph. This is the most important part of your application.

•  Your proposed approach and quote for Phase 1 - the audit and new site build. Include your recommended timeline and any questions you would need answered before scoping.

•  Your preferred ongoing retainer rate for Phase 2.

•  Your availability to start.

We are not looking for the most technically qualified applicant. We are looking for someone who visits our site as a customer would, sees what is stopping people from buying, and can tell us clearly and confidently what they would do about it. Your three observations will tell us more than your CV.



Lily Charmed  |  Remote Recruitment  |  April 2026

title: Video Editor & Social Media Content Specialist
description:
We are looking for a talented Video Editor & Social Media Content Specialist to join our growing 

team. In this role, you will take long-form video content and transform it into high-impact short

form clips, trailers, and social media assets optimized for platforms including Instagram, TikTok, 

YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, and X.



This is a full-time, long-term opportunity supporting U.S.-based mission-driven organizations. 

We are looking for someone with a strong creative eye, technical editing skills, and a pulse on 

what performs well on social media.



Key Responsibilities



• Edit long-form videos (interviews, podcasts, keynotes, webinars) into engaging short

form clips for social media

• Create trailers, teasers, and highlight reels for marketing campaigns and events

• Design platform-specific content optimized for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube 

Shorts, LinkedIn, and X• Color correct, audio balance, and ensure consistent branding across all content

• Collaborate with social media and marketing teams on content calendars and campaign 

needs

• Stay current on social media trends, formats, and platform algorithm updates

• Organize and maintain a library of raw footage, clips, and finished assets

• Deliver content on tight turnarounds while maintaining high quality standards



Required Skills & Experience



• 2+ years of professional video editing experience, ideally for social media or digital 

marketing

• Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro

• Experience with CapCut, Descript, or similar short-form editing tools

• Strong eye for pacing, storytelling, and visual hierarchy in short-form content

• Working knowledge of Adobe After Effects or similar motion graphics software

• Familiarity with current social media trends and best practices across platforms

• Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a computer capable of handling video 

editing



Preferred Qualifications



• Experience creating content for nonprofit, social impact, or mission-driven organizations

• Familiarity with tools like Canva, Figma, or similar graphic design platforms

• Experience with podcast video editing

• Understanding of copyright and fair use in content creation

• Comfort using AI tools to speed up editing workflows (auto-captions, transcripts, cuts)



What We’re Looking For



• A storyteller who knows how to hook an audience in the first 3 seconds

• Someone who thinks proactively about what will perform, not just what is assigned

• Strong attention to detail, especially on captions, timing, and branding

• A team player who can take feedback, iterate, and deliver consistently

• Someone who is excited about mission-driven work and long-term growth opportunities



How to Apply



Please include the following with your application:

• Updated resume

• Portfolio or reel showcasing your best short-form edits (links to Vimeo, YouTube, or 

Google Drive preferred)

• Brief note about what kinds of projects excite you most

• Add captions, subtitles, motion graphics, animations, and on-screen text

description:
Full-Time SEO, Digital Marketing & Social Media Manager

Job Title: Full-Time SEO, Digital Marketing & Social Media Manager

Work Type: Remote — Long-Term, Hourly

Schedule: 40 hours per week

About the Role



We are hiring a full-time digital marketing expert to manage SEO, brand visibility, and all social media content across all of our companies. This is a long-term position for someone reliable, creative, and skilled—not a freelance or project-based job.

You will be responsible for ongoing content and marketing for the following brands:

Brands You Will Manage

US Cabinets Store

US Cabinets and Design

Heritage Craft Cabinetry

Shaker Cabinet Store

TKD Excellence

Tomahawk Bats

New Baseball Equipment Website (coming soon)

JobFlow365 CRM (our software brand)

Responsibilities

Manage, grow, and post daily on multiple social media platforms for all brands.

Create content calendars for each business (posts, reels, stories, shorts).

Write captions, hashtags, and create SEO-friendly descriptions.

Perform full on-page SEO: blog optimization, meta tags, keyword updates.

Research hashtags and competitor trends for each industry.

Grow engagement, followers, and brand presence across all businesses.

Provide weekly performance reports.

Requirements

Expert-level SEO, digital marketing, and social media content creation.

Strong English writing skills.

Graphic and video creation experience (Canva, CapCut, etc.).

Ability to plan and manage content for multiple brands at once.

Long-term, reliable, and committed to stable full-time work.

Preferred

Experience with
 Groups, YouTube Shorts, Pinterest, and basic ads.

To Apply



Send your resume, examples of pages you manage, sample graphics/videos, your hourly rate, and your availability.

title: Website Development and Social Media Manager

title: Virtual – Kitchen & Bath Designer / Sales Representative
description:
Job Title: Virtual Kitchen & Bath Designer / Sales Representative (VA)

Location: Remote (Overseas Candidates Welcome)

Job Type: Full-time, Contract (Hourly with Bonus Opportunities)



About Us



We are a U.S.-based kitchen and bath company offering cabinets, countertops, flooring, backsplash, hardware, appliances, and installation services. Our business is growing quickly, and we are building a strong international team of skilled designers and sales reps.



Role Overview



As a Virtual Kitchen & Bath Designer / Sales Rep, you will work directly with customers to design and sell kitchen and bath projects. You will be responsible for handling the entire process — from initial consultation to design, product selection, proposal creation, and closing the sale. This role requires excellent communication, design skills, and sales ability.



Ideal Qualifications



ProKitchen or 2020 design software experience (preferred, training available)



Excellent English communication skills (verbal & written)



Strong sales ability and customer service skills



Experience in cabinets, countertops, or interior design (preferred)



Highly motivated, organized, and tech savvy



Responsibilities



Meet with clients virtually to discuss their kitchen and bath needs



Create professional designs using ProKitchen or 2020 software



Guide customers through selecting cabinets, countertops, and other products



Prepare and present proposals to clients



Close sales and coordinate with the U.S. team for order processing



Maintain detailed records of designs, quotes, and client communication



Compensation & Benefits



Hourly pay (based on experience)



Performance-based bonuses



Ongoing training and professional development



Opportunity for long-term career growth with a U.S.-based company



Schedule



Full-time availability required



Must overlap with U.S. Eastern Standard Time business hours



To Apply: Submit your resume and a short introduction explaining your design and sales experience.

title: Electrical Engineeer / Computer Scientist
description:
We are looking for someone who

- is extremely smart

- has recently (with the last three years) graduated with a Bachelor or Master degree in electrical engineering or computer science, with top grades which put him at the top 10% of his class

- has a very good command of the English language and is willing to spend time reading and writing English texts with technical content

- has an interest in learning about patents



We are offering a training to become a patent engineer, with good pay from the beginning. After one or two years, this job can turn into an employment in Munich, Germany.



In your application, please indicate which university you graduated from and with what final grades.

title: Virtual Assistant – HR, Payroll, Bookkeeping & Operations (Full-Time)
description:
Job Overview



We are a growing U.S.-based company seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and trustworthy Virtual Assistant to manage HR administration, payroll, bookkeeping, sales tax reporting, and general office operations.



This role is critical to our daily operations and financial accuracy. You will handle contractor and employee administration, weekly payroll, commissions, bookkeeping in QuickBooks, sales tax reporting, annual renewals, and serve as the primary person answering incoming customer service calls.



This is a full-time (40 hours per week), long-term position.



Work Schedule & Pay



Hours: 40 hours per week



Pay Rate: $3–$6 USD per hour, based on experience



Pay Schedule: Paid weekly every Thursday



Pay Period: Friday through Thursday, paid on the same Thursday



Payment Method: Wise (USD converted to PHP and deposited directly into your bank account)



Tools & Equipment



Must have your own computer and stable internet connection



We will provide:



Company
 address



Company phone number via RingCentral



Access to QuickBooks, Google Workspace, and shared Google Sheets



Key Responsibilities

HR & Workforce Administration



Manage onboarding and offboarding for 1099 contractors



Prepare for and assist with onboarding of W-2 employees (coming soon)



Maintain accurate personnel and contractor records



Track Paid Time Off (PTO) and holiday pay (where applicable)



Maintain confidentiality of all HR and payroll information



Serve as an administrative point of contact for tea
mbers



Payroll & Commissions



Process weekly payroll for:



1099 contractors



W-2 employees (as they are added)



Ensure payroll is processed accurately for the Friday–Thursday pay period and paid the same Thursday



Handle commission calculations and payroll splits



Maintain and update commission tracking in Google Sheets



Coordinate hourly pay for office staff and commission-based pay for sales reps



Review payroll data for accuracy before processing in QuickBooks



Bookkeeping & Financial Management



Perform general bookkeeping in QuickBooks, including:



Recording incoming payments (income)



Recording outgoing payments (expenses)



Reconcile weekly and monthly transactions



Maintain clean, organized financial records



Generate financial reports, including:



Profit & Loss (P&L) reports



Expense and income summaries



Prepare bookkeeping records for quarterly and annual review



Sales Tax & Monthly Reporting



Generate monthly sales tax reports



Prepare sales tax filings due on the 15th of each month



Present sales tax reports for management approval prior to submission



Maintain proper documentation of all sales tax filings



Annual, Compliance & Renewal Tasks



Maintain a master renewal tracker for all annual and recurring items, including:



Business annual reports (EIN/state filings)



General liability insurance renewal



Lease renewals



Chamber of Commerce memberships



Other required licenses, subscriptions, and renewals



Prepare financial documentation for our CPA, including:



Expense reports



Income summaries



Payroll records



Assist with year-end preparation and annual reviews



Customer Service & Phone Support



Serve as the primary person answering incoming phone calls



Handle basic customer service inquiries professionally and efficiently



Route calls internally as needed



Maintain a friendly, professional phone presence



Allow showroom staff to focus on in-person customers without interruption



General Administrative & Operations Support



Maintain organized digital filing systems



Track deadlines and follow up on pending tasks



Communicate clearly with management and internal teams



Identify opportunities to improve processes and organization



Provide general administrative support as needed



Required Qualifications



Proven experience in HR administration, payroll, and bookkeeping



Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks



Experience handling 1099 contractors (W-2 experience is a plus)



Strong skills in Google Sheets / Excel



Experience managing commissions and payroll splits



High attention to detail and accuracy



Strong organizational and time management skills



Clear written and spoken English



Comfortable answering phone calls and speaking with customers



Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)

Familiarity with U.S. payroll and sales tax processes

What We’re Looking For

title: We’re Hiring: Quoting Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a Quoting Specialist who can confidently handle day-to-day quoting with minimal supervision and still knows when to collaborate. This is a great fit for someone ready to step up from basic quoting into more independent, client-facing work.



What you’ll be doing

1. Prepare personal and commercial quotes independently

2. Handle low-complexity submissions with minimal guidance

3. Work across different lines of business (LOBs) and understand how each is quoted

4. Reach out to clients and recommend smart quoting strategies, especially for bundled policies

5. Stay on top of quotes and follow through consistently



What you should already know

1. Experience using EZLynx or Applied Epic

2. Comfortable working in Slack for team communication

3. Familiar with Freshdesk, Freshchat, Freshcaller, or similar ticketing tools

4. Familiar with filling out ACORD forms accurately

5. Understand the U.S. insurance quoting process end-to-end

6. Able to manage calls, sms, and follow-up quotes to clients



How you work

1. You’re proactive, you don’t wait to be told what to do

2. You can follow SOPs and processes without cutting corners

3. You support team goals and direction

4. You bring a good, steady attitude to work every day



Your setup

1. Reliable internet (with backup) -  (50/20 Mbps recommended for smoother calls and multitasking)

2. Power backup

3. Noise-cancelling headset

4. A laptop that can actually handle work (not just basic use)



Why join us?

We’re building a team where people are trusted to do their work, speak up, and grow. You won’t be micromanaged, but you will be supported. We value consistency, accountability, and people who take pride in what they do.

If you’re looking for a place where your work actually matters and your skills keep improving, you’ll fit right in.



If you read till here:

Send a link to your public resume.



Please do not apply if you don’t have the prior knowledge listed above. You’ll be doing yourself, and us a favor. We don’t want to waste your time or ours. Thank you for understanding.

title: Copywriter
description:
Copywriter Job Post — AI Search (GEO/AEO) Content Specialist



About Us



At IndexLLM, we help companies win visibility in the new era of search — not just on Google, but across AI engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE.



Search has changed.

Ranking #1 is no longer enough.

If AI doesn’t mention you, you don’t exist.



We work with B2B SaaS, fintech, and tech companies that want to dominate both traditional SEO and AI-driven discovery (GEO/AEO).







The Role



We’re looking for a high-level copywriter who understands that writing today is not just about blogs — it’s about owning answers across the internet.



You’ll create deep, structured, high-authority content designed to:



* Rank on Google

* Get picked up by AI engines

* Be repurposed across Reddit, Quora, LinkedIn, and more



This is NOT a “content mill” role.

We’re looking for someone who can think strategically and write with intent.







What You’ll Do



1. Create High-Performance Articles



* 1,800–2,500+ word articles

* Built for SEO + GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)

* Clear structure: TL;DR, TOC, H2/H3, FAQs

* Focus on real value, not fluff







2. Write for AI Visibility (GEO/AEO)



Content must be:

    * Clear

    * Factual

    * Directly answer questions

    * Structured to be quoted by AI engines







3. Repurpose Content Across Platforms



Turn each article into:



* LinkedIn posts (2 versions)

* Reddit posts (authentic tone)

* Quora answers (authoritative)

*
/X threads

* Meta descriptions + titles





4. Think Like a Strategist



* Understand search intent

* Identify opportunities to dominate topics

* Suggest improvements proactively







Requirements



Must Have



* Proven experience in SEO content writing

* Ability to write structured, long-form content

* Strong research skills

* Native or near-native English





Huge Advantage (what we REALLY care about)



* Understanding of:

    * SEO

    * GEO / AEO concepts

    * Experience writing humanized content





Red Flags (don’t apply if this is you)



* You rely on generic AI content without editing

* You write fluff instead of insights

* You don’t structure content properly



Test Task



You’ll receive a structured assignment including:



* A subject, while you will need to prepare the keyword research, or we will provide it to you

* Intent

* SEO guidelines



We evaluate based on:



* Clarity

* Structure

* Depth

* Keywords

* AI-readability

title: Director of Operations / Executive Assistant (Remote, Full-Time) Alexis Weigand Real Estate | Texas, USA (Work from Home
description:
About Us



Alexis Weigand Real Estate is one of the top-producing luxury real estate teams in Texas, with over 2,500 closed transactions and more than 1,000 five-star reviews. We are a fast-moving, high-volume team based in Boerne, Texas, with a fully remote staff that operates together on Zoom every day. We invest in our people, train heavily on AI tools, and hold everyone on the team to a high standard.

About This Role

This is not a single-function job. We are looking for someone who can operate as the right hand to the team owner, keep the business running smoothly behind the scenes, and step into transaction coordination work as part of their daily workflow.

You will serve as Executive Assistant to the owner, Director of Operations for the team, and a supporting Transaction Coordinator for a dedicated set of agents. If you are someone who thrives on variety, takes ownership without being asked twice, and can context-switch between high-level operations and detailed transaction work, this role was built for you.

Hours

8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST, Monday through Friday on Zoom (equivalent to 9:00 PM to 6:00 AM PHT). You must be consistently available and responsive during all scheduled hours.

What You Will Do

Executive Assistant and Operations



Manage the owner's
 inbox, draft responses, and flag priorities daily

Ensure all team bills and vendor invoices are paid on time

Process payroll and payments for all remote staff on schedule

Track team time off, attendance, and scheduling

Troubleshoot systems issues across all platforms the team uses and coordinate solutions

Serve as the internal point of contact when something breaks or needs escalating



Agent Onboarding and Offboarding



Own the full onboarding process for every new agent joining the team

Set up access to all platforms, ensure training is completed, and confirm each agent is fully operational before going live

Manage offboarding when agents exit, including revoking access, transferring files, and closing out open items cleanly



Transaction Coordination



Manage contracts from executed agreement to close for an assigned group of agents

Track all deadlines, contingency dates, and closing timelines

Coordinate with title companies, lenders, and inspectors on behalf of your assigned agents

Maintain accurate records in Follow Up Boss and Brivity

Send proactive client updates at key milestones throughout each transaction

Be cross-trained and available to support the broader TC workload when needed



What We Are Looking For



Experience working with a US-based real estate team in an operations, EA, or TC capacity

Familiarity with Follow Up Boss strongly preferred

Understanding of the US residential real estate transaction process

Excellent written and spoken English

Highly organized with the ability to manage competing priorities across multiple functions simultaneously

Someone who takes initiative, follows through without reminders, and communicates problems early

Comfortable using AI tools or genuinely eager to learn them at a high level

Reliable high-speed internet and a professional home office setup



Compensation



$12,000 USD per year, paid consistently

Full-time, long-term position (not project-based)





To Apply, Please Submit a Short Video (3 to 5 minutes) Answering the Following:

Point your camera at yourself, speak clearly, and answer each question. No application without a video will be considered.



Introduce yourself. Tell us who you are, where you live, and what you enjoy outside of work.

What are your core values and what matters most to you in your work?

Rate your spoken and written English on a scale of 1 to 10. Be honest.

Walk us through your experience supporting a team in an operations or EA capacity. What did you own and what did a typical week look like?

Have you worked with Follow Up Boss, Brivity, or any other US real estate platforms? Describe how you used them.

Tell us about a time you had to manage multiple urgent priorities at once. What happened and how did you handle it?

Have you ever onboarded a new employee or tea
mber? Walk us through how you approached it.

How are you currently using AI tools in your work? If you have not started, tell us how open you are to learning.

What is most important to you in your next role and where do you want to be in one year and five years?

Anything else you want us to know? Any questions for us?

title: Call Center Administrative Support
description:
Role Overview:

The Call Center Administrative Support role provides essential operational and administrative assistance to ensure the smooth day-to-day functioning of a high-volume call center. This position supports call center staff and leadership by managing data entry, tracking communications, coordinating schedules, and maintaining accurate records. The role is critical in helping frontline agents focus on delivering high-quality service by handling behind-the-scenes administrative tasks efficiently and accurately.





Key Responsibilities:

* Provide administrative support to call center operations, including data entry, record keeping, and documentation of customer interactions.

* Maintain and update databases, ensuring accuracy and completeness of non-identifying or sensitive information.

* Assist with call tracking, reporting, and quality assurance documentation.

* Monitor inboxes, chat systems, or ticketing platforms and route inquiries appropriately.

* Support scheduling, shift coordination, and attendance tracking for call center staff.

* Prepare reports, summaries, and spreadsheets for leadership review.

* Ensure compliance with internal procedures, confidentiality standards, and data handling protocols.

* Assist with onboarding logistics, training coordination, and internal communications.

* Identify process inefficiencies and recommend administrative improvements.





Skills & Qualifications:

* Previous administrative or call center support experience preferred.

* Strong proficiency in Microsoft 365 (Excel, Outlook, Teams, Word) and ability to learn new systems quickly.

* Excellent organizational skills with strong attention to detail.

* Effective written and verbal communication skills.

* Ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

* Strong time management and problem-solving abilities.

* Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a team.

* High level of professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality.



Key Attributes:

* Reliable and proactive with a strong sense of accountability.

* Detail-oriented and process-driven.

* Adaptable and comfortable working in dynamic environments.

* Supportive team player with a customer-service mindset.



Impact of the Role:

This role ensures operational efficiency within the call center by maintaining accurate records, supporting staff workflows, and enabling frontline agents to focus on delivering timely and effective service to callers.





To fast-track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



[REQUIRED] Podio Form Link: 
/webforms/
/

title: Short-Form Video Editor
description:
We’re Hiring: Remote Contractual Short-Form Video Editor

(Include the word “Compass” in your application title so we know you read this.)



Are you passionate about creating content that grabs attention, stops the scroll, and has real viral potential?



We’re looking for a creative, detail-driven Short-Form Video Editor to join our team in a contractual role, with strong room to grow. This is a great opportunity for someone who understands how to make engaging content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, while also wanting to grow with a team that values structure, quality, and long-term success.



We are not simply looking to hire an editor. We are looking for someone who wants to be part of a creative system built for growth, consistency, and excellence.



You should live and breathe short-form content. If you understand pacing, hooks, storytelling, and current trends, you’ll fit right in.



What You’ll Be Doing

Editing scroll-stopping videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

Using Adobe Premiere Pro and CapCut to produce clean, engaging, high-retention edits

Adding custom animated captions, sound effects, transitions, and music

Using Matt Hannan’s content style and overall brand direction as a creative reference point, while still bringing your own editing instinct and ideas 

Communicating with the team and meeting deadlines consistently

Revising edits when needed to help us achieve the strongest possible final output



What We’re Looking For

A solid portfolio of short-form videos, ideally with viral performance or strong engagement

Expert skills in Adobe Premiere Pro and CapCut

Strong editing fundamentals, including:

• custom animated captions

• clean sound design and SFX

• tight pacing, with no long dead air or slow cuts

• thoughtful music choices that support the content

A creative eye that can follow brand direction without relying on copy-paste editing

Excellent communication in English

Responsive during JST business hours, which is 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM Manila Time, on WhatsApp or Slack

Detail-oriented, organized, and open to feedback

Must include “Compass” in your application title



Compensation

Starting rate: $30 per completed reel

Editors will begin in a contractual editor role

For every THREE successful and outstanding completed reels, we will revisit the current rate and consider an increase based on quality, consistency, and overall performance

Additional opportunities are available for editors who consistently deliver exceptional work



Why You’ll Enjoy Working With Us

Fully remote and flexible workflow

Supportive, fast-moving creative team

Clear systems, direction, and room to grow

Opportunity to develop into a bigger role over time

Your work could reach thousands, or even millions, of viewers



How to Apply



Please send us:



Your portfolio of your best short-form edits

Links or performance stats, if available

An application title containing the word “Compass”



We’re excited to see your creativity and how you think. If you’re looking for a role where your editing skills can grow within an organized and ambitious team, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Cold Caller - Appointment Setter Remote
description:
About Us



Smart Setter is a trailblazing real estate technology company based in Canada, known for its innovative solutions and fast-paced environment. We specialize in revolutionizing outbound recruiting calls for real estate brokers across North America.



With over 4 million successful conversations with real estate professionals, we are the trusted partner for brokers seeking top-tier agents for their offices.



Position Details



Role Type: Part-Time (Fully Remote)



Schedule: 8:00 AM – 1:00 PM EST



Compensation: $500/month + performance-based commission



Role Overview



As an Outbound Cold Caller, you will be responsible for building a strong pipeline of qualified leads for real estate brokerages across North America. You will conduct high-volume outbound calls, engage real estate professionals using a structured script, and coordinate appointments to ensure successful follow-through.



This role requires making approximately 150–200 calls per day and consistently achieving weekly performance targets.



Key Responsibilities



Conduct outbound calls using our auto-dialer system



Follow a pre-written script to engage potential realtors



Build and maintain a strong pipeline of qualified leads



Set and confirm appointments between brokers and agents



Meet weekly targets of 10–15 booked appointments



Track performance and maintain required KPIs



Qualifications



Fluent in English with strong verbal communication skills



Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or sales



Confident handling objections and rejection



Highly organized with strong time management skills



Self-motivated and results-driven



System Requirements



Please ensure you meet the following technical specifications before applying:



PC or Mac with audio capabilities



Quality headset



Strong, reliable internet connection (hardwired required)



Quiet, professional work environment



Intel i5 CPU (or AMD equivalent) 2.0GHz Quad Core or better



Minimum 8GB RAM



At least 20GB free disk space



Windows 10 or Mac OS 10.12 and above



Application Instructions



To apply, please submit:



Your updated resume



A cover letter



A 60–90 second audio recording via 

answering:



A brief summary of your relevant experience



Your key achievements and core skills



Your salary expectation



Ensure your recording is clear, professional, and made in a quiet environment.



We look forward to hearing from motivated professionals ready to grow with Smart Setter

title: AI - Infrastructure Engineer / Technical Operator
description:
Edge Flow – Dubai (UAE)

Full-time | Long-term Role



About us & the Role



Hello, My name is Ryan Williams, im a 36 year old business owner based in the UK. I have multiple business interests and i split my time between the UK & UAE. I am building out Edge Flow, a technology and infrastructure-focused company in Dubai, UAE



We have already developed a number of:

- AI-powered applications

- SaaS platforms

- Automation systems



Some of these are apps fully functional and utilised by my UK companies as paying clients. These now need to be completed, refined, and taken to a higher level — both technically and commercially.



Alongside this, the next phase of the companies vision is to design and roll out a series of micro / edge data centres in the UAE, focused on AI compute and GPU infrastructure.



I am looking for a capable technical operator to work directly with me to deliver across both areas.



Responsibilities



You will be expected to take ownership and deliver outcomes with minimal input.



Core responsibilities include:

- Completing and improving existing AI and SaaS platforms (Lovable)

- Building and deploying AI agents and automation workflows (n8n, APIs, integrations)

- Connecting systems and ensuring reliable, scalable data flows

- Supporting the design and implementation of micro / edge data centre infrastructure

- Contributing to the development of revenue-generating products and systems



This is a delivery-focused role — ideas are already in motion, execution is the priority.



Required Skills & Experience

You should have strong experience in several of the following:



AI & Development

Experience with Lovable, claude & similar platforms

Building & working with AI agents, LLMs, and API integrations

Ability to build, refine, and deploy functional products quickly



Automation & Systems

Experienced with n8n (or similar advanced automation tools)

Building end-to-end workflows and integrations

Confident working with APIs, webhooks, and structured data



Infrastructure (Advantage)

Understanding of:

GPU servers / AI compute

Networking fundamentals

Small-scale or edge data centre environments



Working Style (Important)

This role requires someone who:

Works independently and does not require constant direction

Takes ownership of tasks from start to finish

Is proactive and solution-focused

Delivers consistently without close supervision



This is not a role for someone who needs ongoing guidance or hand-holding.



Location

Initially remote

Opportunity to relocate to Dubai (UAE) and set up the companies 1st micro edge data centre.



For the right person:

Option to work on-site in Dubai in private apartment



Current Focus

Finalising and scaling existing AI/SaaS platforms

Building robust automation systems and integrations

Preparing and testing micro edge data centre setups

Supporting ongoing technical delivery across multiple projects



Salary

Competitive salary, negotiable based on experience

Long-term role with ongoing project involvement



How to Apply

Please include:

- Video introduction

- Examples of relevant work (AI, automation, infrastructure)

- Platforms/tools you’ve used

- Confirmation you are comfortable working independently



Final Note



This is a hands-on, execution-driven role working directly with an ambitious founder across multiple active projects.



The direction is clear:

Complete and scale AI platforms

Build automation systems that support growth

Design & roll out micro edge data centre infrastructure & network in the UAE



I am looking for someone who can help drive & deliver all of the above and who will be my right hand in Dubai and will get stuff done!!!



If that sounds like you, please apply. 



Many thanks,



- Ryan
